---
title: "STAT 544 - SWITRS Crash Severity Notebook (Rebuilt for Correctly Merged Data)"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
  html_notebook: default 
---

# Package Chunk
```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# What: Global setup (packages, options, theme).
# Why: Ensures reproducibility and consistent formatting across the notebook.

options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
set.seed(544)

required_pkgs <- c(
  "dplyr", "tidyr", "stringr", "ggplot2", "scales", "purrr",
  "readr", "forcats", "corrplot", "broom", "rlang"
)

installed <- rownames(installed.packages())
to_install <- setdiff(required_pkgs, installed)
if (length(to_install) > 0) install.packages(to_install)

library(rlang)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(purrr)
library(readr)
library(forcats)
library(corrplot)
library(broom)

theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))
```

# Custom color palette
```{r}
outcome_palette <- c(
  "Other" = "#A8D5BA",
  "Severe/Fatal" = "#1B5E20"
)

yesno_palette <- c(
  "No" = "#A8D5BA",
  "Yes" = "#1B5E20"
)

scale_fill_outcome_switrs <- function(...) {
  scale_fill_manual(values = outcome_palette, ...)
}

scale_color_outcome_switrs <- function(...) {
  scale_color_manual(values = outcome_palette, ...)
}

scale_fill_yesno_switrs <- function(...) {
  scale_fill_manual(values = yesno_palette, ...)
}

scale_color_yesno_switrs <- function(...) {
  scale_color_manual(values = yesno_palette, ...)
}
```

# Load data (correctly merged dataset)
```{r}
# What: Load crash-grain merged SWITRS dataset (1 row per CASE_ID).
# Why: Parties/Victims have already been aggregated to crash-level in the merge notebook.

na_tokens <- c("NA", "N/A", "NULL", "null")

switrs_raw <- read.csv("merged_fixed_switrs.csv", na.strings = na_tokens, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

switrs <- switrs_raw
rm(switrs_raw)

dim(switrs)
glimpse(switrs)
```

# Basic sanity checks
```{r}
# What: Confirm crash-grain (1 row per crash).
# Why: The merge notebook output should already be 1 row per CASE_ID.

stopifnot("CASE_ID" %in% names(switrs))
stopifnot(n_distinct(switrs$CASE_ID) == nrow(switrs))

# Optional: show a few IDs to verify
head(switrs$CASE_ID, 10)
```

# Standardize "not stated" / placeholder missingness (do not lump into OTHER)
```{r}
# What: Normalize placeholder encodings with SWITRS-aware rules.
# Why: Standardizes "-" and blank encodings across the crash-grain dataset.
#      Preserves SWITRS semantics for "Y or blank" flags (blank/NA means No).

trim_chr <- function(x) stringr::str_trim(as.character(x))

# Global helper used later (EDA labels, hypothesis tests, plots)
# NOTE: we default blank_to_notstated=TRUE, but in the cleaning step below
#       we set blank_to_notstated=FALSE so Y-or-blank flags can still become "N".
normalize_not_stated <- function(x, not_stated_label = "Not Stated", blank_to_notstated = TRUE) {
  x <- trim_chr(x)

  # dashes and explicit "not stated"
  x[x %in% c("-", " -", "- ", " - ")] <- not_stated_label
  x[toupper(x) %in% c("NOT STATED", "NOTSTATED")] <- not_stated_label

  # optionally treat blank as Not Stated
  if (isTRUE(blank_to_notstated)) {
    x[x == ""] <- not_stated_label
  }
  x
}

# SWITRS "Y or blank" flags: blank (and often NA after read.csv) means NO
y_or_blank_flags <- intersect(
  c("PEDESTRIAN_ACCIDENT","BICYCLE_ACCIDENT","MOTORCYCLE_ACCIDENT","TRUCK_ACCIDENT",
    "NOT_PRIVATE_PROPERTY","ALCOHOL_INVOLVED"),
  names(switrs)
)

# 1) Trim + normalize dash-style placeholders on all character fields
#    IMPORTANT: do NOT convert blank->Not Stated here; we handle blanks in steps 2/3
switrs_clean <- switrs %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ normalize_not_stated(.x, blank_to_notstated = FALSE)))

# 2) For most character fields: "" => "Not Stated" (do NOT touch y-or-blank flags here)
char_cols <- names(switrs_clean)[sapply(switrs_clean, is.character)]
other_char_cols <- setdiff(char_cols, y_or_blank_flags)

switrs_clean <- switrs_clean %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(other_char_cols), ~ {
    x <- .x
    x[x == ""] <- "Not Stated"
    x
  }))

# 3) For y-or-blank flags: NA/"" => "N" (blank means No); keep "Not Stated" if it exists
switrs_clean <- switrs_clean %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(y_or_blank_flags), ~ {
    x <- trim_chr(.x)
    x[is.na(x) | x == ""] <- "N"
    x[x == "Y"] <- "Y"
    x
  }))
```

# Convert "UNKNOWN" road names to NA (special case)
```{r}
# What: Convert literal UNKNOWN / Not Stated for roadway name fields to NA.
# Why: For roadway names, these behave like missingness (not meaningful categories).

road_name_vars <- intersect(c("PRIMARY_RD", "SECONDARY_RD"), names(switrs_clean))

switrs_clean <- switrs_clean %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(road_name_vars), ~ {
    x <- as.character(.x)
    x <- str_trim(x)
    x[toupper(x) == "UNKNOWN"] <- NA_character_
    x[x == "Not Stated"] <- NA_character_
    x
  }))
```

# Convert Y/N and Y-only flags carefully
```{r}
# What: Standardize common flag formats into consistent factors.
# Why: SWITRS includes Y/N/blank-not-stated fields AND Y-or-blank fields (blank = No).

# Convert the "Y or blank" crash flags into factor(N, Y, Not Stated)
y_or_blank_flags <- intersect(
  c("PEDESTRIAN_ACCIDENT","BICYCLE_ACCIDENT","MOTORCYCLE_ACCIDENT","TRUCK_ACCIDENT",
    "NOT_PRIVATE_PROPERTY","ALCOHOL_INVOLVED"),
  names(switrs_clean)
)

switrs_clean <- switrs_clean %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(y_or_blank_flags), ~ {
    x <- str_trim(as.character(.x))
    # SWITRS: blank means No
    x[is.na(x) | x == ""] <- "N"
    # Dash was already normalized to "Not Stated" earlier
    x[x == "Y"] <- "Y"
    factor(x, levels = c("N","Y","Not Stated"))
  }))

# Standard Y/N/Not Stated fields (e.g., INTERSECTION, STATE_HWY_IND, TOW_AWAY, AT_FAULT, etc.)
crash_yn_whitelist <- intersect(
  c("INTERSECTION","STATE_HWY_IND","TOW_AWAY","AT_FAULT"),
  names(switrs_clean)
)

switrs_clean[crash_yn_whitelist] <- lapply(switrs_clean[crash_yn_whitelist], function(x) {
  x <- str_trim(as.character(x))
  x[x %in% c("", NA)] <- "Not Stated"
  factor(x, levels = c("N","Y","Not Stated"))
})

# HIT_AND_RUN is F/M/N (+ Not Stated), not Y/N.
if ("HIT_AND_RUN" %in% names(switrs_clean)) {
  switrs_clean <- switrs_clean %>%
    mutate(HIT_AND_RUN = factor(
      ifelse(is.na(HIT_AND_RUN), "Not Stated", HIT_AND_RUN),
      levels = c("N","M","F","Not Stated")
    ))
}

# PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY is Char(2): keep leading zeros (01, 02, ..., 24, 00).
if ("PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY" %in% names(switrs_clean)) {
  switrs_clean <- switrs_clean %>%
    mutate(
      PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY = as.character(PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY),
      PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY = str_trim(PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY),
      PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY = ifelse(PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY == "Not Stated", "Not Stated",
                                 ifelse(PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY %in% c("", NA), NA_character_, PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY)),
      PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY = ifelse(
        !is.na(PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY) & PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY != "Not Stated" & str_detect(PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY, "^[0-9]+$"),
        str_pad(PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY, width = 2, pad = "0"),
        PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY
      )
    )
}
```

# Force known codebook-coded categoricals to be categorical
```{r}
# What: Coerce known SWITRS coded fields to factors before EDA, plots, and hypothesis tests.
# Why: Prevents code-like variables from being misread as numeric and sent to t-tests.

# DAY_OF_WEEK is coded categorical, not numeric
if ("DAY_OF_WEEK" %in% names(switrs_clean)) {
  switrs_clean <- switrs_clean %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      DAY_OF_WEEK = dplyr::case_when(
        as.character(DAY_OF_WEEK) %in% c("1","2","3","4","5","6","7") ~ as.character(DAY_OF_WEEK),
        TRUE ~ "Not Stated"
      ),
      DAY_OF_WEEK = factor(
        DAY_OF_WEEK,
        levels = c("1","2","3","4","5","6","7","Not Stated"),
        labels = c("Monday","Tuesday","Wednesday","Thursday","Friday","Saturday","Sunday","Not Stated")
      )
    )
}

# These are coded categorical fields; keep as factors, not numeric
coded_factor_vars <- intersect(
  c(
    "WEATHER_1",
    "WEATHER_2",
    "LIGHTING",
    "ROAD_SURFACE",
    "TYPE_OF_COLLISION",
    "PRIMARY_COLL_FACTOR",
    "PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY",
    "PED_ACTION",
    "CONTROL_DEVICE",
    "CHP_SHIFT",
    "BEAT_TYPE",
    "CHP_BEAT_TYPE",
    "CHP_BEAT_CLASS",
    "SPECIAL_COND"
  ),
  names(switrs_clean)
)

switrs_clean <- switrs_clean %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(all_of(coded_factor_vars), ~ {
      x <- trimws(as.character(.x))
      x[x %in% c("", NA)] <- "Not Stated"
      factor(x)
    })
  )

# Binary engineered / aggregate variables that should behave like categorical in plots/tests
binary_factor_vars <- intersect(
  c(
    "INTERSECTION",
    "STATE_HWY_IND",
    "TOW_AWAY",
    "AT_FAULT",
    "PEDESTRIAN_ACCIDENT",
    "BICYCLE_ACCIDENT",
    "MOTORCYCLE_ACCIDENT",
    "TRUCK_ACCIDENT",
    "NOT_PRIVATE_PROPERTY",
    "ALCOHOL_INVOLVED"
  ),
  names(switrs_clean)
)

switrs_clean <- switrs_clean %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(all_of(binary_factor_vars), ~ {
      x <- trimws(as.character(.x))
      x[x %in% c("", NA)] <- "Not Stated"
      factor(x)
    })
  )

cat("Early categorical typing complete.\n")
```

# quick audit
```{r}
check_vars <- intersect(c(
  "DAY_OF_WEEK", "WEATHER_1", "LIGHTING", "ROAD_SURFACE",
  "PRIMARY_COLL_FACTOR", "TYPE_OF_COLLISION", "PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY"
), names(switrs_clean))

sapply(switrs_clean[check_vars], class)
```

# Build the crash-level analysis table
```{r}
# What: Finalize crash-level analysis table.
# Why: Data are already crash-grain; after cleaning we proceed with switrs_reduced.
#      Keep the original switrs object in memory for report-only structure/independence checks.

switrs_reduced <- switrs_clean
rm(switrs_clean)
```

# validate Road_Surface
```{r}
# What: Validate ROAD_SURFACE against codebook-valid codes.
# Why: Codebook defines ROAD_SURFACE as A-D (plus Not Stated). Anything else is out-of-spec.

if ("ROAD_SURFACE" %in% names(switrs_reduced)) {

  valid_road_surface <- c("A","B","C","D","Not Stated")

  switrs_reduced <- switrs_reduced %>%
    mutate(
      ROAD_SURFACE = normalize_not_stated(ROAD_SURFACE, blank_to_notstated = TRUE),
      ROAD_SURFACE = ifelse(is.na(ROAD_SURFACE), "Not Stated", ROAD_SURFACE),

      ROAD_SURFACE_invalid = ifelse(ROAD_SURFACE %in% valid_road_surface, 0L, 1L),
      ROAD_SURFACE_raw = ifelse(ROAD_SURFACE_invalid == 1L, ROAD_SURFACE, NA_character_),

      ROAD_SURFACE = ifelse(ROAD_SURFACE_invalid == 1L, "Not Stated", ROAD_SURFACE)
    )

  cat("Out-of-spec ROAD_SURFACE codes (flagged + recoded to Not Stated):\n")
  print(table(switrs_reduced$ROAD_SURFACE_raw, useNA = "ifany"))
}
```

# Cleanup: remove ROAD_SURFACE validation helper columns (data-quality flags)
```{r}
switrs_reduced <- switrs_reduced %>%
  dplyr::select(-dplyr::any_of(c("ROAD_SURFACE_invalid","ROAD_SURFACE_raw")))
```

# Missingness Diagnostics (before dropping columns)
```{r}
# What: Missingness diagnostics at the correct crash-level grain.
# Why: NA% on merged rows is misleading (structural NA from join).

missing_na_pct <- colMeans(is.na(switrs_reduced)) * 100

notstated_pct <- sapply(switrs_reduced, function(x) {
  if (!(is.character(x) || is.factor(x))) return(NA_real_)
  mean(as.character(x) == "Not Stated", na.rm = TRUE) * 100
})

missing_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
  variable = names(switrs_reduced),
  pct_na = as.numeric(missing_na_pct),
  pct_notstated = as.numeric(notstated_pct)
) %>%
  arrange(desc(pct_na), desc(pct_notstated))

head(missing_tbl, 30)
```

# drop columns with too much effective missingness
```{r}
# What: Drop columns exceeding missingness threshold using NA for numeric variables
#       and NA/"Not Stated" for categorical variables.
# Why: Many SWITRS categoricals were standardized to "Not Stated", so using only true NA
#      understates how incomplete those variables really are.

high_miss_threshold <- 30

effective_missing_pct <- sapply(switrs_reduced, function(x) {
  if (is.character(x) || is.factor(x)) {
    mean(is.na(x) | as.character(x) == "Not Stated") * 100
  } else {
    mean(is.na(x)) * 100
  }
})

high_miss_vars <- names(effective_missing_pct)[effective_missing_pct > high_miss_threshold]

protect_vars <- intersect(
  c("COLLISION_SEVERITY", "NUMBER_KILLED", "NUMBER_INJURED"),
  names(switrs_reduced)
)

high_miss_vars <- setdiff(high_miss_vars, protect_vars)

cat("Variables above effective missingness threshold:\n")
print(sort(effective_missing_pct[high_miss_vars], decreasing = TRUE))

switrs_reduced <- switrs_reduced %>%
  dplyr::select(-dplyr::all_of(high_miss_vars))

cat("\nRemaining dimensions after dropping high-missingness variables:\n")
print(dim(switrs_reduced))
```

# drop deprecated / non-analytic variables
```{r}
# What: Remove variables deprecated in the codebook or not analytically useful.

drop_vars <- intersect(
  c("CHP_SHIFT","BEAT_TYPE","CHP_BEAT_CLASS","CALTRANS_COUNTY","CALTRANS_DISTRICT","STATE_ROUTE",
    "ROUTE_SUFFIX","POSTMILE_PREFIX","POSTMILE","LOCATION_TYPE","RAMP_INTERSECTION","CHP_ROAD_TYPE"),
  names(switrs_reduced)
)

switrs_reduced <- switrs_reduced %>% select(-all_of(drop_vars))
dim(switrs_reduced)
```

# Preserve raw-coded severity and create SevereBinary outcome
```{r}
# Preserve raw-coded severity and create outcomes (KSI + fatal-only + deaths)
# What: Create SevereBinary (KSI proxy) from COLLISION_SEVERITY, plus FatalBinary/Deaths for impact reporting.
# Why: SevereBinary (codes 1/2) is the main actionable “prevent worst outcomes” target.
#      FatalBinary/Deaths keep the story explicitly “save lives” without leaking into predictors.

if ("COLLISION_SEVERITY" %in% names(switrs_reduced)) {
  switrs_reduced <- switrs_reduced %>%
    mutate(
      COLLISION_SEVERITY_CODE = str_trim(as.character(COLLISION_SEVERITY)),
      COLLISION_SEVERITY_CODE = ifelse(COLLISION_SEVERITY_CODE %in% c("", "Not Stated"), NA_character_, COLLISION_SEVERITY_CODE),

      SevereBinary = case_when(
        COLLISION_SEVERITY_CODE %in% c("1","2") ~ "Severe/Fatal",
        COLLISION_SEVERITY_CODE %in% c("0","3","4") ~ "Other",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      SevereBinary = factor(SevereBinary, levels = c("Other","Severe/Fatal"))
    )
} else {
  stop("COLLISION_SEVERITY not found; cannot create SevereBinary/KSI.")
}

if ("NUMBER_KILLED" %in% names(switrs_reduced)) {
  switrs_reduced <- switrs_reduced %>%
    mutate(
      NUMBER_KILLED_NUM = suppressWarnings(as.integer(NUMBER_KILLED)),
      FatalBinary = case_when(
        is.na(NUMBER_KILLED_NUM) ~ NA_integer_,
        NUMBER_KILLED_NUM > 0 ~ 1L,
        TRUE ~ 0L
      ),
      Deaths = NUMBER_KILLED_NUM
    )
} else {
  switrs_reduced$FatalBinary <- NA_integer_
  switrs_reduced$Deaths <- NA_integer_
}

cat("\nOutcome counts:\n")
print(table(switrs_reduced$SevereBinary, useNA = "ifany"))

if (all(c("FatalBinary","COLLISION_SEVERITY_CODE") %in% names(switrs_reduced))) {
  sev_fatal_code <- switrs_reduced$COLLISION_SEVERITY_CODE == "1"
  cat("\nAudit table: COLLISION_SEVERITY==1 (fatal code) vs FatalBinary(NUMBER_KILLED>0)\n")
  print(table(sev_fatal_code, switrs_reduced$FatalBinary, useNA = "ifany"))

  mismatch <- sum(sev_fatal_code & switrs_reduced$FatalBinary == 0, na.rm = TRUE) +
              sum(!sev_fatal_code & switrs_reduced$FatalBinary == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  cat("Fatal-code vs killed-count mismatches (non-NA):", mismatch, "\n")
}
```

# Leak-proofing: ban outcome/harm variables from ever being used as predictors
```{r}
leakage_vars <- c(
  "COLLISION_SEVERITY", "COLLISION_SEVERITY_CODE", "COLLISION_SEVERITY_LAB",
  "SevereBinary",
  "NUMBER_KILLED", "NUMBER_KILLED_NUM", "FatalBinary", "Deaths",
  "NUMBER_INJURED",
  "COUNT_SEVERE_INJ", "COUNT_VISIBLE_INJ",
  "COUNT_PED_KILLED", "COUNT_PED_INJURED",
  "COUNT_BICYCLIST_KILLED", "COUNT_BICYCLIST_INJURED",
  "COUNT_MC_KILLED", "COUNT_MC_INJURED",
  "n_victims_killed", "any_victim_ksi","HIT_AND_RUN",
  "COUNT_COMPLAINT_PAIN"
)

leakage_vars <- intersect(leakage_vars, names(switrs_reduced))
cat("Leakage vars detected in data (will be banned from predictors):\n")
print(leakage_vars)
```

# Policy prioritization helpers
```{r policy_priority_helpers}
# What: Create helpers that classify tables by burden and rate simultaneously.
# Why: Policy decisions should prioritize where the most harm happens, not rate alone.

normalize_01 <- function(x) {
  rng <- range(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (!all(is.finite(rng)) || diff(rng) == 0) {
    return(rep(0, length(x)))
  }
  (x - rng[1]) / diff(rng)
}

classify_burden_risk <- function(df,
                                 burden_var = "severe_n",
                                 risk_var = "severe_per_100",
                                 burden_prob = 0.75,
                                 risk_prob = 0.75) {
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(df)

  burden_cut <- stats::quantile(df[[burden_var]], probs = burden_prob, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE)
  risk_cut   <- stats::quantile(df[[risk_var]], probs = risk_prob,   na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE)

  out <- df %>%
    mutate(
      burden_tier = ifelse(.data[[burden_var]] >= burden_cut, "High burden", "Lower burden"),
      risk_tier   = ifelse(.data[[risk_var]]   >= risk_cut,   "High rate",   "Lower rate"),
      priority_tier = case_when(
        burden_tier == "High burden" & risk_tier == "High rate"   ~ "Priority 1: High burden + high rate",
        burden_tier == "High burden" & risk_tier == "Lower rate"  ~ "Priority 2: High burden + lower rate",
        burden_tier == "Lower burden" & risk_tier == "High rate"  ~ "Priority 3: Lower burden + high rate",
        TRUE                                                      ~ "Priority 4: Lower burden + lower rate"
      ),
      priority_tier = factor(
        priority_tier,
        levels = c(
          "Priority 1: High burden + high rate",
          "Priority 2: High burden + lower rate",
          "Priority 3: Lower burden + high rate",
          "Priority 4: Lower burden + lower rate"
        )
      )
    )

  out
}

cat("Policy-priority helpers loaded: normalize_01(), classify_burden_risk()\n")
```

# Location hotspots
```{r}
# WHERE: Hotspot ranking using available location fields
# Builds one master hotspot table, then creates burden/rate/death rankings from it.

has_latlon <- all(c("LATITUDE", "LONGITUDE") %in% names(switrs_reduced))
has_roads  <- all(c("PRIMARY_RD", "SECONDARY_RD") %in% names(switrs_reduced))
has_city   <- "CITY" %in% names(switrs_reduced)

switrs_where <- switrs_reduced %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(SevereBinary)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    lat_bin = if (has_latlon) round(as.numeric(LATITUDE), 2) else NA_real_,
    lon_bin = if (has_latlon) round(as.numeric(LONGITUDE), 2) else NA_real_,
    latlon_key = if (has_latlon) paste0(lat_bin, ", ", lon_bin) else NA_character_,

    rd1 = if (has_roads) stringr::str_squish(toupper(as.character(PRIMARY_RD))) else NA_character_,
    rd2 = if (has_roads) stringr::str_squish(toupper(as.character(SECONDARY_RD))) else NA_character_,

    rd1 = dplyr::if_else(is.na(rd1) | rd1 %in% c("", "NOT STATED", "UNKNOWN"), NA_character_, rd1),
    rd2 = dplyr::if_else(is.na(rd2) | rd2 %in% c("", "NOT STATED", "UNKNOWN"), NA_character_, rd2),

    rd_lo = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(rd1) & !is.na(rd2), pmin(rd1, rd2), NA_character_),
    rd_hi = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(rd1) & !is.na(rd2), pmax(rd1, rd2), NA_character_),
    inter_key = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(rd_lo) & !is.na(rd_hi), paste0(rd_lo, " & ", rd_hi), NA_character_),

    city_key = if (has_city) {
      x <- stringr::str_squish(toupper(as.character(CITY)))
      dplyr::if_else(is.na(x) | x %in% c("", "NOT STATED", "UNKNOWN"), NA_character_, x)
    } else NA_character_,

    location_key = dplyr::case_when(
      !is.na(inter_key) ~ inter_key,
      is.na(inter_key) & !is.na(latlon_key) ~ latlon_key,
      is.na(inter_key) & is.na(latlon_key) & !is.na(city_key) ~ city_key,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    location_type = dplyr::case_when(
      !is.na(inter_key) ~ "Intersection (PRIMARY_RD & SECONDARY_RD)",
      is.na(inter_key) & !is.na(latlon_key) ~ "Lat/Lon bin (~0.01°)",
      is.na(inter_key) & is.na(latlon_key) & !is.na(city_key) ~ "City",
      TRUE ~ "Missing"
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(location_key))

min_crashes <- 10
min_severe  <- 1

hotspot_tbl <- switrs_where %>%
  dplyr::group_by(location_type, location_key) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_crashes = dplyr::n(),
    severe_n = sum(SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal", na.rm = TRUE),
    severe_per_100 = 100 * severe_n / n_crashes,
    fatal_crash_n = sum(FatalBinary == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    deaths = sum(Deaths, na.rm = TRUE),
    deaths_per_100 = 100 * deaths / n_crashes,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    severe_share_all = ifelse(sum(severe_n, na.rm = TRUE) > 0,
                              severe_n / sum(severe_n, na.rm = TRUE),
                              NA_real_),
    deaths_share_all = ifelse(sum(deaths, na.rm = TRUE) > 0,
                              deaths / sum(deaths, na.rm = TRUE),
                              NA_real_)
  )

hotspots_by_rate <- hotspot_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(n_crashes >= min_crashes, severe_n >= min_severe) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(severe_per_100), dplyr::desc(severe_n), dplyr::desc(n_crashes))

hotspots_by_count <- hotspot_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(n_crashes >= min_crashes) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(severe_n), dplyr::desc(deaths), dplyr::desc(severe_per_100), dplyr::desc(n_crashes))

hotspots_by_deaths <- hotspot_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(n_crashes >= min_crashes) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(deaths), dplyr::desc(severe_n), dplyr::desc(n_crashes))

hotspots_policy_tbl <- hotspot_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(n_crashes >= min_crashes, severe_n >= min_severe) %>%
  classify_burden_risk(
    burden_var = "severe_n",
    risk_var = "severe_per_100"
  )

hotspots_policy_priority <- hotspots_policy_tbl %>%
  dplyr::mutate(priority_flag = priority_tier == "Priority 1: High burden + high rate") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(
    dplyr::desc(priority_flag),
    dplyr::desc(deaths),
    dplyr::desc(severe_n),
    dplyr::desc(severe_per_100),
    dplyr::desc(n_crashes)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-priority_flag)

hotspots_priority_1 <- hotspots_policy_priority %>%
  dplyr::filter(priority_tier == "Priority 1: High burden + high rate")

cat("\nTop 20 hotspots by Severe/Fatal RATE (min_crashes =", min_crashes,
    ", min_severe =", min_severe, "):\n")
print(head(hotspots_by_rate, 20))

cat("\nTop 20 hotspots by DEATHS (min_crashes =", min_crashes, "):\n")
print(head(hotspots_by_deaths, 20))

cat("\nTop 20 hotspots by Severe/Fatal COUNT (min_crashes =", min_crashes, "):\n")
print(head(hotspots_by_count, 20))

cat("\nTop policy-priority hotspots (high burden first, then high rate):\n")
print(head(hotspots_policy_priority, 20))
```

# Sanity Check
```{r}
dplyr::count(switrs_where, location_type)
summary(nchar(switrs_where$location_key))
```

# Derive core time features(+ engineered risk flags & interactions)
```{r}
# What: Derive standardized time features and engineer proposal-aligned risk flags + interaction terms.

safe_parse_yyyymmdd <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- str_trim(x)
  x[x %in% c("", "Not Stated")] <- NA_character_
  suppressWarnings(as.Date(x, format = "%Y%m%d"))
}

safe_parse_hhmm <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- str_trim(x)
  x[x %in% c("", "Not Stated")] <- NA_character_
  x_num <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(x))
  x_num[x_num >= 2500] <- NA_integer_
  hr <- x_num %/% 100
  hr[hr < 0 | hr > 23] <- NA_integer_
  hr
}

if ("ACCIDENT_YEAR" %in% names(switrs_reduced)) {
  switrs_reduced <- switrs_reduced %>% mutate(year = as.integer(ACCIDENT_YEAR))
}

if ("COLLISION_TIME" %in% names(switrs_reduced)) {
  switrs_reduced <- switrs_reduced %>% mutate(hour = safe_parse_hhmm(COLLISION_TIME))
}

if ("DAY_OF_WEEK" %in% names(switrs_reduced)) {
  switrs_reduced <- switrs_reduced %>%
    mutate(
      dow_chr = as.character(DAY_OF_WEEK),
      weekend = case_when(
        dow_chr %in% c("6","7","Saturday","Sunday") ~ 1L,
        dow_chr %in% c("1","2","3","4","5","Monday","Tuesday","Wednesday","Thursday","Friday") ~ 0L,
        TRUE ~ NA_integer_
      ),
      weekend = factor(weekend, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("Weekday","Weekend")),
      day_group = case_when(
        dow_chr %in% c("1","2","3","4","Monday","Tuesday","Wednesday","Thursday") ~ "Mon-Thu",
        dow_chr %in% c("5","Friday") ~ "Friday",
        dow_chr %in% c("6","Saturday") ~ "Saturday",
        dow_chr %in% c("7","Sunday") ~ "Sunday",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      day_group = factor(day_group, levels = c("Mon-Thu","Friday","Saturday","Sunday"))
    ) %>%
    select(-dow_chr)
}

if ("hour" %in% names(switrs_reduced)) {
  switrs_reduced <- switrs_reduced %>%
    mutate(
      time_bucket = case_when(
        is.na(hour) ~ NA_character_,
        hour >= 0 & hour <= 5 ~ "Late Night (12–5)",
        hour >= 6 & hour <= 9 ~ "AM Commute (6–9)",
        hour >= 10 & hour <= 15 ~ "Midday (10–3)",
        hour >= 16 & hour <= 19 ~ "PM Commute (4–7)",
        TRUE ~ "Evening (8–11)"
      ),
      time_bucket = factor(time_bucket, levels = c(
        "Late Night (12–5)","AM Commute (6–9)","Midday (10–3)",
        "PM Commute (4–7)","Evening (8–11)"
      ))
    )
}

has_pcf      <- "PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY" %in% names(switrs_reduced)
has_weather  <- "WEATHER_1" %in% names(switrs_reduced)
has_light    <- "LIGHTING" %in% names(switrs_reduced)
has_ped      <- "PEDESTRIAN_ACCIDENT" %in% names(switrs_reduced)
has_hour     <- "hour" %in% names(switrs_reduced)

switrs_reduced <- switrs_reduced %>%
  mutate(
    night = if (has_hour) {
      case_when(
        is.na(hour) ~ NA_integer_,
        hour %in% c(20:23, 0:5) ~ 1L,
        TRUE ~ 0L
      )
    } else NA_integer_,

    friday_night = case_when(
      is.na(night) ~ NA_integer_,
      as.character(DAY_OF_WEEK) %in% c("5", "Friday") & night == 1L ~ 1L,
      as.character(DAY_OF_WEEK) %in% c("1","2","3","4","6","7",
                                       "Monday","Tuesday","Wednesday","Thursday",
                                       "Saturday","Sunday") |
        night == 0L ~ 0L,
      TRUE ~ NA_integer_
    ),

    pcf_dui = if (has_pcf) {
      x <- as.character(PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY)
      x <- str_trim(x)
      case_when(
        x %in% c("01","23") ~ 1L,
        x %in% c("Not Stated", "", NA) ~ NA_integer_,
        TRUE ~ 0L
      )
    } else NA_integer_,

    pcf_speed = if (has_pcf) {
      x <- as.character(PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY)
      x <- str_trim(x)
      case_when(
        x == "03" ~ 1L,
        x %in% c("Not Stated", "", NA) ~ NA_integer_,
        TRUE ~ 0L
      )
    } else NA_integer_,

    is_rain = if (has_weather) {
      x <- as.character(WEATHER_1)
      x <- str_trim(x)
      case_when(
        x == "C" ~ 1L,
        x %in% c("Not Stated", "", NA) ~ NA_integer_,
        TRUE ~ 0L
      )
    } else NA_integer_,

    is_dark = if (has_light) {
      x <- as.character(LIGHTING)
      x <- str_trim(x)
      case_when(
        x %in% c("C","D","E") ~ 1L,
        x %in% c("Not Stated", "", NA) ~ NA_integer_,
        TRUE ~ 0L
      )
    } else NA_integer_,

    is_ped = if (has_ped) {
      x <- as.character(PEDESTRIAN_ACCIDENT)
      x <- str_trim(x)
      case_when(
        x == "Y" ~ 1L,
        x == "N" ~ 0L,
        x %in% c("Not Stated", "", NA) ~ NA_integer_,
        TRUE ~ NA_integer_
      )
    } else NA_integer_,

    night_dui  = ifelse(!is.na(night) & !is.na(pcf_dui),     as.integer(night == 1L & pcf_dui == 1L), NA_integer_),
    rain_speed = ifelse(!is.na(is_rain) & !is.na(pcf_speed), as.integer(is_rain == 1L & pcf_speed == 1L), NA_integer_),
    ped_dark   = ifelse(!is.na(is_ped) & !is.na(is_dark),    as.integer(is_ped == 1L & is_dark == 1L), NA_integer_)
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(
    c(night, friday_night, pcf_dui, pcf_speed, is_rain, is_dark, is_ped, night_dui, rain_speed, ped_dark),
    ~ factor(.x, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("No","Yes"))
  ))
```

# Grouped lighting/weather variables for more interpretable modeling
```{r}
switrs_reduced <- switrs_reduced %>%
  mutate(
    lighting_group = case_when(
      "LIGHTING" %in% names(.) & as.character(LIGHTING) == "A" ~ "Daylight",
      "LIGHTING" %in% names(.) & as.character(LIGHTING) == "B" ~ "Dusk/Dawn",
      "LIGHTING" %in% names(.) & as.character(LIGHTING) %in% c("C", "D", "E") ~ "Dark",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    lighting_group = factor(
      lighting_group,
      levels = c("Daylight", "Dusk/Dawn", "Dark")
    ),

    weather_group = case_when(
      "WEATHER_1" %in% names(.) & as.character(WEATHER_1) == "A" ~ "Clear",
      "WEATHER_1" %in% names(.) & as.character(WEATHER_1) == "C" ~ "Rain",
      "WEATHER_1" %in% names(.) & as.character(WEATHER_1) %in% c("B", "D", "E", "F", "G") ~ "Other Weather",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    weather_group = factor(
      weather_group,
      levels = c("Clear", "Rain", "Other Weather")
    )
  )

cat("Grouped variables added: lighting_group, weather_group\n")
```

# School-zone / school-bus proxy
```{r}
has_ped_action   <- "PED_ACTION" %in% names(switrs_reduced)
has_special_cond <- "SPECIAL_COND" %in% names(switrs_reduced)

switrs_reduced <- switrs_reduced %>%
  mutate(
    ped_action_chr = if (has_ped_action) trimws(as.character(PED_ACTION)) else NA_character_,
    special_cond_chr = if (has_special_cond) trimws(as.character(SPECIAL_COND)) else NA_character_,

    ped_action_chr = dplyr::na_if(ped_action_chr, ""),
    special_cond_chr = dplyr::na_if(special_cond_chr, ""),

    ped_action_chr = dplyr::if_else(
      ped_action_chr == "Not Stated", 
      NA_character_, 
      ped_action_chr
    ),
    special_cond_chr = dplyr::if_else(
      special_cond_chr == "Not Stated", 
      NA_character_, 
      special_cond_chr
    ),

    school_bus_proxy = case_when(
      ped_action_chr == "G" ~ "Yes",
      special_cond_chr %in% c("1", "3") ~ "Yes",
      !is.na(ped_action_chr) | !is.na(special_cond_chr) ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    school_bus_proxy = factor(school_bus_proxy, levels = c("No", "Yes"))
  ) %>%
  select(-ped_action_chr, -special_cond_chr)

cat("Added school_bus_proxy\n")
```

# Additional subgroup interaction variables
```{r}
has_intersection <- "INTERSECTION" %in% names(switrs_reduced)
has_state_hwy    <- "STATE_HWY_IND" %in% names(switrs_reduced)
has_is_ped       <- "is_ped" %in% names(switrs_reduced)
has_night        <- "night" %in% names(switrs_reduced)

switrs_reduced <- switrs_reduced %>%
  mutate(
    intersection_chr = if (has_intersection) trimws(as.character(INTERSECTION)) else NA_character_,
    state_hwy_chr    = if (has_state_hwy) trimws(as.character(STATE_HWY_IND)) else NA_character_,
    is_ped_chr       = if (has_is_ped) trimws(as.character(is_ped)) else NA_character_,
    night_chr        = if (has_night) trimws(as.character(night)) else NA_character_,

    intersection_chr = dplyr::na_if(intersection_chr, ""),
    state_hwy_chr    = dplyr::na_if(state_hwy_chr, ""),
    is_ped_chr       = dplyr::na_if(is_ped_chr, ""),
    night_chr        = dplyr::na_if(night_chr, ""),

    intersection_chr = dplyr::if_else(intersection_chr == "Not Stated", NA_character_, intersection_chr),
    state_hwy_chr    = dplyr::if_else(state_hwy_chr == "Not Stated", NA_character_, state_hwy_chr),
    is_ped_chr       = dplyr::if_else(is_ped_chr == "Not Stated", NA_character_, is_ped_chr),
    night_chr        = dplyr::if_else(night_chr == "Not Stated", NA_character_, night_chr),

    intersection_ped = case_when(
      intersection_chr %in% c("Y", "Yes") & is_ped_chr == "Yes" ~ "Yes",
      intersection_chr %in% c("N", "No")  & is_ped_chr %in% c("Yes", "No") ~ "No",
      intersection_chr %in% c("Y", "Yes") & is_ped_chr == "No" ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    intersection_ped = factor(intersection_ped, levels = c("No", "Yes")),

    highway_night = case_when(
      state_hwy_chr %in% c("Y", "Yes") & night_chr == "Yes" ~ "Yes",
      state_hwy_chr %in% c("N", "No")  & night_chr %in% c("Yes", "No") ~ "No",
      state_hwy_chr %in% c("Y", "Yes") & night_chr == "No" ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    highway_night = factor(highway_night, levels = c("No", "Yes"))
  ) %>%
  select(-intersection_chr, -state_hwy_chr, -is_ped_chr, -night_chr)

cat("Added subgroup interaction variables: intersection_ped, highway_night\n")
```

# HYPOTHESIS TEST (ONE-SIDED): Weekend has higher Severe/Fatal rate than Weekday
```{r}
if (!all(c("weekend", "SevereBinary") %in% names(switrs_reduced))) {
  stop("Need 'weekend' and 'SevereBinary' in switrs_reduced. Run the feature engineering + outcome chunks first.")
}

df_wk <- switrs_reduced %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(weekend), !is.na(SevereBinary)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    weekend = as.character(weekend),
    is_severe = (SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(weekend %in% c("Weekend", "Weekday"))

n_weekend <- sum(df_wk$weekend == "Weekend")
n_weekday <- sum(df_wk$weekend == "Weekday")

if (n_weekend == 0 || n_weekday == 0) {
  stop("One or both weekend groups have zero usable observations.")
}

x_weekend <- sum(df_wk$is_severe[df_wk$weekend == "Weekend"], na.rm = TRUE)
x_weekday <- sum(df_wk$is_severe[df_wk$weekend == "Weekday"], na.rm = TRUE)

p_weekend <- x_weekend / n_weekend
p_weekday <- x_weekday / n_weekday
diff_pp   <- 100 * (p_weekend - p_weekday)

cat("\n============================================================\n")
cat("ONE-SIDED TWO-PROPORTION TEST: Weekend > Weekday\n")
cat("============================================================\n")

cat("\nH0: p_weekend <= p_weekday\n")
cat("HA: p_weekend  > p_weekday\n")

cat("\nGroup summaries:\n")
cat("  Weekend: n =", n_weekend, "| severe =", x_weekend, "| p̂ =", round(p_weekend, 4), "\n")
cat("  Weekday: n =", n_weekday, "| severe =", x_weekday, "| p̂ =", round(p_weekday, 4), "\n")
cat("\nDifference (Weekend - Weekday) =", round(diff_pp, 3), "percentage points\n")

test_wk <- suppressWarnings(
  prop.test(
    x = c(x_weekend, x_weekday),
    n = c(n_weekend, n_weekday),
    alternative = "greater",
    correct = FALSE
  )
)

cat("\nTest statistic (X-squared):", round(unname(test_wk$statistic), 4), "\n")
cat("One-sided p-value:", signif(test_wk$p.value, 5), "\n")

if (!is.na(test_wk$p.value) && test_wk$p.value < 0.05) {
  cat("\nConclusion (alpha=0.05): Reject H0. Weekends have a HIGHER Severe/Fatal rate than weekdays.\n")
} else {
  cat("\nConclusion (alpha=0.05): Fail to reject H0. Not enough evidence that weekends are higher.\n")
}
```

# Hypothesis testing continued: Severe/Fatal vs Other for all predictors (or as many as possible)
```{r}
max_levels <- 60
chisq_B <- 2000
min_n_per_group <- 10
verbose_per_var <- TRUE

if (!exists("switrs_reduced")) stop("switrs_reduced not found.")
if (!("SevereBinary" %in% names(switrs_reduced))) stop("SevereBinary not found in switrs_reduced.")
if (!exists("leakage_vars")) leakage_vars <- character(0)

exclude_always <- c(
  "CASE_ID",
  "SevereBinary",
  "COLLISION_SEVERITY",
  "COLLISION_SEVERITY_CODE",
  "FatalBinary",
  "Deaths",
  "NUMBER_KILLED",
  "NUMBER_KILLED_NUM",
  "NUMBER_INJURED"
)

vars_all <- setdiff(names(switrs_reduced), unique(c(exclude_always, leakage_vars)))
vars_all <- vars_all[!grepl("_miss$", vars_all)]

cat("Total candidate variables to test:", length(vars_all), "\n")

label_rows_if_available <- function(var_name, tab) {
  if (exists("legend_maps") && exists("lookup_meaning") && var_name %in% names(legend_maps)) {
    rn <- rownames(tab)
    rownames(tab) <- lookup_meaning(rn, legend_maps[[var_name]])
  }
  tab
}

test_one_var_all <- function(var_name, data = switrs_reduced, outcome = "SevereBinary") {

  df <- data %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c(outcome, var_name))) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[outcome]]))

  df[[outcome]] <- factor(df[[outcome]], levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"))
  x <- df[[var_name]]

  if (all(is.na(x))) {
    if (verbose_per_var) {
      cat("\n============================================================\n")
      cat("VARIABLE:", var_name, "\n")
      cat("============================================================\n")
      cat("SKIP: All missing\n")
    }
    return(tibble::tibble(
      variable = var_name,
      type = "NA",
      test = "SKIP",
      p_value = NA_real_,
      p_value_alt = NA_real_,
      n_used = 0L,
      note = "All missing"
    ))
  }

  if (is.numeric(x) || is.integer(x)) {
    ux <- unique(x[is.finite(x)])
    if (length(ux) <= 2) x <- as.factor(x)
  }

  if (is.numeric(x) || is.integer(x)) {
    df2 <- df %>%
      dplyr::mutate(x_num = as.numeric(.data[[var_name]])) %>%
      dplyr::filter(is.finite(x_num))

    n_other <- sum(df2[[outcome]] == "Other")
    n_sev   <- sum(df2[[outcome]] == "Severe/Fatal")

    if (verbose_per_var) {
      cat("\n============================================================\n")
      cat("VARIABLE:", var_name, "\n")
      cat("============================================================\n")
      cat("Type: numeric\n")
      cat("H0: mean(x|Severe/Fatal) = mean(x|Other)\n")
      cat("HA: means differ\n\n")
      cat("Group means:\n")
      cat("  Other:       n =", n_other, " mean =", round(mean(df2$x_num[df2[[outcome]] == "Other"]), 4), "\n")
      cat("  Severe/Fatal:n =", n_sev,   " mean =", round(mean(df2$x_num[df2[[outcome]] == "Severe/Fatal"]), 4), "\n\n")
    }

    if (n_other < min_n_per_group || n_sev < min_n_per_group) {
      if (verbose_per_var) cat("SKIP: Too few observations in one group\n")
      return(tibble::tibble(
        variable = var_name,
        type = "numeric",
        test = "SKIP",
        p_value = NA_real_,
        p_value_alt = NA_real_,
        n_used = nrow(df2),
        note = "Too few observations in one group"
      ))
    }

    df2$g <- df2[[outcome]]

    tt <- tryCatch(t.test(x_num ~ g, data = df2, var.equal = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
    wx <- tryCatch(wilcox.test(x_num ~ g, data = df2, exact = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)

    if (verbose_per_var) {
      cat("Welch t-test p-value:", if (!is.null(tt)) signif(tt$p.value, 6) else "NA", "\n")
      cat("Wilcoxon p-value:    ", if (!is.null(wx)) signif(wx$p.value, 6) else "NA", "\n")
    }

    return(tibble::tibble(
      variable = var_name,
      type = "numeric",
      test = "Welch t-test (+ Wilcoxon)",
      p_value = if (!is.null(tt)) tt$p.value else NA_real_,
      p_value_alt = if (!is.null(wx)) wx$p.value else NA_real_,
      n_used = nrow(df2),
      note = NA_character_
    ))
  }

  x_chr <- normalize_not_stated(x, blank_to_notstated = TRUE)
  df2 <- df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(x = x_chr) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(x))

  k <- length(unique(df2$x))

  if (k <= 1) {
    if (verbose_per_var) {
      cat("\n============================================================\n")
      cat("VARIABLE:", var_name, "\n")
      cat("============================================================\n")
      cat("SKIP: Constant after filtering\n")
    }
    return(tibble::tibble(
      variable = var_name,
      type = "categorical",
      test = "SKIP",
      p_value = NA_real_,
      p_value_alt = NA_real_,
      n_used = nrow(df2),
      note = "Constant after filtering"
    ))
  }

  if (k > max_levels) {
    if (verbose_per_var) {
      cat("\n============================================================\n")
      cat("VARIABLE:", var_name, "\n")
      cat("============================================================\n")
      cat("SKIP: High cardinality (", k, " levels > ", max_levels, ")\n", sep = "")
    }
    return(tibble::tibble(
      variable = var_name,
      type = "categorical",
      test = "SKIP",
      p_value = NA_real_,
      p_value_alt = NA_real_,
      n_used = nrow(df2),
      note = paste0("High cardinality (", k, " levels > ", max_levels, ")")
    ))
  }

  tab <- table(df2$x, df2[[outcome]], useNA = "no")

  if (verbose_per_var) {
    cat("\n============================================================\n")
    cat("VARIABLE:", var_name, "\n")
    cat("============================================================\n")
    cat("Type: categorical\n\n")
    tab_print <- label_rows_if_available(var_name, tab)
    cat("Contingency table (rows = predictor, cols = outcome):\n")
    print(addmargins(tab_print))
    cat("\n")
  }

  if (nrow(tab) == 2) {
    x_succ <- tab[, "Severe/Fatal"]
    n_tot  <- rowSums(tab)
    pt <- suppressWarnings(prop.test(x = x_succ, n = n_tot, correct = FALSE))

    if (verbose_per_var) cat("Two-proportion test p-value:", signif(pt$p.value, 6), "\n")

    return(tibble::tibble(
      variable = var_name,
      type = "categorical (2 levels)",
      test = "Two-proportion test (prop.test)",
      p_value = pt$p.value,
      p_value_alt = NA_real_,
      n_used = sum(tab),
      note = NA_character_
    ))
  }

  cs0 <- suppressWarnings(chisq.test(tab))
  use_sim <- any(cs0$expected < 5)
  cs <- if (use_sim) {
    suppressWarnings(chisq.test(tab, simulate.p.value = TRUE, B = chisq_B))
  } else {
    cs0
  }

  if (verbose_per_var) {
    cat("Chi-square p-value:", signif(cs$p.value, 6), if (use_sim) " (sim)\n" else "\n")
  }

  tibble::tibble(
    variable = var_name,
    type = paste0("categorical (", nrow(tab), " levels)"),
    test = if (use_sim) paste0("Chi-square (sim p, B=", chisq_B, ")") else "Chi-square",
    p_value = cs$p.value,
    p_value_alt = NA_real_,
    n_used = sum(tab),
    note = NA_character_
  )
}

results_all <- purrr::map_dfr(vars_all, ~ test_one_var_all(.x))

results_all <- results_all %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    p_adj_fdr = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(p_adj_fdr, p_value)

cat("\n\n==================== SUMMARY (sorted by FDR) ====================\n")
print(head(results_all, 50))

cat("\nHow many were skipped?\n")
print(table(results_all$test, useNA = "ifany"))

cat("\nTop skip reasons:\n")
print(
  results_all %>%
    dplyr::filter(test == "SKIP") %>%
    dplyr::count(note, sort = TRUE) %>%
    head(20)
)
```

# Month and seasonality panel (feature engineering and storyboard-ready count/rate plots)
```{r}
if (!("COLLISION_DATE" %in% names(switrs_reduced))) {
  stop("COLLISION_DATE not found in switrs_reduced.")
}

parse_date_multi <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- trimws(x)
  x[x %in% c("", "Not Stated", "UNKNOWN", "NA", "N/A", "NULL", "null")] <- NA_character_

  d1 <- suppressWarnings(as.Date(x, format = "%Y%m%d"))
  d2 <- suppressWarnings(as.Date(x, format = "%Y-%m-%d"))
  d3 <- suppressWarnings(as.Date(x, format = "%m/%d/%Y"))

  out <- d1
  out[is.na(out)] <- d2[is.na(out)]
  out[is.na(out)] <- d3[is.na(out)]
  out
}

switrs_reduced$collision_date <- parse_date_multi(switrs_reduced$COLLISION_DATE)

cat("collision_date parsed % = ",
    round(mean(!is.na(switrs_reduced$collision_date)) * 100, 2), "%\n", sep = "")

switrs_reduced <- switrs_reduced %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    month = as.integer(format(collision_date, "%m")),
    month_name = factor(month.abb[month], levels = month.abb, ordered = TRUE)
  )

month_tbl <- switrs_reduced %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(SevereBinary), !is.na(month_name)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(month_name) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_crashes = dplyr::n(),
    severe_n = sum(SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal", na.rm = TRUE),
    deaths = sum(Deaths, na.rm = TRUE),
    severe_per_100 = 100 * severe_n / n_crashes,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(month_name)

cat("Month summary (counts + rate):\n")
print(month_tbl)

ggplot(month_tbl, aes(x = month_name, y = severe_n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#1B5E20") +
  geom_text(aes(label = severe_n), vjust = -0.3, size = 3.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Severe/Fatal Crash Count by Month",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Severe/Fatal crash count"
  ) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

ggplot(month_tbl, aes(x = month_name, y = severe_per_100)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#1B5E20") +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(severe_per_100, 2)), vjust = -0.3, size = 3.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Severe/Fatal Rate by Month",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Severe/Fatal per 100 crashes"
  ) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```

# Bar chart: Severe/Fatal crash count and rate by day of week
```{r severity_by_day_bar, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
if (!all(c("DAY_OF_WEEK", "SevereBinary") %in% names(switrs_reduced))) {
  stop("Need DAY_OF_WEEK and SevereBinary in switrs_reduced.")
}

day_order <- c("Monday","Tuesday","Wednesday","Thursday","Friday","Saturday","Sunday")

day_severity_tbl <- switrs_reduced %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(DAY_OF_WEEK), !is.na(SevereBinary)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    day = as.character(DAY_OF_WEEK),
    day = factor(day, levels = day_order)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(day)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(day) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    total_crashes = dplyr::n(),
    severe_n = sum(SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal", na.rm = TRUE),
    deaths = sum(Deaths, na.rm = TRUE),
    other_n = sum(SevereBinary == "Other", na.rm = TRUE),
    severe_per_100 = 100 * severe_n / total_crashes,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(day)

cat("Crash severity by day of week (counts + rate):\n")
print(day_severity_tbl)

ggplot(day_severity_tbl, aes(x = day, y = severe_n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#1B5E20") +
  geom_text(aes(label = severe_n), vjust = -0.3, size = 3.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Severe/Fatal Crash Count by Day of Week",
    x = "Day of Week",
    y = "Severe/Fatal crash count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

ggplot(day_severity_tbl, aes(x = day, y = severe_per_100)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#1B5E20") +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(severe_per_100, 2)), vjust = -0.3, size = 3.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Severe/Fatal Crash Rate by Day of Week",
    x = "Day of Week",
    y = "Severe/Fatal per 100 crashes"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```

# Burden-oriented timing priority table (day group x time bucket)
```{r timing_priority, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
required_timing_vars <- c("day_group", "time_bucket", "SevereBinary")
missing_timing_vars <- setdiff(required_timing_vars, names(switrs_reduced))
if (length(missing_timing_vars) > 0) {
  stop("Missing required timing vars: ", paste(missing_timing_vars, collapse = ", "))
}

timing_tbl <- switrs_reduced %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(day_group), !is.na(time_bucket), !is.na(SevereBinary)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(day_group, time_bucket) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_crashes = dplyr::n(),
    severe_n = sum(SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal", na.rm = TRUE),
    deaths = sum(Deaths, na.rm = TRUE),
    severe_per_100 = 100 * severe_n / n_crashes,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    severe_share_all = ifelse(sum(severe_n, na.rm = TRUE) > 0,
                              severe_n / sum(severe_n, na.rm = TRUE),
                              NA_real_)
  )

timing_by_count <- timing_tbl %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(severe_n), dplyr::desc(deaths), dplyr::desc(severe_per_100), dplyr::desc(n_crashes))

timing_by_rate <- timing_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(n_crashes >= 30, severe_n >= 3) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(severe_per_100), dplyr::desc(severe_n), dplyr::desc(n_crashes))

timing_policy_tbl <- timing_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(n_crashes >= 30, severe_n >= 3) %>%
  classify_burden_risk(
    burden_var = "severe_n",
    risk_var = "severe_per_100"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(priority_flag = priority_tier == "Priority 1: High burden + high rate") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(priority_flag), dplyr::desc(severe_n), dplyr::desc(severe_per_100), dplyr::desc(deaths), dplyr::desc(n_crashes)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-priority_flag)

timing_priority_1 <- timing_policy_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(priority_tier == "Priority 1: High burden + high rate")

cat("Top timing cells by severe/fatal count:\n")
print(head(timing_by_count, 15))

cat("\nTop timing cells by severe/fatal rate (with stability filter):\n")
print(head(timing_by_rate, 15))

cat("\nTiming cells prioritized by burden first, then rate:\n")
print(head(timing_policy_tbl, 15))

ggplot(head(timing_by_count, 12),
       aes(x = reorder(paste(day_group, time_bucket, sep = " | "), severe_n), y = severe_n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#1B5E20") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top Day/Time Cells by Severe/Fatal Count",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Severe/Fatal crash count"
  ) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```

# Statistics report chunk: Hypothesis tests on Severe/Fatal proportions (week 8 deliverable)
```{r}
two_prop_report <- function(data, group_var, group_a, group_b,
                            outcome_var = "SevereBinary",
                            outcome_success = "Severe/Fatal",
                            title = NULL) {

  if (!all(c(group_var, outcome_var) %in% names(data))) {
    stop("Missing required columns for test: ", group_var, " and/or ", outcome_var)
  }

  df <- data %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c(group_var, outcome_var))) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[group_var]]), !is.na(.data[[outcome_var]])) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      g = as.character(.data[[group_var]]),
      y = (.data[[outcome_var]] == outcome_success)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(g %in% c(group_a, group_b))

  n_a <- sum(df$g == group_a)
  n_b <- sum(df$g == group_b)

  if (n_a == 0 || n_b == 0) {
    cat("\n============================================================\n")
    cat("STATISTICS REPORT —", if (is.null(title)) paste0(group_a, " vs ", group_b) else title, "\n")
    cat("============================================================\n")
    cat("\nSkipping test: one or both groups have zero usable observations.\n")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  x_a <- sum(df$y[df$g == group_a], na.rm = TRUE)
  x_b <- sum(df$y[df$g == group_b], na.rm = TRUE)

  p_a <- x_a / n_a
  p_b <- x_b / n_b
  diff <- p_a - p_b

  test <- suppressWarnings(
    stats::prop.test(x = c(x_a, x_b), n = c(n_a, n_b), correct = FALSE)
  )

  ci <- test$conf.int
  pval <- test$p.value

  if (is.null(title)) {
    title <- paste0(outcome_success, " proportion: ", group_a, " vs ", group_b)
  }

  cat("\n============================================================\n")
  cat("STATISTICS REPORT —", title, "\n")
  cat("============================================================\n")

  cat("\nH0: p(", group_a, ") = p(", group_b, ")\n", sep = "")
  cat("HA: p(", group_a, ") ≠ p(", group_b, ")\n", sep = "")

  cat("\nGroup summaries:\n")
  cat("  ", group_a, ": n = ", n_a, ", severe = ", x_a,
      ", p̂ = ", round(p_a, 4), "\n", sep = "")
  cat("  ", group_b, ": n = ", n_b, ", severe = ", x_b,
      ", p̂ = ", round(p_b, 4), "\n", sep = "")

  cat("\nEstimated difference (p̂A − p̂B) = ", round(diff, 4), "\n", sep = "")
  cat("95% CI for difference in proportions: [", round(ci[1], 4), ", ", round(ci[2], 4), "]\n", sep = "")
  cat("Two-proportion test p-value: ", signif(pval, 4), "\n", sep = "")

  if (!is.na(pval) && pval < 0.05) {
    cat("\nInterpretation: Reject H0 at α = 0.05. The Severe/Fatal rate differs between groups.\n")
  } else {
    cat("\nInterpretation: Fail to reject H0 at α = 0.05. No statistically significant difference detected.\n")
  }

  invisible(list(
    group_a = group_a,
    group_b = group_b,
    n = c(n_a, n_b),
    x = c(x_a, x_b),
    p = c(p_a, p_b),
    diff = diff,
    ci = ci,
    p_value = pval
  ))
}

if ("weekend" %in% names(switrs_reduced)) {
  two_prop_report(
    data = switrs_reduced,
    group_var = "weekend",
    group_a = "Weekend",
    group_b = "Weekday",
    title = "Weekend vs Weekday"
  )
} else {
  cat("\nSkipping Test 1: 'weekend' not found.\n")
}

if ("WEATHER_1" %in% names(switrs_reduced)) {
  df_weather <- switrs_reduced %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(SevereBinary)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      WEATHER_1 = trimws(as.character(WEATHER_1)),
      WEATHER_1 = dplyr::case_when(
        WEATHER_1 %in% c("A", "C") ~ WEATHER_1,
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    )

  two_prop_report(
    data = df_weather,
    group_var = "WEATHER_1",
    group_a = "C",
    group_b = "A",
    title = "Raining (WEATHER_1=C) vs Clear (WEATHER_1=A)"
  )
} else {
  cat("\nSkipping Test 2: 'WEATHER_1' not found.\n")
}

if ("night_dui" %in% names(switrs_reduced)) {
  df_nd <- switrs_reduced %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(SevereBinary)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      night_dui = as.character(night_dui)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(night_dui %in% c("Yes", "No"))

  two_prop_report(
    data = df_nd,
    group_var = "night_dui",
    group_a = "Yes",
    group_b = "No",
    title = "Night × DUI proxy (night_dui=Yes) vs Not (night_dui=No)"
  )
} else {
  cat("\nSkipping Test 3: 'night_dui' not found (re-run the time-feature chunk if needed).\n")
}
```

# Statistics report (add-on): Dark vs Daylight, Alcohol vs No Alcohol, Rain×Speeding
```{r}
if (!exists("two_prop_report")) stop("two_prop_report() not found. Run the main Statistics Report chunk first.")

if ("LIGHTING" %in% names(switrs_reduced)) {
  df_light <- switrs_reduced %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(SevereBinary)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      LIGHTING = trimws(as.character(LIGHTING)),
      light_group = dplyr::case_when(
        LIGHTING == "A" ~ "Daylight",
        LIGHTING %in% c("C", "D", "E") ~ "Dark",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    )

  two_prop_report(
    data = df_light,
    group_var = "light_group",
    group_a = "Dark",
    group_b = "Daylight",
    title = "Dark (LIGHTING=C/D/E) vs Daylight (LIGHTING=A)"
  )
} else {
  cat("\nSkipping Test 4: 'LIGHTING' not found.\n")
}

if ("ALCOHOL_INVOLVED" %in% names(switrs_reduced)) {
  df_alc <- switrs_reduced %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(SevereBinary)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      ALCOHOL_INVOLVED = trimws(as.character(ALCOHOL_INVOLVED)),
      alc_group = dplyr::case_when(
        ALCOHOL_INVOLVED == "Y" ~ "Alcohol",
        ALCOHOL_INVOLVED == "N" ~ "No Alcohol",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    )

  two_prop_report(
    data = df_alc,
    group_var = "alc_group",
    group_a = "Alcohol",
    group_b = "No Alcohol",
    title = "Alcohol involved vs Not alcohol involved"
  )
} else {
  cat("\nSkipping Test 5: 'ALCOHOL_INVOLVED' not found.\n")
}

if ("rain_speed" %in% names(switrs_reduced)) {
  df_rs <- switrs_reduced %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(SevereBinary)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      rain_speed = as.character(rain_speed)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(rain_speed %in% c("Yes", "No"))

  two_prop_report(
    data = df_rs,
    group_var = "rain_speed",
    group_a = "Yes",
    group_b = "No",
    title = "Rain × Unsafe speed proxy (rain_speed=Yes) vs Not (rain_speed=No)"
  )
} else {
  cat("\nSkipping Test 6: 'rain_speed' not found (re-run the time-feature chunk if needed).\n")
}
```

# Statistics report (subgroups): newly added subgroup variables
```{r}
if (!exists("two_prop_report")) stop("two_prop_report() not found. Run the main Statistics Report chunk first.")

run_subgroup_prop_test <- function(data, var_name, title_text) {

  if (!var_name %in% names(data)) {
    cat("\nSkipping", title_text, ":", var_name, "not found.\n")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  df_sub <- data %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(SevereBinary)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      subgroup_raw = stringr::str_trim(as.character(.data[[var_name]])),
      subgroup = dplyr::case_when(
        subgroup_raw %in% c("Yes", "Y", "1") ~ "Yes",
        subgroup_raw %in% c("No", "N", "0") ~ "No",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(subgroup))

  if (nrow(df_sub) == 0) {
    cat("\nSkipping", title_text, ":", var_name, "has no usable Yes/No rows.\n")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  two_prop_report(
    data = df_sub,
    group_var = "subgroup",
    group_a = "Yes",
    group_b = "No",
    title = title_text
  )
}

subgroup_test_results <- list()

subgroup_test_results$friday_night <- run_subgroup_prop_test(
  switrs_reduced,
  "friday_night",
  "Friday night (friday_night=Yes) vs Not (friday_night=No)"
)

subgroup_test_results$school_bus_proxy <- run_subgroup_prop_test(
  switrs_reduced,
  "school_bus_proxy",
  "School bus proxy (school_bus_proxy=Yes) vs Not (school_bus_proxy=No)"
)

subgroup_test_results$intersection_ped <- run_subgroup_prop_test(
  switrs_reduced,
  "intersection_ped",
  "Intersection × pedestrian (intersection_ped=Yes) vs Not (intersection_ped=No)"
)

subgroup_test_results$highway_night <- run_subgroup_prop_test(
  switrs_reduced,
  "highway_night",
  "Highway × night (highway_night=Yes) vs Not (highway_night=No)"
)
```

# Scenario Ranking (top combinations: counts, rates, deaths, and policy priority)
```{r}
df_scen <- switrs_reduced %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(SevereBinary)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    time_bucket = if ("time_bucket" %in% names(.)) as.character(time_bucket) else NA_character_,
    weekend     = if ("weekend" %in% names(.)) as.character(weekend) else NA_character_,

    light = if ("LIGHTING" %in% names(.)) {
      x <- trimws(as.character(LIGHTING))
      dplyr::case_when(
        x == "A" ~ "Daylight",
        x %in% c("C", "D", "E") ~ "Dark",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    } else NA_character_,

    ped = if ("is_ped" %in% names(.)) {
      x <- as.character(is_ped)
      dplyr::case_when(
        x %in% c("Yes", "No") ~ x,
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    } else if ("PEDESTRIAN_ACCIDENT" %in% names(.)) {
      x <- trimws(as.character(PEDESTRIAN_ACCIDENT))
      dplyr::case_when(
        x == "Y" ~ "Yes",
        x == "N" ~ "No",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    } else NA_character_,

    alc_yesno = if ("ALCOHOL_INVOLVED" %in% names(.)) {
      x <- trimws(as.character(ALCOHOL_INVOLVED))
      dplyr::case_when(
        x == "Y" ~ "Yes",
        x == "N" ~ "No",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    } else NA_character_,

    dui_yesno = if ("pcf_dui" %in% names(.)) {
      x <- as.character(pcf_dui)
      dplyr::case_when(
        x %in% c("Yes", "No") ~ x,
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    } else NA_character_,

    impairment = dplyr::case_when(
      alc_yesno == "Yes" | dui_yesno == "Yes" ~ "Yes",
      alc_yesno == "No"  & dui_yesno == "No"  ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

scenario_vars <- c("time_bucket", "weekend", "light", "impairment", "ped")
scenario_vars <- scenario_vars[scenario_vars %in% names(df_scen)]

df_scen_complete <- df_scen %>%
  dplyr::filter(dplyr::if_all(dplyr::all_of(scenario_vars), ~ !is.na(.x)))

cat("Rows with complete CORE scenario fields:", nrow(df_scen_complete), "\n")
cat("Scenario dimensions used:", paste(scenario_vars, collapse = ", "), "\n")

scenario_tbl <- df_scen_complete %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    scenario = paste(
      paste0("Time=", time_bucket),
      paste0("DayType=", weekend),
      paste0("Light=", light),
      paste0("Impairment=", impairment),
      paste0("Ped=", ped),
      sep = " | "
    ),
    is_severe = (SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(scenario) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_crashes = dplyr::n(),
    severe_n = sum(is_severe, na.rm = TRUE),
    deaths = sum(Deaths, na.rm = TRUE),
    severe_per_100 = 100 * severe_n / n_crashes,
    deaths_per_100 = 100 * deaths / n_crashes,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    severe_share_all = ifelse(sum(severe_n, na.rm = TRUE) > 0,
                              severe_n / sum(severe_n, na.rm = TRUE),
                              NA_real_),
    deaths_share_all = ifelse(sum(deaths, na.rm = TRUE) > 0,
                              deaths / sum(deaths, na.rm = TRUE),
                              NA_real_)
  )

min_crashes_count <- 30
min_crashes_rate  <- 15
min_severe_rate   <- 1

top_by_count <- scenario_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(n_crashes >= min_crashes_count) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(severe_n), dplyr::desc(deaths), dplyr::desc(n_crashes), dplyr::desc(severe_per_100))

top_by_rate <- scenario_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(n_crashes >= min_crashes_rate, severe_n >= min_severe_rate) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(severe_per_100), dplyr::desc(severe_n), dplyr::desc(n_crashes))

top_by_deaths <- scenario_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(n_crashes >= min_crashes_count) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(deaths), dplyr::desc(severe_n), dplyr::desc(n_crashes))

scenario_policy_tbl <- scenario_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(n_crashes >= min_crashes_count, severe_n >= min_severe_rate) %>%
  classify_burden_risk(
    burden_var = "severe_n",
    risk_var = "severe_per_100"
  )

scenario_policy_priority <- scenario_policy_tbl %>%
  dplyr::mutate(priority_flag = priority_tier == "Priority 1: High burden + high rate") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(
    dplyr::desc(priority_flag),
    dplyr::desc(severe_n),
    dplyr::desc(deaths),
    dplyr::desc(severe_per_100),
    dplyr::desc(n_crashes)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(-priority_flag)

scenario_priority_1 <- scenario_policy_priority %>%
  dplyr::filter(priority_tier == "Priority 1: High burden + high rate")

cat("\nTop 15 scenarios by Severe/Fatal COUNT",
    "(min_crashes=", min_crashes_count, "):\n", sep = "")
print(head(top_by_count, 15))
cat("\nScenarios meeting COUNT filter:", nrow(top_by_count), "\n")

cat("\nTop 15 scenarios by Severe/Fatal RATE",
    "(min_crashes=", min_crashes_rate, ", min_severe=", min_severe_rate, "):\n", sep = "")
print(head(top_by_rate, 15))
cat("\nScenarios meeting RATE filter:", nrow(top_by_rate), "\n")

cat("\nTop 15 scenarios by DEATHS",
    "(min_crashes=", min_crashes_count, "):\n", sep = "")
print(head(top_by_deaths, 15))
cat("\nScenarios meeting DEATH filter:", nrow(top_by_deaths), "\n")

cat("\nTop scenarios prioritized by burden first, then rate:\n")
print(head(scenario_policy_priority, 15))

interaction_vars <- intersect(c("night_dui", "rain_speed", "ped_dark"), names(switrs_reduced))

if (length(interaction_vars) > 0) {
  cat("\nInteraction-term summaries (counts + rate):\n")

  interaction_tbl <- purrr::map_dfr(interaction_vars, function(v) {
    switrs_reduced %>%
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(SevereBinary)) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(g = as.character(.data[[v]])) %>%
      dplyr::filter(g %in% c("Yes", "No")) %>%
      dplyr::group_by(term = v, group = g) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(
        n_crashes = dplyr::n(),
        severe_n = sum(SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal", na.rm = TRUE),
        deaths = sum(Deaths, na.rm = TRUE),
        severe_per_100 = 100 * severe_n / n_crashes,
        .groups = "drop"
      )
  })

  print(interaction_tbl %>% dplyr::arrange(term, dplyr::desc(group)))
} else {
  cat("\nNo interaction variables found (night_dui/rain_speed/ped_dark).\n")
}
```

# report_data_structure_and_descriptives
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
raw_df_for_report <- if (exists("switrs")) switrs else switrs_reduced

count_storage_types <- function(df) {
  tibble::tibble(
    storage_type = c("numeric", "integer", "character", "factor", "logical", "other"),
    n_columns = c(
      sum(vapply(df, function(x) is.numeric(x) && !is.integer(x), logical(1))),
      sum(vapply(df, is.integer, logical(1))),
      sum(vapply(df, is.character, logical(1))),
      sum(vapply(df, is.factor, logical(1))),
      sum(vapply(df, is.logical, logical(1))),
      sum(!vapply(df, function(x) {
        is.numeric(x) || is.integer(x) || is.character(x) || is.factor(x) || is.logical(x)
      }, logical(1)))
    )
  ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(pct_columns = round(100 * n_columns / sum(n_columns), 1))
}

numeric_desc_tbl <- function(data, vars, group_var = NULL) {
  vars <- intersect(vars, names(data))
  if (length(vars) == 0) return(tibble::tibble())

  keep_cols <- if (is.null(group_var)) vars else c(group_var, vars)

  long_df <- data %>%
    dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(keep_cols)) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = dplyr::all_of(vars), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value")

  if (!is.null(group_var) && group_var %in% names(long_df)) {
    out <- long_df %>%
      dplyr::group_by(.data[[group_var]], variable) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(
        n_nonmissing = sum(is.finite(value)),
        missing_pct = round(100 * mean(!is.finite(value)), 2),
        mean = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE),
        sd = sd(value, na.rm = TRUE),
        median = median(value, na.rm = TRUE),
        IQR = IQR(value, na.rm = TRUE),
        min = min(value, na.rm = TRUE),
        max = max(value, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
  } else {
    out <- long_df %>%
      dplyr::group_by(variable) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(
        n_nonmissing = sum(is.finite(value)),
        missing_pct = round(100 * mean(!is.finite(value)), 2),
        mean = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE),
        sd = sd(value, na.rm = TRUE),
        median = median(value, na.rm = TRUE),
        IQR = IQR(value, na.rm = TRUE),
        min = min(value, na.rm = TRUE),
        max = max(value, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
      )
  }

  out %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      dplyr::across(c(mean, sd, median, IQR, min, max), ~ round(.x, 2))
    )
}

cat_desc_tbl <- function(data, vars, outcome = "SevereBinary") {
  vars <- intersect(vars, names(data))
  if (length(vars) == 0 || !(outcome %in% names(data))) return(tibble::tibble())

  purrr::map_dfr(vars, function(v) {
    tmp <- data %>%
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[v]]), !is.na(.data[[outcome]])) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        level = as.character(.data[[v]]),
        outcome_chr = as.character(.data[[outcome]])
      ) %>%
      dplyr::count(level, outcome_chr, name = "n") %>%
      tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = outcome_chr, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)

    if (!("Other" %in% names(tmp))) tmp$Other <- 0
    if (!("Severe/Fatal" %in% names(tmp))) tmp$`Severe/Fatal` <- 0

    tmp %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        variable = v,
        total = Other + `Severe/Fatal`,
        severe_rate = round(`Severe/Fatal` / total, 4)
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(variable, level, total, Other, `Severe/Fatal`, severe_rate)
  })
}

case_id_nunique <- if ("CASE_ID" %in% names(raw_df_for_report)) {
  dplyr::n_distinct(raw_df_for_report$CASE_ID)
} else {
  NA_integer_
}

dup_case_id <- if ("CASE_ID" %in% names(raw_df_for_report)) {
  sum(duplicated(raw_df_for_report$CASE_ID))
} else {
  NA_integer_
}

raw_structure_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
  dataset = "Merged crash-level SWITRS file",
  rows = nrow(raw_df_for_report),
  columns = ncol(raw_df_for_report),
  unique_case_id = case_id_nunique,
  duplicated_case_id = dup_case_id
)

analysis_structure_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
  dataset = "Analysis frame after cleaning / feature engineering",
  rows = nrow(switrs_reduced),
  columns = ncol(switrs_reduced),
  severebinary_missing = if ("SevereBinary" %in% names(switrs_reduced)) sum(is.na(switrs_reduced$SevereBinary)) else NA_integer_
)

raw_missing_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
  variable = names(raw_df_for_report),
  missing_pct = round(100 * colMeans(is.na(raw_df_for_report)), 2)
) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(missing_pct))

cat("Merged file structure:\n")
print(raw_structure_tbl)
cat("\nMerged file column types:\n")
print(count_storage_types(raw_df_for_report))
cat("\nAnalysis-frame structure:\n")
print(analysis_structure_tbl)
cat("\nAnalysis-frame column types:\n")
print(count_storage_types(switrs_reduced))
cat("\nTop 15 variables by missingness in merged file:\n")
print(head(raw_missing_tbl, 15))

report_num_vars <- intersect(
  c("year", "n_parties", "n_victims", "mean_party_age", "mean_victim_age", "min_victim_age", "max_victim_age"),
  names(switrs_reduced)
)

report_cat_vars <- intersect(
  c("weekend", "night", "is_rain", "is_dark", "pcf_dui", "pcf_speed", "INTERSECTION", "TYPE_OF_COLLISION"),
  names(switrs_reduced)
)

cat("\nNumeric descriptive statistics (overall):\n")
print(numeric_desc_tbl(switrs_reduced, report_num_vars))

if ("SevereBinary" %in% names(switrs_reduced)) {
  cat("\nNumeric descriptive statistics by severity group:\n")
  print(
    numeric_desc_tbl(
      switrs_reduced %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(SevereBinary)),
      vars = report_num_vars,
      group_var = "SevereBinary"
    )
  )
}

cat("\nCategorical descriptive summaries (counts + severe rate):\n")
print(cat_desc_tbl(switrs_reduced, report_cat_vars))
```

# Storyboard panels (FIXED)
```{r storyboard_panels, fig.width=14, fig.height=10}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)

base_theme_fix <- theme(
  plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
  plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11),
  plot.margin = margin(t = 12, r = 12, b = 12, l = 12),
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
)

if (exists("hotspots_by_count") && nrow(hotspots_by_count) > 0) {

  p1 <- hotspots_by_count %>%
    slice_head(n = 15) %>%
    mutate(location_key = factor(location_key, levels = rev(location_key))) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = location_key, y = severe_n)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#1B5E20") +
    coord_flip(clip = "off") +
    labs(
      title = "Top 15 Hotspots by Severe/Fatal Count",
      subtitle = "Higher count = larger severe/fatal burden (deployment prioritization)",
      x = NULL,
      y = "Severe/Fatal crashes"
    ) +
    base_theme_fix

  print(p1)

} else {
  cat("hotspots_by_count not found or empty — run the hotspots chunk first.\n")
}

if (exists("scenario_policy_priority") && nrow(scenario_policy_priority) > 0) {

  p2 <- scenario_policy_priority %>%
    slice_head(n = 15) %>%
    mutate(scenario = factor(scenario, levels = rev(scenario))) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = scenario, y = severe_n)) +
    geom_col(fill = "#1B5E20") + 
    coord_flip(clip = "off") +
    labs(
      title = "Top 15 Scenarios by Policy Priority",
      subtitle = "High-burden scenarios prioritized first; rate used as secondary risk context",
      x = NULL,
      y = "Severe/Fatal crash count"
    ) +
    base_theme_fix +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9))

  print(p2)

} else {
  cat("scenario_policy_priority not found or empty — run the scenario ranking chunk first.\n")
}

interaction_vars <- intersect(c("night_dui","rain_speed","ped_dark"), names(switrs_reduced))

if (length(interaction_vars) > 0) {

  interaction_tbl <- purrr::map_dfr(interaction_vars, function(v) {
    switrs_reduced %>%
      filter(!is.na(SevereBinary)) %>%
      mutate(group = as.character(.data[[v]])) %>%
      filter(group %in% c("Yes","No")) %>%
      group_by(term = v, group) %>%
      summarise(
        n_crashes = n(),
        severe_n = sum(SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal"),
        severe_per_100 = 100 * severe_n / n_crashes,
        .groups = "drop"
      )
  }) %>%
    mutate(
      term_label = recode(
        term,
        night_dui  = "Night × DUI proxy",
        rain_speed = "Rain × Unsafe speed proxy",
        ped_dark   = "Pedestrian × Dark"
      ),
      term_label = factor(term_label, levels = rev(unique(term_label))),
      group = factor(group, levels = c("No","Yes"))
    )

  p3 <- interaction_tbl %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = term_label, y = severe_per_100, fill = group)) +
    geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
    coord_flip(clip = "off") +
    scale_fill_yesno_switrs() +
    labs(
      title = "Compound Risk Conditions (Interaction Terms)",
      subtitle = "Severe/Fatal rate per 100 crashes: compare “Yes” vs “No” for each condition",
      x = NULL,
      y = "Severe/Fatal per 100 crashes",
      fill = "Condition present?"
    ) +
    base_theme_fix

  print(p3)
} else {
  cat("No interaction variables found (night_dui/rain_speed/ped_dark). Re-run the time-feature chunk if needed.\n")
}
```
# Additional compound-risk interaction charts
```{r}
clean_chr <- function(x) {
  x <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x[x %in% c("", "NA", "Not Stated")] <- NA_character_
  x
}

switrs_reduced <- switrs_reduced %>%
  mutate(
    pcf_dui_chr   = clean_chr(pcf_dui),
    pcf_speed_chr = clean_chr(pcf_speed),
    is_ped_chr    = clean_chr(is_ped),
    is_dark_chr   = clean_chr(is_dark),
    night_chr     = clean_chr(night),
    weekend_chr   = clean_chr(weekend),

    dui_ped = case_when(
      pcf_dui_chr == "Yes" & is_ped_chr == "Yes" ~ "Yes",
      pcf_dui_chr %in% c("Yes", "No") & is_ped_chr %in% c("Yes", "No") ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    dui_ped_dark = case_when(
      pcf_dui_chr == "Yes" & is_ped_chr == "Yes" & is_dark_chr == "Yes" ~ "Yes",
      pcf_dui_chr %in% c("Yes", "No") &
        is_ped_chr %in% c("Yes", "No") &
        is_dark_chr %in% c("Yes", "No") ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    dui_weekend = case_when(
      pcf_dui_chr == "Yes" & weekend_chr == "Weekend" ~ "Yes",
      pcf_dui_chr %in% c("Yes", "No") & weekend_chr %in% c("Weekday", "Weekend") ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    weekend_ped = case_when(
      weekend_chr == "Weekend" & is_ped_chr == "Yes" ~ "Yes",
      weekend_chr %in% c("Weekday", "Weekend") & is_ped_chr %in% c("Yes", "No") ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    dui_speed = case_when(
      pcf_dui_chr == "Yes" & pcf_speed_chr == "Yes" ~ "Yes",
      pcf_dui_chr %in% c("Yes", "No") & pcf_speed_chr %in% c("Yes", "No") ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    dui_speed_night = case_when(
      pcf_dui_chr == "Yes" & pcf_speed_chr == "Yes" & night_chr == "Yes" ~ "Yes",
      pcf_dui_chr %in% c("Yes", "No") &
        pcf_speed_chr %in% c("Yes", "No") &
        night_chr %in% c("Yes", "No") ~ "No",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    across(
      c(dui_ped, dui_ped_dark, dui_weekend, weekend_ped, dui_speed, dui_speed_night),
      ~ factor(.x, levels = c("No", "Yes"))
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-pcf_dui_chr, -pcf_speed_chr, -is_ped_chr, -is_dark_chr, -night_chr, -weekend_chr)

new_interaction_vars <- c(
  "dui_ped",
  "dui_ped_dark",
  "dui_weekend",
  "weekend_ped",
  "dui_speed",
  "dui_speed_night"
)

new_interaction_labels <- c(
  dui_ped         = "DUI × Pedestrian",
  dui_ped_dark    = "DUI × Pedestrian × Dark",
  dui_weekend     = "DUI × Weekend",
  weekend_ped     = "Weekend × Pedestrian",
  dui_speed       = "DUI × Unsafe speed",
  dui_speed_night = "DUI × Unsafe speed × Night"
)

for (v in new_interaction_vars) {

  plot_tbl <- switrs_reduced %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(SevereBinary)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(group = as.character(.data[[v]])) %>%
    dplyr::filter(group %in% c("Yes", "No")) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(group) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      n_crashes = dplyr::n(),
      severe_n = sum(SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal"),
      severe_per_100 = 100 * severe_n / n_crashes,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      group = factor(group, levels = c("No", "Yes"))
    )

  p_extra <- ggplot(plot_tbl, aes(x = severe_per_100, y = group, fill = group)) +
    geom_col(width = 1) +
    scale_fill_yesno_switrs() +
    scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
    labs(
      title = new_interaction_labels[[v]],
      subtitle = "Severe/Fatal rate per 100 crashes: compare condition absent vs present",
      x = "Severe/Fatal per 100 crashes",
      y = "Condition present?",
      fill = "Condition present?"
    ) +
    base_theme_fix

  print(p_extra)
}
```

# codebook label dictionaries
```{r}
lookup_meaning <- function(x, legend_vec) {
  x0 <- normalize_not_stated(x, blank_to_notstated = TRUE)

  out <- unname(legend_vec[x0])

  needs_pad <- is.na(out) & grepl("^[0-9]+$", x0)
  x2 <- x0
  x2[needs_pad] <- sprintf("%02d", as.integer(x0[needs_pad]))
  out2 <- unname(legend_vec[x2])

  out[is.na(out)] <- out2[is.na(out)]
  out[is.na(out) | out == ""] <- x0[is.na(out) | out == ""]
  out
}

legend_maps <- list(
  DAY_OF_WEEK = c(
    "1"="Monday","2"="Tuesday","3"="Wednesday","4"="Thursday",
    "5"="Friday","6"="Saturday","7"="Sunday",
    "Not Stated"="Not Stated"
  ),
  LIGHTING = c(
    "A"="Daylight",
    "B"="Dusk - Dawn",
    "C"="Dark - Street Lights",
    "D"="Dark - No Street Lights",
    "E"="Dark - Street Lights Not Functioning",
    "Not Stated"="Not Stated"
  ),
  WEATHER_1 = c(
    "A"="Clear","B"="Cloudy","C"="Raining","D"="Snowing","E"="Fog","F"="Other","G"="Wind",
    "Not Stated"="Not Stated"
  ),
  ROAD_SURFACE = c(
    "A"="Dry","B"="Wet","C"="Snowy or Icy","D"="Slippery (Muddy/Oily/etc.)",
    "Not Stated"="Not Stated"
  ),
  INTERSECTION = c(
    "Y"="Yes","N"="No",
    "1"="Yes","0"="No",
    "Not Stated"="Not Stated"
  ),
  PRIMARY_COLL_FACTOR = c(
    "A"="Code Violation",
    "B"="Other Improper Driving",
    "C"="Other Than Driver",
    "D"="Unknown",
    "E"="Fell Asleep",
    "Not Stated"="Not Stated"
  ),
  TYPE_OF_COLLISION = c(
    "A"="Head-On",
    "B"="Sideswipe",
    "C"="Rear End",
    "D"="Broadside",
    "E"="Hit Object",
    "F"="Overturned",
    "G"="Vehicle/Pedestrian",
    "H"="Other",
    "Not Stated"="Not Stated"
  ),
  PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY = c(
    "01"="DUI (Alcohol/Drug)",
    "02"="Impeding Traffic",
    "03"="Unsafe Speed",
    "04"="Following Too Closely",
    "05"="Wrong Side of Road",
    "06"="Improper Passing",
    "07"="Unsafe Lane Change",
    "08"="Improper Turning",
    "09"="Automobile Right-of-Way",
    "10"="Pedestrian Right-of-Way",
    "11"="Pedestrian Violation",
    "12"="Traffic Signals and Signs",
    "13"="Hazardous Parking",
    "14"="Lights",
    "15"="Brakes",
    "16"="Other Equipment",
    "17"="Other Hazardous Violation",
    "18"="Other Than Driver (or Pedestrian)",
    "21"="Unsafe Starting or Backing",
    "22"="Other Improper Driving",
    "23"="Ped/Other DUI (Alcohol/Drug)",
    "24"="Fell Asleep",
    "00"="Unknown",
    "Not Stated"="Not Stated"
  ),
  HIT_AND_RUN = c(
    "F"="Felony",
    "M"="Misdemeanor",
    "N"="Not Hit and Run",
    "Not Stated"="Not Stated"
  ),
  PEDESTRIAN_ACCIDENT = c(
    "Y"="Yes","N"="No",
    "1"="Yes","0"="No",
    "Not Stated"="Not Stated"
  ),
  MOTORCYCLE_ACCIDENT = c(
    "Y"="Yes","N"="No",
    "1"="Yes","0"="No",
    "Not Stated"="Not Stated"
  ),
  ANY_PARTY_DRUG = c(
    "Y"="Yes","N"="No",
    "1"="Yes","0"="No",
    "Not Stated"="Not Stated"
  )
)

legend_maps$TYPE_OF_COLLISION <- c(
  "A"="Head-On",
  "B"="Sideswipe",
  "C"="Rear End",
  "D"="Broadside",
  "E"="Hit Object",
  "F"="Overturned",
  "G"="Vehicle/Pedestrian",
  "H"="Other",
  "Not Stated"="Not Stated"
)

legend_maps$LIGHTING <- c(
  "A"="Daylight",
  "B"="Dusk - Dawn",
  "C"="Dark - Street Lights",
  "D"="Dark - No Street Lights",
  "E"="Dark - Street Lights Not Functioning",
  "Not Stated"="Not Stated"
)

legend_maps$PEDESTRIAN_ACCIDENT <- c(
  "Y"="Yes","N"="No",
  "Not Stated"="Not Stated"
)

legend_maps$MOTORCYCLE_ACCIDENT <- c(
  "Y"="Yes","N"="No",
  "Not Stated"="Not Stated"
)

legend_maps$ANY_PARTY_DRUG <- c(
  "1"="Yes","0"="No","Y"="Yes","N"="No",
  "Not Stated"="Not Stated"
)
legend_maps$any_party_drug <- legend_maps$ANY_PARTY_DRUG

print_legend <- function(var_name, dedupe_meaning = TRUE) {
  if (!var_name %in% names(legend_maps)) return(invisible(NULL))
  m <- legend_maps[[var_name]]

  df <- data.frame(
    code = names(m),
    meaning = unname(m),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  if (dedupe_meaning) df <- df[!duplicated(df$meaning), ]

  cat("\nLEGEND for", var_name, ":\n")
  print(df, row.names = FALSE)
  invisible(df)
}
```

# EDA: Severity rate table for key categorical variables
```{r}
severity_rate_table <- function(data, var) {
  if (!var %in% names(data)) return(NULL)

  df <- data %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(SevereBinary)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(v = as.character(.data[[var]])) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(v = ifelse(is.na(v) | trimws(v) == "", "Not Stated", trimws(v)))

  if (var %in% names(legend_maps)) {
    map <- legend_maps[[var]]
    df <- df %>%
      dplyr::mutate(v_label = dplyr::recode(v, !!!map, .default = v))
    grp <- "v_label"
  } else {
    grp <- "v"
  }

  df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data[[grp]]) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      n = dplyr::n(),
      severe_n = sum(SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal", na.rm = TRUE),
      severe_per_100 = 100 * severe_n / n,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::rename(category = .data[[grp]]) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(severe_per_100), dplyr::desc(n))
}

eda_vars <- intersect(
  c(
    "DAY_OF_WEEK", "time_bucket", "weekend", "night",
    "WEATHER_1", "is_rain", "weather_group",
```
