```{r}
    "LIGHTING", "is_dark", "lighting_group",
    "ROAD_SURFACE",
    "INTERSECTION", "STATE_HWY_IND", "TYPE_OF_COLLISION", "PRIMARY_COLL_FACTOR",
    "PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY", "pcf_dui", "pcf_speed",
    "ALCOHOL_INVOLVED",
    "PEDESTRIAN_ACCIDENT", "BICYCLE_ACCIDENT", "MOTORCYCLE_ACCIDENT", "TRUCK_ACCIDENT",
    "night_dui", "rain_speed", "ped_dark",
    "friday_night", "school_bus_proxy", "intersection_ped", "highway_night"
  ),
  names(switrs_reduced)
)

rate_tables <- purrr::map(eda_vars, ~ severity_rate_table(switrs_reduced, .x))
names(rate_tables) <- eda_vars

rate_tables[1:min(6, length(rate_tables))]
```

# EDA: Decision-oriented severity rate plots (ordered, horizontal)
```{r}
plot_severity_by_variable <- function(var_name,
                                      data = switrs_reduced,
                                      fill_var = "SevereBinary") {

  if (!var_name %in% names(data)) return(NULL)
  if (!fill_var %in% names(data)) return(NULL)

  data[[fill_var]] <- factor(data[[fill_var]], levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"))

  df <- data %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[fill_var]])) %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      x_code = normalize_not_stated(.data[[var_name]], blank_to_notstated = TRUE),
      Outcome = .data[[fill_var]]
    ) %>%
    dplyr::count(x_code, Outcome, name = "n") %>%
    dplyr::group_by(x_code) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      prop = n / sum(n),
      pct_label = scales::percent(prop, accuracy = 0.1)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

  ordering <- df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(x_code) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      severe_prop = sum(prop[Outcome == "Severe/Fatal"], na.rm = TRUE),
      total_n = sum(n),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(severe_prop), dplyr::desc(total_n)) %>%
    dplyr::pull(x_code)

  df$x_code <- factor(df$x_code, levels = ordering)

  label_fun <- function(x) {
    if (exists("legend_maps") && exists("lookup_meaning") && var_name %in% names(legend_maps)) {
      out <- lookup_meaning(x, legend_maps[[var_name]])
      out[is.na(out) | out == ""] <- x[is.na(out) | out == ""]
      out
    } else {
      x
    }
  }

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = x_code, y = prop, fill = Outcome)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
    geom_text(
      aes(label = pct_label),
      position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
      color = "white",
      size = 3.6,
      fontface = "bold"
    ) +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = NULL, labels = NULL) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = label_fun) +
    scale_fill_outcome_switrs(drop = FALSE) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Severity Distribution by", gsub("_", " ", var_name)),
      x = gsub("_", " ", var_name),
      y = NULL,
      fill = "Outcome"
    ) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right"
    )

  print(p)

  if (exists("print_legend") && exists("legend_maps") && var_name %in% names(legend_maps)) {
    print_legend(var_name)
  }
}

vars_to_plot <- intersect(
  c(
    "time_bucket", "weekend", "night", "day_group", "friday_night",
    "WEATHER_1", "is_rain", "weather_group",
    "LIGHTING", "is_dark", "lighting_group",
    "ROAD_SURFACE",
    "INTERSECTION", "STATE_HWY_IND", "TYPE_OF_COLLISION", "PRIMARY_COLL_FACTOR",
    "PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY", "pcf_dui", "pcf_speed",
    "ALCOHOL_INVOLVED",
    "night_dui", "rain_speed", "ped_dark",
    "school_bus_proxy", "intersection_ped", "highway_night"
  ),
  names(switrs_reduced)
)

purrr::walk(vars_to_plot, ~ plot_severity_by_variable(.x))
```

# EDA: Trend over time (overall crash volume + severe crash count/share)
```{r yearly_trends, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
if (!exists("switrs_reduced")) stop("switrs_reduced not found.")
if (!("SevereBinary" %in% names(switrs_reduced))) stop("SevereBinary not found in switrs_reduced.")

trend_df <- switrs_reduced

# Build/repair year if needed
if (!("year" %in% names(trend_df))) {
  if ("ACCIDENT_YEAR" %in% names(trend_df)) {
    trend_df <- trend_df %>%
      dplyr::mutate(year = suppressWarnings(as.integer(as.character(ACCIDENT_YEAR))))
  } else if ("collision_date" %in% names(trend_df)) {
    trend_df <- trend_df %>%
      dplyr::mutate(year = as.integer(format(collision_date, "%Y")))
  } else if ("COLLISION_DATE" %in% names(trend_df)) {
    parse_date_multi <- function(x) {
      x <- as.character(x)
      x <- trimws(x)
      x[x %in% c("", "Not Stated", "UNKNOWN", "NA", "N/A", "NULL", "null")] <- NA_character_

      d1 <- suppressWarnings(as.Date(x, format = "%Y%m%d"))
      d2 <- suppressWarnings(as.Date(x, format = "%Y-%m-%d"))
      d3 <- suppressWarnings(as.Date(x, format = "%m/%d/%Y"))

      out <- d1
      out[is.na(out)] <- d2[is.na(out)]
      out[is.na(out)] <- d3[is.na(out)]
      out
    }

    trend_df <- trend_df %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        collision_date_tmp = parse_date_multi(COLLISION_DATE),
        year = as.integer(format(collision_date_tmp, "%Y"))
      )
  } else {
    stop("Need one of: year, ACCIDENT_YEAR, collision_date, or COLLISION_DATE.")
  }
}

yearly_trend_tbl <- trend_df %>%
  dplyr::mutate(year = suppressWarnings(as.integer(as.character(year)))) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(year), !is.na(SevereBinary)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(year) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    total_crashes = dplyr::n(),
    severe_n = sum(SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal", na.rm = TRUE),
    other_n = sum(SevereBinary == "Other", na.rm = TRUE),
    severe_rate = severe_n / total_crashes,
    severe_per_100 = 100 * severe_n / total_crashes,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(year)

cat("Yearly crash trend table:\n")
print(yearly_trend_tbl)

yearly_trend_display <- yearly_trend_tbl %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    severe_rate_pct = scales::percent(severe_rate, accuracy = 0.1)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    year,
    total_crashes,
    severe_n,
    other_n,
    severe_per_100,
    severe_rate_pct
  )

cat("\nYearly display table:\n")
print(yearly_trend_display)

ggplot(yearly_trend_tbl, aes(x = year, y = total_crashes)) +
  geom_line(color = "#1B5E20", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "#1B5E20", size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#A8D5BA") +
  labs(
    title = "Linear Trend in Total Crashes by Year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of crashes"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = yearly_trend_tbl$year) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma)

ggplot(yearly_trend_tbl, aes(x = year, y = severe_n)) +
  geom_line(color = "#1B5E20", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "#1B5E20", size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#A8D5BA") +
  labs(
    title = "Linear Trend in Severe/Fatal Crash Count by Year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Severe/Fatal crash count"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = yearly_trend_tbl$year) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma)

ggplot(yearly_trend_tbl, aes(x = year, y = severe_rate)) +
  geom_line(color = "#1B5E20", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "#1B5E20", size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#A8D5BA") +
  labs(
    title = "Linear Trend in Severe/Fatal Crash Rate by Year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Severe/Fatal share of crashes"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = yearly_trend_tbl$year) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent)
```

# Violation count/percent table for one specific day
```{r}
violation_table_for_day <- function(data, day_name,
                                    day_var = "DAY_OF_WEEK",
                                    viol_var = "PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY") {
  if (!(day_var %in% names(data)) || !(viol_var %in% names(data))) return(NULL)
  if (!("SevereBinary" %in% names(data))) return(NULL)

  day_map <- c(
    "1" = "Monday", "2" = "Tuesday", "3" = "Wednesday", "4" = "Thursday",
    "5" = "Friday", "6" = "Saturday", "7" = "Sunday",
    "Mon" = "Monday", "Tue" = "Tuesday", "Wed" = "Wednesday",
    "Thu" = "Thursday", "Fri" = "Friday", "Sat" = "Saturday", "Sun" = "Sunday"
  )

  pcf_map <- c(
    "01" = "DUI (Alcohol or Drug)",
    "02" = "Impeding Traffic",
    "03" = "Unsafe Speed",
    "04" = "Following Too Closely",
    "05" = "Wrong Side of Road",
    "06" = "Improper Passing",
    "07" = "Unsafe Lane Change",
    "08" = "Improper Turning",
    "09" = "Automobile Right-of-Way",
    "10" = "Pedestrian Right-of-Way",
    "11" = "Pedestrian Violation",
    "12" = "Traffic Signals and Signs",
    "13" = "Hazardous Parking",
    "14" = "Lights",
    "15" = "Brakes",
    "16" = "Other Equipment",
    "17" = "Other Hazardous Violation",
    "18" = "Other Than Driver/Pedestrian",
    "21" = "Unsafe Starting or Backing",
    "22" = "Other Improper Driving",
    "23" = "Pedestrian/Other DUI",
    "24" = "Fell Asleep",
    "00" = "Unknown"
  )

  df <- data %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      day = as.character(.data[[day_var]]),
      viol = as.character(.data[[viol_var]]),
      SevereBinary = as.character(SevereBinary)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      day  = ifelse(is.na(day)  | trimws(day)  == "", "Not Stated", trimws(day)),
      viol = ifelse(is.na(viol) | trimws(viol) == "", "Not Stated", trimws(viol)),
      viol = stringr::str_pad(viol, width = 2, side = "left", pad = "0")
    )

  if (exists("legend_maps") && day_var %in% names(legend_maps)) {
    df <- df %>%
      dplyr::mutate(day_label = dplyr::recode(day, !!!legend_maps[[day_var]], .default = day))
  } else {
    df <- df %>%
      dplyr::mutate(day_label = dplyr::recode(day, !!!day_map, .default = day))
  }

  if (exists("legend_maps") && viol_var %in% names(legend_maps)) {
    df <- df %>%
      dplyr::mutate(viol_label = dplyr::recode(viol, !!!legend_maps[[viol_var]], .default = viol))
  } else {
    df <- df %>%
      dplyr::mutate(viol_label = dplyr::recode(viol, !!!pcf_map, .default = viol))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(day_label == day_name) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!viol_label %in% c("Unknown", "Not Stated", "00", "-")) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(viol_label) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      count = dplyr::n(),
      severe_count = sum(SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal", na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      percent = 100 * count / sum(count),
      severe_percent = 100 * severe_count / count,
      severe_percent_of_day = 100 * severe_count / sum(count)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(
      dplyr::desc(severe_percent),
      dplyr::desc(severe_count),
      dplyr::desc(count)
    )

  names(out)[names(out) == "viol_label"] <- day_name
  out
}

day_order <- c("Monday","Tuesday","Wednesday","Thursday","Friday","Saturday","Sunday")

day_violation_tables <- purrr::map(day_order, ~ violation_table_for_day(switrs_reduced, .x))
names(day_violation_tables) <- day_order

day_violation_tables
```

# General violation count/percent table across all days
```{r general_violation_count_percent_all_days, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (!requireNamespace("gt", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("gt")
if (!requireNamespace("webshot2", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("webshot2")

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(gt)

general_violation_table <- function(data,
                                    viol_var = "PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY") {
  if (!(viol_var %in% names(data))) return(NULL)
  if (!("SevereBinary" %in% names(data))) return(NULL)

  pcf_map <- c(
    "01" = "DUI (Alcohol or Drug)",
    "02" = "Impeding Traffic",
    "03" = "Unsafe Speed",
    "04" = "Following Too Closely",
    "05" = "Wrong Side of Road",
    "06" = "Improper Passing",
    "07" = "Unsafe Lane Change",
    "08" = "Improper Turning",
    "09" = "Automobile Right-of-Way",
    "10" = "Pedestrian Right-of-Way",
    "11" = "Pedestrian Violation",
    "12" = "Traffic Signals and Signs",
    "13" = "Hazardous Parking",
    "14" = "Lights",
    "15" = "Brakes",
    "16" = "Other Equipment",
    "17" = "Other Hazardous Violation",
    "18" = "Other Than Driver/Pedestrian",
    "21" = "Unsafe Starting or Backing",
    "22" = "Other Improper Driving",
    "23" = "Pedestrian/Other DUI",
    "24" = "Fell Asleep",
    "00" = "Unknown"
  )

  df <- data %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      viol = as.character(.data[[viol_var]]),
      SevereBinary = as.character(SevereBinary)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      viol = ifelse(is.na(viol) | trimws(viol) == "", "Not Stated", trimws(viol)),
      viol = stringr::str_pad(viol, width = 2, side = "left", pad = "0")
    )

  if (exists("legend_maps") && viol_var %in% names(legend_maps)) {
    df <- df %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        viol_label = dplyr::recode(viol, !!!legend_maps[[viol_var]], .default = viol)
      )
  } else {
    df <- df %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        viol_label = dplyr::recode(viol, !!!pcf_map, .default = viol)
      )
  }

  out <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(!viol_label %in% c("Unknown", "Not Stated", "00", "-")) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(viol_label) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      count = dplyr::n(),
      severe_count = sum(SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal", na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      percent = 100 * count / sum(count),
      severe_percent = 100 * severe_count / count,
      severe_percent_overall = 100 * severe_count / sum(count)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(
      dplyr::desc(severe_percent),
      dplyr::desc(severe_count),
      dplyr::desc(count)
    )

  names(out)[names(out) == "viol_label"] <- "Violation"
  out
}

general_violation_tbl <- general_violation_table(switrs_reduced)

general_violation_gt <- general_violation_tbl %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    percent = percent / 100,
    severe_percent = severe_percent / 100,
    severe_percent_overall = severe_percent_overall / 100
  ) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**General Violation Table (All Days Combined)**")
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    Violation = "Violation",
    count = "Count",
    severe_count = "Severe Count",
    percent = "Percent",
    severe_percent = "Severe %",
    severe_percent_overall = "Severe % Overall"
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(count, severe_count),
    decimals = 0,
    use_seps = TRUE
  ) %>%
  fmt_percent(
    columns = c(percent, severe_percent, severe_percent_overall),
    decimals = 1
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align = "left",
    columns = Violation
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = c(count, severe_count, percent, severe_percent, severe_percent_overall)
  ) %>%
  tab_options(
    table.width = pct(100),
    data_row.padding = px(4),
    heading.align = "left"
  )

# show the table in the notebook
if (!requireNamespace("gridExtra", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("gridExtra")
if (!requireNamespace("grid", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("grid")

library(gridExtra)
library(grid)

# show table in notebook
general_violation_tbl

# save table as image
dir.create("table_exports", showWarnings = FALSE)
general_violation_img <- file.path("table_exports", "general_violation_table_all_days.png")

tbl_for_export <- general_violation_tbl %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    percent = sprintf("%.1f%%", percent),
    severe_percent = sprintf("%.1f%%", severe_percent),
    severe_percent_overall = sprintf("%.1f%%", severe_percent_overall)
  )

table_grob <- tableGrob(tbl_for_export, rows = NULL)

png(filename = general_violation_img, width = 1800, height = 1200, res = 150)
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(table_grob)
dev.off()

cat("\nSaved image to:", general_violation_img, "\n")
```

# Correlation Check (numeric predictors)
```{r}
num_vars <- names(switrs_reduced)[sapply(switrs_reduced, is.numeric)]

# Remove IDs, coordinates, raw year field, and direct outcome / harm variables
exclude_num_vars <- intersect(
  c(
    "CASE_ID",
    "ACCIDENT_YEAR",
    "LATITUDE",
    "LONGITUDE",
    "POINT_X",
    "POINT_Y",
    "NUMBER_KILLED",
    "NUMBER_KILLED_NUM",
    "NUMBER_INJURED",
    "Deaths",
    "FatalBinary",
    "COUNT_SEVERE_INJ",
    "COUNT_VISIBLE_INJ",
    "COUNT_COMPLAINT_PAIN",
    "COUNT_PED_KILLED",
    "COUNT_PED_INJURED",
    "COUNT_BICYCLIST_KILLED",
    "COUNT_BICYCLIST_INJURED",
    "COUNT_MC_KILLED",
    "COUNT_MC_INJURED"
  ),
  num_vars
)

num_vars <- setdiff(num_vars, exclude_num_vars)

# Drop numeric variables with no usable variation
num_vars <- num_vars[
  sapply(switrs_reduced[num_vars], function(x) {
    x <- x[is.finite(x)]
    length(unique(x)) >= 2
  })
]

cat("Numeric variables used in correlation check:\n")
print(num_vars)

if (length(num_vars) >= 2) {
  cor_matrix <- cor(switrs_reduced[num_vars], use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
  corrplot(cor_matrix, method = "color", type = "lower", tl.cex = 0.6)

  high_corr <- c()
  moderate_corr <- c()

  for (i in 1:(ncol(cor_matrix) - 1)) {
    for (j in (i + 1):ncol(cor_matrix)) {
      r <- cor_matrix[i, j]
      if (!is.na(r)) {
        pair <- paste(colnames(cor_matrix)[i], colnames(cor_matrix)[j], "r =", round(r, 3))
        if (abs(r) >= 0.8) {
          high_corr <- c(high_corr, pair)
        } else if (abs(r) >= 0.5) {
          moderate_corr <- c(moderate_corr, pair)
        }
      }
    }
  }

  cat("High correlations (|r| >= 0.8):\n")
  print(high_corr)

  cat("\nModerate correlations (0.5 <= |r| < 0.8):\n")
  print(moderate_corr)
} else {
  cat("Not enough usable numeric columns for correlation analysis.\n")
}
```

# Shared imputation
```{r shared_imputation, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
if (!exists("switrs_reduced")) stop("switrs_reduced not found.")

switrs_model_ready <- switrs_reduced

if ("SevereBinary" %in% names(switrs_model_ready)) {
  switrs_model_ready <- switrs_model_ready %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      SevereBinary = factor(SevereBinary, levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"))
    )
}

switrs_model_ready <- switrs_model_ready %>%
  dplyr::mutate(across(where(is.character), as.factor))

factor_cols <- names(switrs_model_ready)[sapply(switrs_model_ready, is.factor)]
factor_cols <- setdiff(factor_cols, "SevereBinary")

if (length(factor_cols) > 0) {
  switrs_model_ready[factor_cols] <- lapply(
    switrs_model_ready[factor_cols],
    function(x) forcats::fct_explicit_na(x, na_level = "Not Stated")
  )
}

numeric_cols <- names(switrs_model_ready)[sapply(switrs_model_ready, function(x) is.numeric(x) || is.integer(x))]
numeric_cols <- setdiff(numeric_cols, "CASE_ID")

shared_numeric_medians <- setNames(vector("list", length(numeric_cols)), numeric_cols)

for (v in numeric_cols) {
  miss_name <- paste0(v, "_miss")

  switrs_model_ready[[miss_name]] <- as.integer(is.na(switrs_model_ready[[v]]))

  med <- suppressWarnings(median(switrs_model_ready[[v]], na.rm = TRUE))
  if (!is.finite(med)) med <- 0

  shared_numeric_medians[[v]] <- med
  switrs_model_ready[[v]][is.na(switrs_model_ready[[v]])] <- med
}

expand_predictors_with_miss <- function(df, predictors) {
  predictors <- intersect(predictors, names(df))

  numeric_base <- predictors[
    sapply(df[predictors], function(x) is.numeric(x) || is.integer(x))
  ]

  unique(c(
    predictors,
    intersect(paste0(numeric_base, "_miss"), names(df))
  ))
}

cat("Shared model-ready dataset created.\n")
cat("Rows =", nrow(switrs_model_ready), "| Columns =", ncol(switrs_model_ready), "\n")
cat("Remaining NA count =", sum(is.na(switrs_model_ready)), "\n")
```

# Shared train/test split
```{r shared_train_test_split, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
set.seed(544)

if (!exists("switrs_model_ready")) {
  stop("switrs_model_ready not found. Run shared_imputation first.")
}

if (!all(c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary") %in% names(switrs_model_ready))) {
  stop("Need CASE_ID and SevereBinary in switrs_model_ready before creating the shared split.")
}

split_frame <- switrs_model_ready %>%
  dplyr::select(CASE_ID, SevereBinary) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(CASE_ID), !is.na(SevereBinary)) %>%
  dplyr::distinct(CASE_ID, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    SevereBinary = factor(SevereBinary, levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"))
  )

test_frac <- 0.30

idx_sev <- which(split_frame$SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal")
idx_oth <- which(split_frame$SevereBinary == "Other")

if (length(idx_sev) == 0 || length(idx_oth) == 0) {
  stop("Both outcome classes must be present to create a stratified train/test split.")
}

n_test_sev <- floor(length(idx_sev) * test_frac)
n_test_oth <- floor(length(idx_oth) * test_frac)

shared_test_idx <- c(
  sample(idx_sev, size = n_test_sev),
  sample(idx_oth, size = n_test_oth)
)

test_case_ids  <- split_frame$CASE_ID[shared_test_idx]
train_case_ids <- setdiff(split_frame$CASE_ID, test_case_ids)

train_data <- switrs_model_ready %>%
  dplyr::filter(CASE_ID %in% train_case_ids)

test_data <- switrs_model_ready %>%
  dplyr::filter(CASE_ID %in% test_case_ids)

train_data$SevereBinary <- factor(train_data$SevereBinary, levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"))
test_data$SevereBinary  <- factor(test_data$SevereBinary,  levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"))

cat("Shared split created.\n")
cat("Train crashes =", length(train_case_ids), "| Test crashes =", length(test_case_ids), "\n")
cat("Train rows =", nrow(train_data), "| Test rows =", nrow(test_data), "\n")
cat("Shared test fraction =", round(length(test_case_ids) / nrow(split_frame), 4), "\n")

cat("\nClass balance in train split:\n")
print(prop.table(table(train_data$SevereBinary)))

cat("\nClass balance in test split:\n")
print(prop.table(table(test_data$SevereBinary)))
```

# Baseline GLM modeling dataset
```{r}
set.seed(544)

baseline_glm_name <- "Baseline GLM"

if (!exists("leakage_vars")) leakage_vars <- character(0)

candidate_predictors <- intersect(
  c(
    "year",
    "day_group",
    "night",
    "friday_night",
    "weather_group",
    "lighting_group",
    "ROAD_SURFACE",
    "INTERSECTION",
    "STATE_HWY_IND",
    "TYPE_OF_COLLISION",
    "PRIMARY_COLL_FACTOR",
    "school_bus_proxy",
    "pcf_dui",
    "pcf_speed",
    "ALCOHOL_INVOLVED",
    "is_ped",
    "BICYCLE_ACCIDENT",
    "MOTORCYCLE_ACCIDENT",
    "TRUCK_ACCIDENT",
    "night_dui",
    "rain_speed",
    "ped_dark",
    "n_parties",
    "any_party_alcohol",
    "any_party_drug",
    "any_party_at_fault",
    "mean_party_age"
  ),
  names(switrs_model_ready)
)

candidate_predictors <- unique(setdiff(candidate_predictors, leakage_vars))

if (length(intersect(candidate_predictors, leakage_vars)) > 0) {
  stop("Leakage detected: a banned variable is in candidate_predictors.")
}

forbidden_redundant <- c(
  "DAY_OF_WEEK", "weekend", "time_bucket",
  "WEATHER_1", "is_rain",
  "LIGHTING", "is_dark",
  "PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY",
  "PEDESTRIAN_ACCIDENT"
)

if (length(intersect(candidate_predictors, forbidden_redundant)) > 0) {
  stop("Redundant predictors detected in candidate_predictors. Remove parent/raw duplicates.")
}

cat(baseline_glm_name, "predictors:\n")
print(candidate_predictors)

if (!exists("train_data") || !exists("test_data")) {
  stop("train_data/test_data not found. Run shared_train_test_split first.")
}
if (!exists("expand_predictors_with_miss")) {
  stop("expand_predictors_with_miss() not found. Run the shared_imputation chunk first.")
}

# baseline GLM happens before undersample_shared, so define helper here if needed
if (!exists("is_perfect_separator")) {
  is_perfect_separator <- function(x, y, min_level_n = 30) {
    if (is.character(x) || is.factor(x)) {
      tab <- table(x, y, useNA = "no")
      lvl_n <- rowSums(tab)
      tab2 <- tab[lvl_n >= min_level_n, , drop = FALSE]
      if (nrow(tab2) == 0) return(FALSE)
      any(tab2[, "Other"] == 0 | tab2[, "Severe/Fatal"] == 0)
    } else if (is.numeric(x) || is.integer(x)) {
      ux <- sort(unique(x))
      ux <- ux[!is.na(ux)]
      if (length(ux) <= 1) return(FALSE)

      qs <- unique(stats::quantile(x, probs = seq(0.1, 0.9, by = 0.1), na.rm = TRUE))
      qs <- qs[!is.na(qs)]

      for (cut in qs) {
        left  <- y[x <= cut]
        right <- y[x >  cut]
        if (length(left) >= min_level_n && length(right) >= min_level_n) {
          if (all(left == "Other") || all(left == "Severe/Fatal") ||
              all(right == "Other") || all(right == "Severe/Fatal")) {
            return(TRUE)
          }
        }
      }
      FALSE
    } else {
      FALSE
    }
  }
}

baseline_predictors_final <- expand_predictors_with_miss(train_data, candidate_predictors)

train_set_raw <- train_data %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", baseline_predictors_final)))

test_set_raw <- test_data %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", baseline_predictors_final)))

cat(baseline_glm_name, "raw split sizes: Train =", nrow(train_set_raw), "| Test =", nrow(test_set_raw), "\n")

is_constant_train <- sapply(
  train_set_raw %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID, -SevereBinary),
  function(x) {
    ux <- unique(x)
    ux <- ux[!is.na(ux)]
    length(ux) <= 1
  }
)

if (any(is_constant_train)) {
  cat("Dropping", baseline_glm_name, "train-constant predictors:\n")
  print(names(is_constant_train)[is_constant_train])

  keep_cols <- c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", names(is_constant_train)[!is_constant_train])
  train_set_raw <- train_set_raw %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep_cols))
  test_set_raw  <- test_set_raw  %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep_cols))
}

y_train <- train_set_raw$SevereBinary
pred_names_train <- setdiff(names(train_set_raw), c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary"))

sep_flags <- sapply(pred_names_train, function(v) {
  is_perfect_separator(train_set_raw[[v]], y_train)
})
bad_vars <- names(sep_flags)[sep_flags]

cat(baseline_glm_name, "predictors dropped for practical separation:", length(bad_vars), "\n")
if (length(bad_vars) > 0) print(bad_vars)

if (length(bad_vars) > 0) {
  train_set_raw <- train_set_raw %>% dplyr::select(-dplyr::all_of(bad_vars))
  test_set_raw  <- test_set_raw  %>% dplyr::select(-dplyr::all_of(bad_vars))
}

train_set <- train_set_raw %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID)
test_set  <- test_set_raw  %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID)

train_set$SevereBinary <- factor(train_set$SevereBinary, levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"))
test_set$SevereBinary  <- factor(test_set$SevereBinary,  levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"))

cat("\nFinal", baseline_glm_name, "columns:\n")
print(names(train_set))

model_df_clean2 <- dplyr::bind_rows(train_set, test_set)

cat(baseline_glm_name, "final split sizes: Train =", nrow(train_set), "| Test =", nrow(test_set), "\n")

baseline_glm_fit <- glm(
  SevereBinary ~ .,
  data = train_set,
  family = binomial(),
  control = glm.control(maxit = 50)
)

glm_fit_final <- baseline_glm_fit

cat(baseline_glm_name, "converged? ", baseline_glm_fit$converged, "\n", sep = "")

baseline_glm_test_phat <- as.numeric(
  predict(baseline_glm_fit, newdata = test_set, type = "response")
)
test_phat <- baseline_glm_test_phat
test_y <- test_set$SevereBinary

if (!requireNamespace("pROC", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("pROC")
if (requireNamespace("pROC", quietly = TRUE)) {
  roc_obj <- pROC::roc(test_y, baseline_glm_test_phat, levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"), quiet = TRUE)
  cat(baseline_glm_name, "TEST AUC:", round(as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj)), 4), "\n")
}

pred_05 <- factor(
  ifelse(baseline_glm_test_phat >= 0.5, "Severe/Fatal", "Other"),
  levels = levels(test_y)
)
cat("\n", baseline_glm_name, "confusion matrix (cutoff=0.50):\n", sep = "")
print(table(Pred = pred_05, Truth = test_y))

prev <- mean(train_set$SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal")
pred_prev <- factor(
  ifelse(baseline_glm_test_phat >= prev, "Severe/Fatal", "Other"),
  levels = levels(test_y)
)
cat("\n", baseline_glm_name, "confusion matrix (cutoff=prevalence=", round(prev, 4), "):\n", sep = "")
print(table(Pred = pred_prev, Truth = test_y))

coefs <- summary(baseline_glm_fit)$coefficients
or_tbl <- data.frame(
  term = rownames(coefs),
  estimate = coefs[, "Estimate"],
  std.error = coefs[, "Std. Error"],
  p.value = coefs[, "Pr(>|z|)"],
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>%
  dplyr::filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
  dplyr::filter(is.finite(estimate), is.finite(std.error)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    OR = exp(estimate),
    conf.low = exp(estimate - 1.96 * std.error),
    conf.high = exp(estimate + 1.96 * std.error),
    log_or = abs(estimate)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(log_or)) %>%
  dplyr::select(term, OR, conf.low, conf.high, p.value)

cat("\nTop 20", baseline_glm_name, "odds ratios by |log(OR)| (FAST Wald CI, train fit):\n")
print(head(or_tbl, 20))
```

# Odds ratios of severe/fatal crash by DAY_OF_WEEK (adjusted baseline model)
```{r day_of_week_odds_ratio_plot, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
set.seed(544)

if (!exists("switrs_model_ready")) stop("switrs_model_ready not found. Run shared_imputation first.")
if (!exists("train_data")) stop("train_data not found. Run shared_train_test_split first.")
if (!exists("expand_predictors_with_miss")) stop("expand_predictors_with_miss() not found. Run shared_imputation first.")
if (!exists("leakage_vars")) leakage_vars <- character(0)

day_or_predictors <- intersect(
  c(
    "DAY_OF_WEEK",
    "year",
    "night",
    "weather_group",
    "lighting_group",
    "ROAD_SURFACE",
    "INTERSECTION",
    "STATE_HWY_IND",
    "TYPE_OF_COLLISION",
    "PRIMARY_COLL_FACTOR",
    "school_bus_proxy",
    "pcf_dui",
    "pcf_speed",
    "ALCOHOL_INVOLVED",
    "is_ped",
    "BICYCLE_ACCIDENT",
    "MOTORCYCLE_ACCIDENT",
    "TRUCK_ACCIDENT",
    "night_dui",
    "rain_speed",
    "ped_dark",
    "n_parties",
    "any_party_alcohol",
    "any_party_drug",
    "any_party_at_fault",
    "mean_party_age"
  ),
  names(switrs_model_ready)
)

day_or_predictors <- unique(setdiff(day_or_predictors, leakage_vars))
day_or_predictors_final <- expand_predictors_with_miss(train_data, day_or_predictors)

day_or_train_raw <- train_data %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", day_or_predictors_final))) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    DAY_OF_WEEK = as.character(DAY_OF_WEEK),
    DAY_OF_WEEK = dplyr::na_if(DAY_OF_WEEK, "Not Stated"),
    DAY_OF_WEEK = factor(
      DAY_OF_WEEK,
      levels = c("Tuesday", "Monday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday", "Saturday", "Sunday")
    ),
    SevereBinary = factor(SevereBinary, levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(SevereBinary), !is.na(DAY_OF_WEEK))

is_constant_day <- sapply(
  day_or_train_raw %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID, -SevereBinary),
  function(x) {
    ux <- unique(x)
    ux <- ux[!is.na(ux)]
    length(ux) <= 1
  }
)

if (any(is_constant_day)) {
  cat("Dropping train-constant predictors for day-of-week OR model:\n")
  print(names(is_constant_day)[is_constant_day])

  keep_cols_day <- c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", names(is_constant_day)[!is_constant_day])
  day_or_train_raw <- day_or_train_raw %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep_cols_day))
}

y_day <- day_or_train_raw$SevereBinary
pred_names_day <- setdiff(names(day_or_train_raw), c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary"))

sep_flags_day <- sapply(pred_names_day, function(v) {
  is_perfect_separator(day_or_train_raw[[v]], y_day)
})
bad_vars_day <- names(sep_flags_day)[sep_flags_day]

cat("Day-of-week OR model predictors dropped for practical separation:", length(bad_vars_day), "\n")
if (length(bad_vars_day) > 0) print(bad_vars_day)

if (length(bad_vars_day) > 0) {
  day_or_train_raw <- day_or_train_raw %>% dplyr::select(-dplyr::all_of(bad_vars_day))
}

day_or_train <- day_or_train_raw %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID)

day_or_glm_fit <- glm(
  SevereBinary ~ .,
  data = day_or_train,
  family = binomial(),
  control = glm.control(maxit = 50)
)

day_or_coefs <- summary(day_or_glm_fit)$coefficients

day_or_tbl <- data.frame(
  term = rownames(day_or_coefs),
  estimate = day_or_coefs[, "Estimate"],
  std.error = day_or_coefs[, "Std. Error"],
  p.value = day_or_coefs[, "Pr(>|z|)"],
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>%
  dplyr::filter(grepl("^DAY_OF_WEEK", term)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    day = gsub("^DAY_OF_WEEK", "", term),
    OR = exp(estimate),
    conf.low = exp(estimate - 1.96 * std.error),
    conf.high = exp(estimate + 1.96 * std.error)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(day, OR, conf.low, conf.high, p.value)

day_or_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  data.frame(
    day = "Tuesday",
    OR = 1,
    conf.low = 1,
    conf.high = 1,
    p.value = NA_real_
  ),
  day_or_tbl
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    day = factor(day, levels = c("Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday", "Saturday", "Sunday"))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(day)

cat("Adjusted odds ratios by day of week (reference = Tuesday):\n")
print(day_or_tbl)

ggplot(day_or_tbl, aes(x = OR, y = day)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high), height = 0.15, color = "#1B5E20") +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "#1B5E20") +
  labs(
    title = "Adjusted Odds Ratios of Severe/Fatal Crash by Day of Week",
    subtitle = "Reference day = Tuesday",
    x = "Odds Ratio",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```

# Coefficient analysis
```{r report_glm_coefficient_analysis, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
if (!exists("or_tbl")) stop("or_tbl not found. Run the baseline GLM chunk first.")

coef_report_tbl <- or_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    is.finite(OR),
    is.finite(conf.low),
    is.finite(conf.high),
    is.finite(p.value)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!grepl("_miss$", term)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!grepl("Not Stated", term, fixed = TRUE)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    effect_direction = dplyr::if_else(
      OR > 1,
      "Higher odds of severe/fatal crash",
      "Lower odds of severe/fatal crash"
    ),
    distance_from_null = abs(log(OR))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(p.value, dplyr::desc(distance_from_null))

cat("Filtered coefficient table size:", nrow(coef_report_tbl), "\n")

coef_increase_tbl <- coef_report_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(OR > 1) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 10) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    OR = round(OR, 3),
    conf.low = round(conf.low, 3),
    conf.high = round(conf.high, 3),
    p.value = signif(p.value, 3)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(term, OR, conf.low, conf.high, p.value, effect_direction)

coef_decrease_tbl <- coef_report_tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(OR < 1) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 10) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    OR = round(OR, 3),
    conf.low = round(conf.low, 3),
    conf.high = round(conf.high, 3),
    p.value = signif(p.value, 3)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(term, OR, conf.low, conf.high, p.value, effect_direction)

cat("Top GLM terms associated with HIGHER severe/fatal odds:\n")
print(coef_increase_tbl)

cat("\nTop GLM terms associated with LOWER severe/fatal odds:\n")
print(coef_decrease_tbl)
```

# What-if / one-at-a-time probability changes (Baseline GLM)
```{r}
if (!exists("glm_fit_final")) stop("glm_fit_final not found. Run the baseline GLM chunk first.")
if (!exists("train_set")) stop("train_set not found. Run the baseline GLM chunk first.")

model_vars <- setdiff(names(train_set), "SevereBinary")
X_ref <- train_set[, model_vars, drop = FALSE]
model_xlev <- glm_fit_final$xlevels

mode_level <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  names(which.max(table(x)))[1]
}

safe_predict_prob <- function(model, newdata) {
  as.numeric(suppressWarnings(predict(model, newdata = newdata, type = "response")))
}

baseline_row <- as.data.frame(
  lapply(names(X_ref), function(v) {
    col <- X_ref[[v]]

    if (v %in% names(model_xlev)) {
      allowed <- model_xlev[[v]]
      obs_mode <- mode_level(as.character(col))

      if (is.na(obs_mode) || !(obs_mode %in% allowed)) {
        freq <- sort(table(as.character(col)), decreasing = TRUE)
        cand <- intersect(names(freq), allowed)
        obs_mode <- if (length(cand) > 0) cand[1] else allowed[1]
      }

      return(factor(obs_mode, levels = allowed))
    }

    if (is.integer(col)) {
      return(as.integer(round(stats::median(col, na.rm = TRUE))))
    }

    if (is.numeric(col)) {
      return(as.numeric(stats::median(col, na.rm = TRUE)))
    }

    mode_level(as.character(col))
  }),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

names(baseline_row) <- names(X_ref)

for (v in names(X_ref)) {
  if (is.integer(X_ref[[v]]) && !(v %in% names(model_xlev))) {
    baseline_row[[v]] <- as.integer(round(as.numeric(baseline_row[[v]])))
  }
}

p0 <- safe_predict_prob(glm_fit_final, baseline_row)

cat("Baseline predicted probability of Severe/Fatal crash:\n")
print(round(p0, 4))

what_if <- function(var_name, values = NULL,
                    model = glm_fit_final,
                    base = baseline_row,
                    ref = X_ref,
                    xlev = model_xlev) {

  if (!var_name %in% names(base)) stop("Variable not in model predictors: ", var_name)

  if (var_name %in% names(xlev)) {
    allowed <- xlev[[var_name]]

    if (is.null(values)) values <- allowed
    values <- as.character(values)
    values <- values[values %in% allowed]

    if (length(values) == 0) stop("No provided values are valid levels for ", var_name)

    out <- lapply(values, function(val) {
      nd <- base
      nd[[var_name]] <- factor(val, levels = allowed)
      p <- safe_predict_prob(model, nd)

      data.frame(
        variable = var_name,
        value = val,
        p_severe = p,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    })

    out <- dplyr::bind_rows(out) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        p_baseline = p0,
        delta_pp = 100 * (p_severe - p_baseline),
        baseline_value = as.character(base[[var_name]])
      ) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(p_severe))

    return(out)
  }

  xref <- ref[[var_name]]

  if (is.null(values)) {
    qs <- stats::quantile(
      xref,
      probs = c(0.10, 0.50, 0.90),
      na.rm = TRUE,
      names = FALSE
    )
    values <- as.numeric(qs)
  }

  out <- lapply(values, function(val) {
    nd <- base

    if (is.integer(xref)) {
      nd[[var_name]] <- as.integer(val)
    } else {
      nd[[var_name]] <- as.numeric(val)
    }

    p <- safe_predict_prob(model, nd)

    data.frame(
      variable = var_name,
      value = as.character(val),
      p_severe = p,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  })

  dplyr::bind_rows(out) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      p_baseline = p0,
      delta_pp = 100 * (p_severe - p_baseline),
      baseline_value = as.character(base[[var_name]])
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(p_severe))
}

pick_preferred_levels <- function(var_name, preferred = NULL) {
  if (!(var_name %in% names(model_xlev))) return(NULL)

  allowed <- model_xlev[[var_name]]

  if (is.null(preferred)) return(allowed)

  vals <- intersect(preferred, allowed)
  if (length(vals) == 0) allowed else vals
}

whatif_results <- list()

if ("day_group" %in% names(baseline_row)) {
  whatif_results$day_group <- what_if(
    "day_group",
    pick_preferred_levels("day_group", c("Mon-Thu", "Friday", "Saturday", "Sunday"))
  )
}

if ("friday_night" %in% names(baseline_row)) {
  whatif_results$friday_night <- what_if(
    "friday_night",
    pick_preferred_levels("friday_night", c("No", "Yes"))
  )
}

if ("night" %in% names(baseline_row)) {
  whatif_results$night <- what_if(
    "night",
    pick_preferred_levels("night", c("No", "Yes"))
  )
}

if ("lighting_group" %in% names(baseline_row)) {
  whatif_results$lighting_group <- what_if(
    "lighting_group",
    pick_preferred_levels("lighting_group", c("Daylight", "Dusk/Dawn", "Dark"))
  )
}

if ("weather_group" %in% names(baseline_row)) {
  whatif_results$weather_group <- what_if(
    "weather_group",
    pick_preferred_levels("weather_group", c("Clear", "Rain", "Other Weather"))
  )
}

if ("school_bus_proxy" %in% names(baseline_row)) {
  whatif_results$school_bus_proxy <- what_if(
    "school_bus_proxy",
    pick_preferred_levels("school_bus_proxy", c("No", "Yes"))
  )
}

if ("INTERSECTION" %in% names(baseline_row)) {
  whatif_results$INTERSECTION <- what_if(
    "INTERSECTION",
    pick_preferred_levels("INTERSECTION", c("N", "Y", "Not Stated"))
  )
}

if ("STATE_HWY_IND" %in% names(baseline_row)) {
  whatif_results$STATE_HWY_IND <- what_if(
    "STATE_HWY_IND",
    pick_preferred_levels("STATE_HWY_IND", c("N", "Y", "Not Stated"))
  )
}

if ("PRIMARY_COLL_FACTOR" %in% names(baseline_row)) {
  whatif_results$PRIMARY_COLL_FACTOR <- what_if("PRIMARY_COLL_FACTOR")
}

if ("pcf_dui" %in% names(baseline_row)) {
  whatif_results$pcf_dui <- what_if(
    "pcf_dui",
    pick_preferred_levels("pcf_dui", c("No", "Yes"))
  )
}

if ("pcf_speed" %in% names(baseline_row)) {
  whatif_results$pcf_speed <- what_if(
    "pcf_speed",
    pick_preferred_levels("pcf_speed", c("No", "Yes"))
  )
}

if ("ALCOHOL_INVOLVED" %in% names(baseline_row)) {
  whatif_results$ALCOHOL_INVOLVED <- what_if(
    "ALCOHOL_INVOLVED",
    pick_preferred_levels("ALCOHOL_INVOLVED", c("N", "Y", "Not Stated"))
  )
}

if ("is_ped" %in% names(baseline_row)) {
  whatif_results$is_ped <- what_if(
    "is_ped",
    pick_preferred_levels("is_ped", c("No", "Yes"))
  )
}

if ("ROAD_SURFACE" %in% names(baseline_row)) {
  whatif_results$ROAD_SURFACE <- what_if("ROAD_SURFACE")
}

if ("TYPE_OF_COLLISION" %in% names(baseline_row)) {
  whatif_results$TYPE_OF_COLLISION <- what_if("TYPE_OF_COLLISION")
}

cat("\n================ WHAT-IF RESULTS (GLM) ================\n")
for (nm in names(whatif_results)) {
  cat("\n------------------------------------------------------\n")
  cat("Variable:", nm, "\n")
  cat("------------------------------------------------------\n")
  print(whatif_results[[nm]])
}
```

# Penalized logistic regression: GLMNET model
```{r glmnet_model, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
lasso_glmnet_name <- "LASSO GLMNET"

if (!requireNamespace("glmnet", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("glmnet")
library(glmnet)

if (!exists("train_set") || !exists("test_set")) {
  stop("train_set/test_set not found. Run the Baseline GLM chunk first.")
}
if (!("SevereBinary" %in% names(train_set))) stop("SevereBinary not found in train_set.")

train_set_glmnet <- train_set
test_set_glmnet  <- test_set

train_set_glmnet$.split <- "train"
test_set_glmnet$.split  <- "test"
combo <- dplyr::bind_rows(train_set_glmnet, test_set_glmnet)

train_idx <- combo$.split == "train"
test_idx  <- combo$.split == "test"

combo_mm <- combo %>% dplyr::select(-.split)

X_all <- model.matrix(SevereBinary ~ ., data = combo_mm)[, -1, drop = FALSE]

x_train <- X_all[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
x_test  <- X_all[test_idx,  , drop = FALSE]

y_train <- as.integer(combo$SevereBinary[train_idx] == "Severe/Fatal")
y_test  <- as.integer(combo$SevereBinary[test_idx]  == "Severe/Fatal")

set.seed(544)
lasso_glmnet_cv_fit <- cv.glmnet(
  x = x_train,
  y = y_train,
  family = "binomial",
  alpha = 1,
  nfolds = 5,
  type.measure = "auc"
)

cv_fit <- lasso_glmnet_cv_fit

cat(lasso_glmnet_name, "best lambda (min):", lasso_glmnet_cv_fit$lambda.min, "\n")
cat(lasso_glmnet_name, "1-SE lambda:", lasso_glmnet_cv_fit$lambda.1se, "\n")

plot(lasso_glmnet_cv_fit)

lasso_glmnet_test_phat <- as.numeric(
  predict(lasso_glmnet_cv_fit, newx = x_test, s = "lambda.1se", type = "response")
)
p_test <- lasso_glmnet_test_phat

if (!requireNamespace("pROC", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("pROC")

auc_glmnet <- NA_real_
if (requireNamespace("pROC", quietly = TRUE)) {
  roc_obj <- pROC::roc(response = y_test, predictor = lasso_glmnet_test_phat, quiet = TRUE)
  auc_glmnet <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj))
  cat(lasso_glmnet_name, "TEST AUC:", round(auc_glmnet, 4), "\n")
}

pred_05 <- ifelse(lasso_glmnet_test_phat >= 0.5, 1, 0)
cat("\n", lasso_glmnet_name, "confusion matrix (cutoff=0.50):\n", sep = "")
print(table(Pred = pred_05, Truth = y_test))

prev <- mean(y_train == 1)
pred_prev <- ifelse(lasso_glmnet_test_phat >= prev, 1, 0)
cat("\n", lasso_glmnet_name, "confusion matrix (cutoff=prevalence=", round(prev, 4), "):\n", sep = "")
print(table(Pred = pred_prev, Truth = y_test))

coef_mat <- as.matrix(coef(lasso_glmnet_cv_fit, s = "lambda.1se"))
coef_df <- data.frame(
  term = rownames(coef_mat),
  coef = as.numeric(coef_mat[, 1]),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>%
  dplyr::filter(term != "(Intercept)", coef != 0) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(coef)))

cat("\nTop 20 non-zero coefficients by |coef| (", lasso_glmnet_name, ", lambda.1se):\n", sep = "")
print(head(coef_df, 20))
```

# Feature selection(glmnet LASSO)
```{r feature_selection_summary}
if (!exists("cv_fit")) stop("cv_fit not found. Run glmnet_model chunk first.")

coef_mat <- as.matrix(coef(cv_fit, s = "lambda.1se"))
coef_df <- data.frame(
  term = rownames(coef_mat),
  coef = as.numeric(coef_mat[, 1]),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>%
  dplyr::filter(term != "(Intercept)", coef != 0) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(coef)))

cat("Number of selected (non-zero) one-hot terms:", nrow(coef_df), "\n\n")
cat("Top 30 selected terms by |coef|:\n")
print(head(coef_df, 30))

candidate_base_vars <- setdiff(names(train_set), c("SevereBinary"))
candidate_base_vars <- candidate_base_vars[!grepl("_miss$", candidate_base_vars)]
candidate_base_vars <- candidate_base_vars[order(nchar(candidate_base_vars), decreasing = TRUE)]

base_var_from_term <- function(term, vars) {
  hits <- vars[startsWith(term, vars)]
  if (length(hits) == 0) return(term)
  hits[1]
}

coef_df$base_var <- vapply(
  coef_df$term,
  base_var_from_term,
  character(1),
  vars = candidate_base_vars
)

selected_vars <- coef_df %>%
  dplyr::count(base_var, sort = TRUE)

cat("\nSelected base variables (ranked by how many active dummy terms they contribute):\n")
print(selected_vars)
```

# GLM what-if analysis for LASSO-selected features
```{r}
if (!exists("what_if")) stop("what_if() not found. Run the earlier GLM what-if chunk first.")
if (!exists("baseline_row")) stop("baseline_row not found. Run the earlier GLM what-if chunk first.")
if (!exists("selected_vars")) stop("selected_vars not found. Run feature_selection_summary first.")
if (!exists("train_set")) stop("train_set not found. Run the baseline modeling chunk first.")
if (!exists("glm_fit_final")) stop("glm_fit_final not found. Run the baseline modeling chunk first.")

top_k <- 10

important_vars <- selected_vars %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(n)) %>%
  dplyr::pull(base_var) %>%
  unique()

important_vars <- important_vars[!grepl("_miss$", important_vars)]
important_vars <- setdiff(important_vars, c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary"))

if (exists("leakage_vars")) {
  important_vars <- setdiff(important_vars, leakage_vars)
}

important_vars <- important_vars[important_vars %in% names(baseline_row)]
important_vars <- head(important_vars, top_k)

cat("Most important variables (top ", top_k, "):\n", sep = "")
print(important_vars)

pick_levels <- function(var_name, ref, xlev, base_row, max_show = 8) {
  allowed <- xlev[[var_name]]

  if (length(allowed) <= max_show) return(allowed)

  base_val <- as.character(base_row[[var_name]])
  freq <- sort(table(as.character(ref[[var_name]])), decreasing = TRUE)
  top_levs <- intersect(names(freq), allowed)

  vals <- unique(c(base_val, head(top_levs, max_show)))
  vals[vals %in% allowed]
}

whatif_tables <- list()

for (v in important_vars) {
  if (v %in% names(glm_fit_final$xlevels)) {
    vals <- pick_levels(v, train_set, glm_fit_final$xlevels, baseline_row, max_show = 8)
    whatif_tables[[v]] <- what_if(v, values = vals)
  } else {
    whatif_tables[[v]] <- what_if(v)
  }
}

whatif_summary <- purrr::imap_dfr(whatif_tables, function(tbl, varname) {
  best <- tbl[which.max(tbl$p_severe), , drop = FALSE]
  worst <- tbl[which.min(tbl$p_severe), , drop = FALSE]

  data.frame(
    variable = varname,
    baseline_value = best$baseline_value[1],
    baseline_p = best$p_baseline[1],
    best_value = best$value[1],
    best_p = best$p_severe[1],
    best_delta_pp = best$delta_pp[1],
    worst_value = worst$value[1],
    worst_p = worst$p_severe[1],
    worst_delta_pp = worst$delta_pp[1],
    swing_pp = best$delta_pp[1] - worst$delta_pp[1],
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(swing_pp)))

cat("\n================ WHAT-IF SUMMARY (top features) ================\n")
print(whatif_summary)
```

# report assumption checks
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
raw_df_for_report <- if (exists("switrs")) switrs else switrs_reduced

sample_for_shapiro <- function(x, max_n = 5000) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (length(x) > max_n) {
    set.seed(544)
    x <- sample(x, max_n)
  }
  x
}

sample_skewness <- function(x) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (length(x) < 3) return(NA_real_)
  s <- stats::sd(x)
  if (!is.finite(s) || s == 0) return(0)
  mean(((x - mean(x)) / s)^3)
}

assumption_num_vars <- intersect(
  c("n_parties", "n_victims", "mean_party_age", "mean_victim_age", "min_victim_age", "max_victim_age"),
  names(switrs_reduced)
)

independence_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
  rows = nrow(raw_df_for_report),
  unique_case_id = if ("CASE_ID" %in% names(raw_df_for_report)) dplyr::n_distinct(raw_df_for_report$CASE_ID) else NA_integer_,
  duplicated_case_id = if ("CASE_ID" %in% names(raw_df_for_report)) sum(duplicated(raw_df_for_report$CASE_ID)) else NA_integer_,
  comment = if ("CASE_ID" %in% names(raw_df_for_report)) {
    ifelse(
      sum(duplicated(raw_df_for_report$CASE_ID)) == 0,
      "No duplicated CASE_ID values in the crash-level merged file.",
      "Duplicate CASE_ID values found; row-level independence is weaker than intended."
    )
  } else {
    "CASE_ID not available to check row-level independence directly."
  }
)

cat("Independence check:\n")
print(independence_tbl)

if (length(assumption_num_vars) == 0) {
  cat("\nNo numeric variables from the report assumption list were found in switrs_reduced.\n")
} else {
  assumption_tbl <- purrr::map_dfr(assumption_num_vars, function(v) {
    df <- switrs_reduced %>%
      dplyr::select(SevereBinary, value = dplyr::all_of(v)) %>%
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(SevereBinary), is.finite(value))

    x_other <- sample_for_shapiro(df$value[df$SevereBinary == "Other"])
    x_sev   <- sample_for_shapiro(df$value[df$SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal"])

    shapiro_other <- tryCatch(
      if (length(x_other) >= 3) shapiro.test(x_other)$p.value else NA_real_,
      error = function(e) NA_real_
    )

    shapiro_sev <- tryCatch(
      if (length(x_sev) >= 3) shapiro.test(x_sev)$p.value else NA_real_,
      error = function(e) NA_real_
    )

    fligner_p <- tryCatch(
      fligner.test(value ~ SevereBinary, data = df)$p.value,
      error = function(e) NA_real_
    )

    tibble::tibble(
      variable = v,
      n_other = sum(df$SevereBinary == "Other"),
      n_severe = sum(df$SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal"),
      skew_other = round(sample_skewness(x_other), 3),
      skew_severe = round(sample_skewness(x_sev), 3),
      shapiro_p_other = signif(shapiro_other, 3),
      shapiro_p_severe = signif(shapiro_sev, 3),
      fligner_p = signif(fligner_p, 3),
      recommended_test = "Welch t-test primary; Wilcoxon sensitivity check"
    )
  })

  cat("\nQuick numeric-assumption screen:\n")
  print(assumption_tbl)
}

cat("\nCategorical-test assumption handling already built into the notebook:\n")
cat("- Chi-square expected counts are checked automatically.\n")
cat("- When expected counts are small, the code already switches to simulated chi-square p-values.\n")
cat("- For numeric predictors, Welch t-tests are paired with Wilcoxon tests for robustness.\n")
```

# UNIVARIATE HYPOTHESIS TESTING HELPERS (t-test / Wilcoxon / prop-test / chi-square)
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(broom)
library(tibble)

cohen_d <- function(x, g) {
  x0 <- x[g == "Other"]; x1 <- x[g == "Severe/Fatal"]
  x0 <- x0[is.finite(x0)]; x1 <- x1[is.finite(x1)]
  if (length(x0) < 2 || length(x1) < 2) return(NA_real_)
  s0 <- sd(x0); s1 <- sd(x1)
  sp <- sqrt(((length(x0)-1)*s0^2 + (length(x1)-1)*s1^2) / (length(x0)+length(x1)-2))
  if (!is.finite(sp) || sp == 0) return(NA_real_)
  (mean(x1) - mean(x0)) / sp
}

cramers_v <- function(tab, chi2_stat) {
  n <- sum(tab)
  r <- nrow(tab); c <- ncol(tab)
  if (n == 0 || min(r-1, c-1) <= 0) return(NA_real_)
  sqrt(as.numeric(chi2_stat) / (n * min(r-1, c-1)))
}

run_univariate_test <- function(data, var,
                                outcome = "SevereBinary",
                                alpha = 0.05,
                                max_levels = 60,
                                chisq_B = 2000) {
  if (!all(c(var, outcome) %in% names(data))) return(NULL)

  df <- data %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c(var, outcome))) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[outcome]]))

  df[[outcome]] <- factor(df[[outcome]], levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"))
  df <- df %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[outcome]]))

  x <- df[[var]]

  if (is.numeric(x) || is.integer(x)) {
    ux <- unique(x[is.finite(x)])
    if (length(ux) <= 2) x <- as.factor(x)
  }

  if (is.numeric(x) || is.integer(x)) {
    df2 <- df %>% mutate(x = as.numeric(.data[[var]])) %>% filter(is.finite(x))
    if (nrow(df2) < 10) return(tibble(
      variable = var, type = "numeric", n_used = nrow(df2),
      test = "SKIP (too few non-missing)", statistic = NA_real_,
      p_value = NA_real_, effect = NA_real_, effect_label = NA_character_
    ))

    df2$g <- df2[[outcome]]

    tt_welch <- tryCatch(t.test(x ~ g, data = df2, var.equal = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
    tt_student <- tryCatch(t.test(x ~ g, data = df2, var.equal = TRUE), error = function(e) NULL)
    wt <- tryCatch(wilcox.test(x ~ g, data = df2, exact = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)

    m_other <- mean(df2$x[df2[[outcome]] == "Other"], na.rm = TRUE)
    m_sev   <- mean(df2$x[df2[[outcome]] == "Severe/Fatal"], na.rm = TRUE)
    d <- cohen_d(df2$x, df2[[outcome]])

    tibble(
      variable = var,
      type = "numeric",
      n_used = nrow(df2),
      test = "t-test (Welch) + t-test (Student) + Wilcoxon",
      statistic = if (!is.null(tt_welch)) unname(tt_welch$statistic) else NA_real_,
      p_value = if (!is.null(tt_welch)) tt_welch$p.value else NA_real_,
      p_value_student = if (!is.null(tt_student)) tt_student$p.value else NA_real_,
      p_value_wilcox  = if (!is.null(wt)) wt$p.value else NA_real_,
      mean_other = m_other,
      mean_severe = m_sev,
      mean_diff = m_sev - m_other,
      effect = d,
      effect_label = "Cohen_d (Severe - Other)"
    )
  }

  x <- as.character(x)
  x[x == ""] <- NA_character_
  df2 <- df %>% mutate(x = x) %>% filter(!is.na(x))

  if (nrow(df2) < 10) return(tibble(
    variable = var, type = "categorical", n_used = nrow(df2),
    test = "SKIP (too few non-missing)", statistic = NA_real_,
    p_value = NA_real_, effect = NA_real_, effect_label = NA_character_
  ))

  k <- length(unique(df2$x))
  if (k > max_levels) {
    return(tibble(
      variable = var, type = "categorical", n_used = nrow(df2),
      test = paste0("SKIP (high cardinality: ", k, " levels > ", max_levels, ")"),
      statistic = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_, effect = NA_real_, effect_label = NA_character_
    ))
  }

  tab <- table(df2$x, df2[[outcome]])

  if (nrow(tab) == 2) {
    x_succ <- tab[, "Severe/Fatal"]
    n_tot  <- rowSums(tab)
    pt <- suppressWarnings(prop.test(x = x_succ, n = n_tot, correct = FALSE))

    p1 <- x_succ[1] / n_tot[1]
    p2 <- x_succ[2] / n_tot[2]
    diff <- p1 - p2
    v <- cramers_v(tab, pt$statistic)

    tibble(
      variable = var,
      type = "categorical (2 levels)",
      n_used = sum(tab),
      test = "Two-proportion test (prop.test) (≈ Z-test) + 2x2 chi-square equivalent",
      statistic = unname(pt$statistic),
      p_value = pt$p.value,
      level1 = rownames(tab)[1],
      level2 = rownames(tab)[2],
      p_severe_level1 = p1,
      p_severe_level2 = p2,
      risk_diff = diff,
      effect = v,
      effect_label = "CramersV (2x2)"
    )
  } else {
    cs <- suppressWarnings(chisq.test(tab))
    use_sim <- any(cs$expected < 5)
    cs2 <- if (use_sim) suppressWarnings(chisq.test(tab, simulate.p.value = TRUE, B = chisq_B)) else cs
    v <- cramers_v(tab, cs2$statistic)

    tibble(
      variable = var,
      type = paste0("categorical (", nrow(tab), " levels)"),
      n_used = sum(tab),
      test = if (use_sim) paste0("Chi-square independence (sim p, B=", chisq_B, ")") else "Chi-square independence",
      statistic = unname(cs2$statistic),
      p_value = cs2$p.value,
      df = unname(cs2$parameter),
      effect = v,
      effect_label = "CramersV"
    )
  }
}

run_univariate_suite <- function(data, vars, outcome = "SevereBinary") {
  res <- purrr::map_dfr(vars, ~ run_univariate_test(data, .x, outcome = outcome))
  if (nrow(res) == 0) return(res)
  res %>%
    mutate(p_adj_fdr = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
    arrange(p_adj_fdr, p_value)
}
```

# UNIVARIATE TEST BATTERY: Selected features + (optional) all candidate predictors
```{r}
if (!exists("switrs_reduced")) stop("switrs_reduced not found. Run cleaning/feature engineering first.")
if (!("SevereBinary" %in% names(switrs_reduced))) stop("SevereBinary not found in switrs_reduced.")

if (exists("selected_vars") && "base_var" %in% names(selected_vars)) {
  selected_base_vars <- unique(selected_vars$base_var)
} else if (exists("train_set")) {
  selected_base_vars <- setdiff(names(train_set), c("SevereBinary"))
} else {
  stop("Neither selected_vars nor train_set exists. Run glmnet feature selection or baseline modeling first.")
}

selected_base_vars <- unique(selected_base_vars)
selected_base_vars <- setdiff(selected_base_vars, c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary"))

if (exists("leakage_vars")) {
  selected_base_vars <- setdiff(selected_base_vars, leakage_vars)
}

selected_base_vars <- selected_base_vars[!grepl("_miss$", selected_base_vars)]
selected_base_vars <- intersect(selected_base_vars, names(switrs_reduced))

cat("Selected base variables to test:", length(selected_base_vars), "\n")
print(selected_base_vars)

tests_selected <- run_univariate_suite(
  switrs_reduced,
  selected_base_vars,
  outcome = "SevereBinary"
)

cat("\nTop 30 (FDR-adjusted) significant selected variables:\n")
print(head(tests_selected, 30))

if (exists("candidate_predictors")) {
  all_vars <- unique(candidate_predictors)
  all_vars <- setdiff(all_vars, c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary"))

  if (exists("leakage_vars")) {
    all_vars <- setdiff(all_vars, leakage_vars)
  }

  all_vars <- all_vars[!grepl("_miss$", all_vars)]
  all_vars <- intersect(all_vars, names(switrs_reduced))

  cat("\nAll candidate variables to test:", length(all_vars), "\n")
  print(all_vars)

  tests_all <- run_univariate_suite(
    switrs_reduced,
    all_vars,
    outcome = "SevereBinary"
  )

  cat("\nTop 30 (FDR-adjusted) significant variables among ALL candidates:\n")
  print(head(tests_all, 30))
} else {
  cat("\nSkipping ALL-variable tests: candidate_predictors not found (run baseline modeling chunk first).\n")
}
```

# Re-run tests after removing "Not Stated" categories (sensitivity check)
```{r}
if (!exists("selected_base_vars")) {
  stop("selected_base_vars not found. Run the univariate test battery chunk first.")
}

switrs_noNS <- switrs_reduced %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(where(is.character), ~ dplyr::na_if(.x, "Not Stated"))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(where(is.factor), ~ {
      x <- as.character(.x)
      x[x == "Not Stated"] <- NA_character_
      factor(x)
    })
  )

tests_selected_noNS <- run_univariate_suite(
  switrs_noNS,
  selected_base_vars,
  outcome = "SevereBinary"
)

cat("\nTop 30 selected vars (NO Not Stated, FDR-adjusted):\n")
print(head(tests_selected_noNS, 30))
```

# Print contingency tables for top categorical predictors (by FDR)
```{r}
print_top_tables <- function(test_tbl, data, top_k = 8) {
  if (is.null(test_tbl) || nrow(test_tbl) == 0) {
    cat("No test results available to print.\n")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  top_vars <- test_tbl %>%
    dplyr::filter(grepl("^categorical", type)) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(p_adj_fdr) %>%
    dplyr::pull(variable) %>%
    unique()

  top_vars <- intersect(top_vars, names(data))
  top_vars <- head(top_vars, top_k)

  if (length(top_vars) == 0) {
    cat("No categorical variables available for contingency-table printing.\n")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  for (v in top_vars) {
    cat("\n=============================\n")
    cat("Contingency table for:", v, "\n")
    cat("=============================\n")

    tab <- table(
      normalize_not_stated(data[[v]], blank_to_notstated = TRUE),
      data$SevereBinary,
      useNA = "no"
    )

    if (exists("legend_maps") && exists("lookup_meaning") && v %in% names(legend_maps)) {
      rn <- rownames(tab)
      rownames(tab) <- lookup_meaning(rn, legend_maps[[v]])
    }

    print(addmargins(tab))
  }

  invisible(top_vars)
}

if (exists("tests_selected") && nrow(tests_selected) > 0) {
  print_top_tables(tests_selected, switrs_reduced, top_k = 8)
} else {
  cat("tests_selected not found or empty.\n")
}
```

# TARGETED SCENARIO MODEL: interaction-focused policy model
```{r}
set.seed(544)

targeted_scenario_glm_name <- "Targeted Scenario GLM"
if (!exists("leakage_vars")) leakage_vars <- character(0)

scenario_predictors <- unique(intersect(
  c(
    "day_group",
    "night",
    "is_ped",
    "INTERSECTION",
    "STATE_HWY_IND",
    "lighting_group",
    "pcf_dui",
    "pcf_speed",
    "is_rain",
    "friday_night",
    "ped_dark",
    "rain_speed",
    "intersection_ped",
    "highway_night",
    "night_dui"
  ),
  names(switrs_model_ready)
))

scenario_predictors <- setdiff(scenario_predictors, leakage_vars)

cat(targeted_scenario_glm_name, "predictors:\n")
print(scenario_predictors)

if (!exists("train_data") || !exists("test_data")) {
  stop("train_data/test_data not found. Run shared_imputation and shared_train_test_split first.")
}
if (!exists("expand_predictors_with_miss")) {
  stop("expand_predictors_with_miss() not found. Run the shared_imputation chunk first.")
}

scenario_predictors_final <- expand_predictors_with_miss(train_data, scenario_predictors)

train_scen_raw <- train_data %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", scenario_predictors_final)))

test_scen_raw <- test_data %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", scenario_predictors_final)))

cat(targeted_scenario_glm_name, "raw split sizes: Train =", nrow(train_scen_raw), "| Test =", nrow(test_scen_raw), "\n")

is_constant_scen <- sapply(train_scen_raw %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID, -SevereBinary), function(x) {
  ux <- unique(x)
  ux <- ux[!is.na(ux)]
  length(ux) <= 1
})

if (any(is_constant_scen)) {
  cat("Dropping", targeted_scenario_glm_name, "train-constant predictors:\n")
  print(names(is_constant_scen)[is_constant_scen])

  keep_cols_scen <- c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", names(is_constant_scen)[!is_constant_scen])
  train_scen_raw <- train_scen_raw %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep_cols_scen))
  test_scen_raw  <- test_scen_raw  %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep_cols_scen))
}

if (!exists("is_perfect_separator")) {
  is_perfect_separator <- function(x, y, min_level_n = 30) {
    if (is.character(x) || is.factor(x)) {
      tab <- table(x, y, useNA = "no")
      lvl_n <- rowSums(tab)
      tab2 <- tab[lvl_n >= min_level_n, , drop = FALSE]
      if (nrow(tab2) == 0) return(FALSE)
      any(tab2[, "Other"] == 0 | tab2[, "Severe/Fatal"] == 0)
    } else if (is.numeric(x) || is.integer(x)) {
      ux <- sort(unique(x))
      ux <- ux[!is.na(ux)]
      if (length(ux) <= 1) return(FALSE)
      qs <- unique(stats::quantile(x, probs = seq(0.1, 0.9, by = 0.1), na.rm = TRUE))
      qs <- qs[!is.na(qs)]
      for (cut in qs) {
        left  <- y[x <= cut]
        right <- y[x >  cut]
        if (length(left) >= min_level_n && length(right) >= min_level_n) {
          if (all(left == "Other") || all(left == "Severe/Fatal") ||
              all(right == "Other") || all(right == "Severe/Fatal")) {
            return(TRUE)
          }
        }
      }
      FALSE
    } else {
      FALSE
    }
  }
}

y_train_scen <- train_scen_raw$SevereBinary
pred_names_scen <- setdiff(names(train_scen_raw), c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary"))

sep_flags_scen <- sapply(pred_names_scen, function(v) {
  is_perfect_separator(train_scen_raw[[v]], y_train_scen)
})
bad_vars_scen <- names(sep_flags_scen)[sep_flags_scen]

cat(targeted_scenario_glm_name, "predictors dropped for practical separation:", length(bad_vars_scen), "\n")
if (length(bad_vars_scen) > 0) print(bad_vars_scen)

if (length(bad_vars_scen) > 0) {
  train_scen_raw <- train_scen_raw %>% dplyr::select(-dplyr::all_of(bad_vars_scen))
  test_scen_raw  <- test_scen_raw  %>% dplyr::select(-dplyr::all_of(bad_vars_scen))
}

train_scen <- train_scen_raw %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID)
test_scen  <- test_scen_raw  %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID)

cat("\nFinal", targeted_scenario_glm_name, "columns:\n")
print(names(train_scen))
cat(targeted_scenario_glm_name, "final split sizes: Train =", nrow(train_scen), "| Test =", nrow(test_scen), "\n")

targeted_scenario_glm_fit <- glm(
  SevereBinary ~ .,
  data = train_scen,
  family = binomial(),
  control = glm.control(maxit = 50)
)

glm_scenario <- targeted_scenario_glm_fit

cat(targeted_scenario_glm_name, "converged? ", targeted_scenario_glm_fit$converged, "\n", sep = "")

targeted_scenario_test_phat <- predict(targeted_scenario_glm_fit, newdata = test_scen, type = "response")
test_phat_scen <- targeted_scenario_test_phat
test_y_scen <- test_scen$SevereBinary

if (!requireNamespace("pROC", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("pROC")
roc_obj <- pROC::roc(test_y_scen, targeted_scenario_test_phat, levels = c("Other","Severe/Fatal"), quiet = TRUE)

cat(targeted_scenario_glm_name, "TEST AUC:", round(pROC::auc(roc_obj), 4), "\n")

pred_05_scen <- factor(ifelse(targeted_scenario_test_phat >= 0.5, "Severe/Fatal", "Other"), levels = levels(test_y_scen))
cat("\n", targeted_scenario_glm_name, "confusion matrix (0.50 cutoff):\n", sep = "")
print(table(Pred = pred_05_scen, Truth = test_y_scen))

prev_scen <- mean(train_scen$SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal")
pred_prev_scen <- factor(ifelse(targeted_scenario_test_phat >= prev_scen, "Severe/Fatal", "Other"), levels = levels(test_y_scen))
cat("\n", targeted_scenario_glm_name, "confusion matrix (prevalence cutoff):\n", sep = "")
print(table(Pred = pred_prev_scen, Truth = test_y_scen))

coefs <- summary(targeted_scenario_glm_fit)$coefficients

or_tbl_scen <- data.frame(
  term = rownames(coefs),
  estimate = coefs[, "Estimate"],
  std.error = coefs[, "Std. Error"],
  p.value = coefs[, "Pr(>|z|)"],
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>%
  dplyr::filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    OR = exp(estimate),
    conf.low = exp(estimate - 1.96 * std.error),
    conf.high = exp(estimate + 1.96 * std.error)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(estimate)))

cat("\nTop", targeted_scenario_glm_name, "odds ratios:\n")
print(head(or_tbl_scen, 15))
```

# Day-specific odds-ratio graphs: Night x DUI and Pedestrian involvement
```{r day_specific_or_nightdui_ped, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
set.seed(544)

if (!exists("train_data")) {
  stop("train_data not found. Run shared_train_test_split first.")
}

required_vars <- c("SevereBinary", "DAY_OF_WEEK", "night_dui", "is_ped")
missing_vars <- setdiff(required_vars, names(train_data))
if (length(missing_vars) > 0) {
  stop("Missing required columns in train_data: ", paste(missing_vars, collapse = ", "))
}

day_levels_model <- c("Tuesday", "Monday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday", "Saturday", "Sunday")
day_levels_plot  <- c("Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday", "Saturday", "Sunday")

or_day_df <- train_data %>%
  dplyr::select(SevereBinary, DAY_OF_WEEK, night_dui, is_ped) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    SevereBinary = factor(SevereBinary, levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal")),
    DAY_OF_WEEK = as.character(DAY_OF_WEEK),
    DAY_OF_WEEK = dplyr::na_if(DAY_OF_WEEK, "Not Stated"),
    DAY_OF_WEEK = factor(DAY_OF_WEEK, levels = day_levels_model),
    night_dui = factor(as.character(night_dui), levels = c("No", "Yes")),
    is_ped    = factor(as.character(is_ped), levels = c("No", "Yes"))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(SevereBinary),
    !is.na(DAY_OF_WEEK),
    !is.na(night_dui),
    !is.na(is_ped)
  )

fit_night_dui_day <- glm(
  SevereBinary ~ DAY_OF_WEEK * night_dui,
  data = or_day_df,
  family = binomial(),
  control = glm.control(maxit = 50)
)

fit_ped_day <- glm(
  SevereBinary ~ DAY_OF_WEEK * is_ped,
  data = or_day_df,
  family = binomial(),
  control = glm.control(maxit = 50)
)

find_interaction_term <- function(coef_names, day_var, day_name, exposure_var, exposure_level = "Yes") {
  cand1 <- paste0(day_var, day_name, ":", exposure_var, exposure_level)
  cand2 <- paste0(exposure_var, exposure_level, ":", day_var, day_name)

  if (cand1 %in% coef_names) return(cand1)
  if (cand2 %in% coef_names) return(cand2)
  NA_character_
}

extract_day_specific_or <- function(fit, exposure_var,
                                    day_var = "DAY_OF_WEEK",
                                    ref_day = "Tuesday",
                                    day_levels_plot = c("Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday", "Saturday", "Sunday"),
                                    exposure_level = "Yes",
                                    label_text = exposure_var) {
  beta <- stats::coef(fit)
  V <- stats::vcov(fit)
  coef_names <- names(beta)

  main_term <- paste0(exposure_var, exposure_level)
  if (!(main_term %in% coef_names)) {
    stop("Main effect term not found in model coefficients: ", main_term)
  }

  out <- lapply(day_levels_plot, function(d) {
    L <- rep(0, length(beta))
    names(L) <- coef_names

    L[main_term] <- 1

    if (d != ref_day) {
      int_term <- find_interaction_term(coef_names, day_var, d, exposure_var, exposure_level)
      if (!is.na(int_term)) L[int_term] <- 1
    }

    est <- sum(L * beta)
    se  <- sqrt(as.numeric(t(L) %*% V %*% L))

    data.frame(
      day = d,
      term = label_text,
      log_or = est,
      OR = exp(est),
      conf.low = exp(est - 1.96 * se),
      conf.high = exp(est + 1.96 * se),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  })

  dplyr::bind_rows(out)
}

night_dui_day_or <- extract_day_specific_or(
  fit = fit_night_dui_day,
  exposure_var = "night_dui",
  label_text = "Night x DUI (Yes vs No)"
)

ped_day_or <- extract_day_specific_or(
  fit = fit_ped_day,
  exposure_var = "is_ped",
  label_text = "Pedestrian involved (Yes vs No)"
)

day_or_plot_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(night_dui_day_or, ped_day_or) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    day = factor(day, levels = day_levels_plot),
    term = factor(term, levels = c("Night x DUI (Yes vs No)", "Pedestrian involved (Yes vs No)"))
  )

cat("Day-specific ORs for Night x DUI:\n")
print(night_dui_day_or)

cat("\nDay-specific ORs for Pedestrian involvement:\n")
print(ped_day_or)

ggplot(day_or_plot_tbl, aes(x = day, y = OR)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), width = 0.15, color = "#1B5E20") +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "#1B5E20") +
  facet_wrap(~ term, ncol = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Day-Specific Odds Ratios for Severe/Fatal Crash",
    subtitle = "Reference day = Tuesday; points above 1 indicate higher odds",
    x = "Day of Week",
    y = "Odds Ratio"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```

# Targeted subgroup extension model
```{r subgroup_extension_model, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
baseline_glm_name <- "Baseline GLM"
subgroup_extension_glm_name <- "Baseline GLM + Subgroup Extension"

if (!exists("leakage_vars")) leakage_vars <- character(0)
if (!exists("switrs_model_ready")) stop("switrs_model_ready not found.")
if (!exists("candidate_predictors")) stop("candidate_predictors not found. Run the Baseline GLM chunk first.")
if (!exists("train_data") || !exists("test_data")) stop("train_data/test_data not found. Run shared_imputation and shared_train_test_split first.")
if (!exists("expand_predictors_with_miss")) stop("expand_predictors_with_miss() not found. Run the shared_imputation chunk first.")
if (!exists("is_perfect_separator")) stop("is_perfect_separator() not found. Run the Baseline GLM chunk first.")

subgroup_addons <- intersect(c("intersection_ped", "highway_night"), names(switrs_model_ready))
if (length(subgroup_addons) == 0) stop("Neither intersection_ped nor highway_night is available in switrs_model_ready.")

candidate_predictors_subgroup <- unique(c(candidate_predictors, subgroup_addons))
candidate_predictors_subgroup <- setdiff(candidate_predictors_subgroup, leakage_vars)

cat(subgroup_extension_glm_name, "predictors added:\n")
print(subgroup_addons)

subgroup_predictors_final <- expand_predictors_with_miss(train_data, candidate_predictors_subgroup)

train_set_sub_raw <- train_data %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", subgroup_predictors_final)))

test_set_sub_raw <- test_data %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", subgroup_predictors_final)))

is_constant_sub <- sapply(train_set_sub_raw %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID, -SevereBinary), function(x) {
  ux <- unique(x)
  ux <- ux[!is.na(ux)]
  length(ux) <= 1
})

if (any(is_constant_sub)) {
  cat("Dropping", subgroup_extension_glm_name, "train-constant predictors:\n")
  print(names(is_constant_sub)[is_constant_sub])

  keep_cols_sub <- c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", names(is_constant_sub)[!is_constant_sub])
  train_set_sub_raw <- train_set_sub_raw %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep_cols_sub))
  test_set_sub_raw  <- test_set_sub_raw  %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep_cols_sub))
}

y_train_sub <- train_set_sub_raw$SevereBinary
pred_names_sub <- setdiff(names(train_set_sub_raw), c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary"))

sep_flags_sub <- sapply(pred_names_sub, function(v) {
  is_perfect_separator(train_set_sub_raw[[v]], y_train_sub)
})
bad_vars_sub <- names(sep_flags_sub)[sep_flags_sub]

cat(subgroup_extension_glm_name, "predictors dropped for practical separation:", length(bad_vars_sub), "\n")
if (length(bad_vars_sub) > 0) print(bad_vars_sub)

if (length(bad_vars_sub) > 0) {
  train_set_sub_raw <- train_set_sub_raw %>% dplyr::select(-dplyr::all_of(bad_vars_sub))
  test_set_sub_raw  <- test_set_sub_raw  %>% dplyr::select(-dplyr::all_of(bad_vars_sub))
}

train_set_sub <- train_set_sub_raw %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID)
test_set_sub  <- test_set_sub_raw  %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID)

subgroup_extension_glm_fit <- glm(
  SevereBinary ~ .,
  data = train_set_sub,
  family = binomial(),
  control = glm.control(maxit = 50)
)

glm_fit_subgroup <- subgroup_extension_glm_fit

cat(subgroup_extension_glm_name, "converged? ", subgroup_extension_glm_fit$converged, "\n", sep = "")

subgroup_extension_test_phat <- as.numeric(
  predict(subgroup_extension_glm_fit, newdata = test_set_sub, type = "response")
)
test_phat_subgroup <- subgroup_extension_test_phat
test_y_subgroup <- test_set_sub$SevereBinary

if (!requireNamespace("pROC", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("pROC")

auc_subgroup <- NA_real_
auc_baseline_now <- NA_real_

if (requireNamespace("pROC", quietly = TRUE)) {
  auc_subgroup <- as.numeric(
    pROC::auc(
      pROC::roc(test_y_subgroup, subgroup_extension_test_phat,
                levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"), quiet = TRUE)
    )
  )

  if (exists("test_set") && exists("test_phat")) {
    auc_baseline_now <- as.numeric(
      pROC::auc(
        pROC::roc(test_set$SevereBinary, test_phat,
                  levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"), quiet = TRUE)
      )
    )
  }
}

metric_at_cutoff_local <- function(y_factor, p, cutoff) {
  y01 <- as.integer(y_factor == "Severe/Fatal")
  pred <- as.integer(p >= cutoff)

  tp <- sum(pred == 1 & y01 == 1)
  tn <- sum(pred == 0 & y01 == 0)
  fp <- sum(pred == 1 & y01 == 0)
  fn <- sum(pred == 0 & y01 == 1)

  data.frame(
    cutoff = cutoff,
    sensitivity = ifelse(tp + fn > 0, tp / (tp + fn), NA_real_),
    specificity = ifelse(tn + fp > 0, tn / (tn + fp), NA_real_),
    precision = ifelse(tp + fp > 0, tp / (tp + fp), NA_real_),
    accuracy = (tp + tn) / (tp + tn + fp + fn)
  )
}

prev_sub <- mean(train_set_sub$SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal")

subgroup_metrics_05   <- metric_at_cutoff_local(test_y_subgroup, subgroup_extension_test_phat, 0.5)
subgroup_metrics_prev <- metric_at_cutoff_local(test_y_subgroup, subgroup_extension_test_phat, prev_sub)

subgroup_model_compare <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  data.frame(
    model = baseline_glm_name,
    test_auc = auc_baseline_now
  ),
  data.frame(
    model = subgroup_extension_glm_name,
    test_auc = auc_subgroup
  )
)

subgroup_perf_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  cbind(model = subgroup_extension_glm_name, threshold = "0.50", subgroup_metrics_05),
  cbind(model = subgroup_extension_glm_name, threshold = "Prevalence", subgroup_metrics_prev)
)

cat("\nAUC comparison:\n")
print(subgroup_model_compare)

cat("\nSubgroup extension operating-point metrics:\n")
print(subgroup_perf_tbl)

cat("\n", subgroup_extension_glm_name, "confusion matrix (cutoff=0.50):\n", sep = "")
print(table(
  Pred = factor(ifelse(subgroup_extension_test_phat >= 0.5, "Severe/Fatal", "Other"),
                levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal")),
  Truth = test_y_subgroup
))

cat("\n", subgroup_extension_glm_name, "confusion matrix (cutoff=prevalence=", round(prev_sub, 4), "): \n", sep = "")
print(table(
  Pred = factor(ifelse(subgroup_extension_test_phat >= prev_sub, "Severe/Fatal", "Other"),
                levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal")),
  Truth = test_y_subgroup
))
```

# EXECUTIVE SUMMARY (Storyboard-ready text)
```{r exec_summary, results='asis'}
cat("## Executive summary\n\n")

baseline_glm_name <- "Baseline GLM"
lasso_glmnet_name <- "LASSO GLMNET"

auc_glm_val <- NA_real_
auc_glmnet_val <- NA_real_

if (exists("all_model_compare_tbl")) {
  auc_glm_val <- all_model_compare_tbl %>%
    dplyr::filter(model == baseline_glm_name) %>%
    dplyr::slice(1) %>%
    dplyr::pull(test_auc)

  auc_glmnet_val <- all_model_compare_tbl %>%
    dplyr::filter(model == lasso_glmnet_name) %>%
    dplyr::slice(1) %>%
    dplyr::pull(test_auc)
}

weekend_diff_pp <- NA_real_
if ("weekend" %in% names(switrs_reduced)) {
  tmp <- switrs_reduced %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(SevereBinary), !is.na(weekend)) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(weekend) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      p = mean(SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal"),
      n = dplyr::n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  if (all(c("Weekend", "Weekday") %in% as.character(tmp$weekend))) {
    weekend_diff_pp <- 100 * (
      tmp$p[as.character(tmp$weekend) == "Weekend"] -
      tmp$p[as.character(tmp$weekend) == "Weekday"]
    )
  }
}

top_hotspot <- NA_character_
top_hotspot_n <- NA_integer_
top_hotspot_rate <- NA_real_
if (exists("hotspots_policy_priority") && nrow(hotspots_policy_priority) > 0) {
  top_hotspot <- hotspots_policy_priority$location_key[1]
  top_hotspot_n <- hotspots_policy_priority$severe_n[1]
  top_hotspot_rate <- hotspots_policy_priority$severe_per_100[1]
}

top_burden_scenario <- NA_character_
top_burden_scenario_n <- NA_real_
if (exists("top_by_count") && nrow(top_by_count) > 0) {
  top_burden_scenario <- top_by_count$scenario[1]
  top_burden_scenario_n <- top_by_count$severe_n[1]
}

top_risk_scenario <- NA_character_
top_risk_scenario_rate <- NA_real_
if (exists("top_by_rate") && nrow(top_by_rate) > 0) {
  top_risk_scenario <- top_by_rate$scenario[1]
  top_risk_scenario_rate <- top_by_rate$severe_per_100[1]
}

top_timing_cell <- NA_character_
top_timing_cell_n <- NA_real_
if (exists("timing_policy_tbl") && nrow(timing_policy_tbl) > 0) {
  top_timing_cell <- paste(timing_policy_tbl$day_group[1], timing_policy_tbl$time_bucket[1], sep = " | ")
  top_timing_cell_n <- timing_policy_tbl$severe_n[1]
}

interaction_callouts <- NULL
interaction_vars <- intersect(c("night_dui", "rain_speed", "ped_dark"), names(switrs_reduced))

if (length(interaction_vars) > 0) {
  interaction_callouts <- purrr::map_chr(interaction_vars, function(v) {
    df <- switrs_reduced %>%
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(SevereBinary)) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(g = as.character(.data[[v]])) %>%
      dplyr::filter(g %in% c("Yes", "No")) %>%
      dplyr::group_by(g) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(
        rate = 100 * mean(SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal"),
        n = dplyr::n(),
        .groups = "drop"
      )

    yes_row <- df[df$g == "Yes", ]
```
