```{r exec_summary, results='asis'}
    if (nrow(yes_row) == 0) return(NA_character_)

    label <- dplyr::recode(
      v,
      night_dui  = "Night × DUI proxy",
      rain_speed = "Rain × Unsafe speed proxy",
      ped_dark   = "Pedestrian × Dark",
      .default = v
    )

    paste0(
      label, ": ",
      round(yes_row$rate[1], 2), " severe/fatal per 100 crashes",
      " (n=", yes_row$n[1], ")"
    )
  })

  interaction_callouts <- interaction_callouts[!is.na(interaction_callouts)]
}

cat(
  "We analyzed crash-level SWITRS records (one row per CASE_ID) to identify where severe/fatal crashes are most concentrated and under what conditions crash severity is highest.\n\n"
)

cat(
  "A key policy distinction in this notebook is between **burden** and **risk**. ",
  "Burden refers to how many severe/fatal crashes or deaths occur in a location or scenario, ",
  "while risk refers to the severe/fatal rate within that location or scenario. ",
  "Because the client’s goal is to save the most lives with limited resources, final recommendations prioritize **high-burden targets first**, then use **rate** to refine which of those targets are especially dangerous.\n\n",
  sep = ""
)

if (!is.na(top_hotspot)) {
  cat(
    "- **Top policy-priority hotspot:** **",
    top_hotspot, "** with **", top_hotspot_n,
    "** severe/fatal crashes and a rate of **", round(top_hotspot_rate, 2),
    "** severe/fatal crashes per 100 crashes.\n",
    sep = ""
  )
}

if (!is.na(top_burden_scenario)) {
  cat(
    "- **Highest-burden scenario:** **",
    top_burden_scenario, "** with **", top_burden_scenario_n,
    "** severe/fatal crashes.\n",
    sep = ""
  )
}

if (!is.na(top_risk_scenario)) {
  cat(
    "- **Highest-risk scenario:** **",
    top_risk_scenario, "** at **", round(top_risk_scenario_rate, 2),
    "** severe/fatal crashes per 100 crashes.\n",
    sep = ""
  )
}

if (!is.na(top_timing_cell)) {
  cat(
    "- **Highest-priority timing cell:** **",
    top_timing_cell, "** with **", top_timing_cell_n,
    "** severe/fatal crashes after applying burden + rate screening.\n",
    sep = ""
  )
}

if (!is.na(weekend_diff_pp)) {
  cat(
    "- **Weekend effect:** The severe/fatal crash rate was about **",
    round(weekend_diff_pp, 2),
    " percentage points** higher on weekends than weekdays.\n",
    sep = ""
  )
}

if (!is.null(interaction_callouts) && length(interaction_callouts) > 0) {
  cat("\n**Compound risk conditions:**\n")
  for (s in interaction_callouts) {
    cat("- ", s, "\n", sep = "")
  }
}

cat("\n")

cat(
  "**Predictive validation:** ",
  baseline_glm_name, " achieved a test AUC of approximately ",
  ifelse(is.na(auc_glm_val), "N/A", format(round(auc_glm_val, 3), nsmall = 3)),
  ", while ", lasso_glmnet_name, " achieved a test AUC of approximately ",
  ifelse(is.na(auc_glmnet_val), "N/A", format(round(auc_glmnet_val, 3), nsmall = 3)),
  ".\n\n",
  sep = ""
)

cat("### Recommended actions\n")
cat("- **Deploy resources first at high-burden hotspots** where the largest number of severe/fatal crashes is occurring.\n")
cat("- **Within those high-burden targets, prioritize the high-rate subset** to focus on places and conditions that are both common and unusually dangerous.\n")
cat("- **Use the day/time burden tables** to decide when targeted enforcement or visibility interventions should occur.\n")
cat("- **Prioritize compound-risk conditions** such as night × DUI, rain × unsafe speed, and pedestrian × dark when designing prevention strategies.\n")
```

# model diagnostics: class imbalance and missingness
```{r}
md <- NULL

if (exists("switrs_model_ready")) {
  md <- switrs_model_ready
} else if (exists("model_df_clean2")) {
  md <- model_df_clean2
} else if (exists("model_df_clean")) {
  md <- model_df_clean
} else {
  stop("No modeling frame found. Run shared_imputation or the baseline modeling chunk first.")
}

if (!("SevereBinary" %in% names(md))) {
  stop("SevereBinary not found in the selected modeling frame.")
}

cat("Class balance (modeling frame):\n")
print(table(md$SevereBinary, useNA = "ifany"))

cat("\nRemaining NA% by column:\n")
remaining_na <- sort(colMeans(is.na(md)) * 100, decreasing = TRUE)
print(head(remaining_na, 20))
```

# next-step hooks (merged data expansion)
```{r}
pattern <- "PARTY_|DRIVER|VEH|SOBRIETY|DRUG|SAFETY|EQUIP|AT_FAULT|AGE|SEX|VIOL"

cands <- names(switrs_reduced)[
  grepl(pattern, names(switrs_reduced), ignore.case = TRUE)
]

# Remove obvious leakage / post-outcome variables
leak_like <- grepl("KILLED|FATAL|INJUR|SEVER|KSI|COUNT_", cands, ignore.case = TRUE)
cands <- cands[!leak_like]

# Remove variables already banned from predictors
if (exists("leakage_vars")) {
  cands <- setdiff(cands, leakage_vars)
}

# Remove variables already used in the baseline model if that object exists
if (exists("candidate_predictors")) {
  cands <- setdiff(cands, candidate_predictors)
}

cands <- sort(unique(cands))

cat("Candidate merged-only predictors to consider next (non-leakage, not already in baseline model):\n")
print(head(cands, 50))
```

# Undersampling 1-1 split from training data
```{r undersample_shared, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
if (!exists("train_data") || !exists("test_data")) {
  stop("train_data/test_data not found. Run shared_train_test_split first.")
}

if (!("SevereBinary" %in% names(train_data))) {
  stop("SevereBinary not found in train_data.")
}

undersample_1to1 <- function(data, outcome = "SevereBinary", seed = 544) {
  set.seed(seed)

  df <- data %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[outcome]]))

  class_counts <- table(df[[outcome]])
  if (length(class_counts) != 2) {
    stop("Outcome must have exactly 2 non-missing classes for 1:1 undersampling.")
  }

  target_n <- min(class_counts)

  df_bal <- df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data[[outcome]]) %>%
    dplyr::slice_sample(n = target_n, replace = FALSE) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

  df_bal[[outcome]] <- factor(df_bal[[outcome]], levels = levels(data[[outcome]]))
  df_bal
}

align_factor_levels_to_train <- function(train_df, test_df,
                                         outcome = "SevereBinary",
                                         id_col = "CASE_ID") {
  common_cols <- intersect(names(train_df), names(test_df))
  pred_cols <- setdiff(common_cols, c(outcome, id_col))

  for (v in pred_cols) {
    is_cat <- is.factor(train_df[[v]]) || is.character(train_df[[v]]) ||
      is.factor(test_df[[v]]) || is.character(test_df[[v]])

    if (!is_cat) next

    train_chr <- as.character(train_df[[v]])
    test_chr  <- as.character(test_df[[v]])

    observed_train_levels <- unique(train_chr[!is.na(train_chr)])
    if (length(observed_train_levels) == 0) next

    fallback_level <- if ("Not Stated" %in% observed_train_levels) {
      "Not Stated"
    } else {
      observed_train_levels[1]
    }

    unseen_in_test <- !is.na(test_chr) & !(test_chr %in% observed_train_levels)
    if (any(unseen_in_test)) {
      test_chr[unseen_in_test] <- fallback_level
    }

    train_df[[v]] <- factor(train_chr, levels = observed_train_levels)
    test_df[[v]]  <- factor(test_chr, levels = observed_train_levels)
  }

  list(train = train_df, test = test_df)
}

is_perfect_separator <- function(x, y, min_level_n = 30) {
  if (is.character(x) || is.factor(x)) {
    tab <- table(x, y, useNA = "no")
    lvl_n <- rowSums(tab)
    tab2 <- tab[lvl_n >= min_level_n, , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(tab2) == 0) return(FALSE)
    any(tab2[, "Other"] == 0 | tab2[, "Severe/Fatal"] == 0)
  } else if (is.numeric(x) || is.integer(x)) {
    ux <- sort(unique(x))
    ux <- ux[!is.na(ux)]
    if (length(ux) <= 1) return(FALSE)

    qs <- unique(stats::quantile(x, probs = seq(0.1, 0.9, by = 0.1), na.rm = TRUE))
    qs <- qs[!is.na(qs)]

    for (cut in qs) {
      left  <- y[x <= cut]
      right <- y[x > cut]

      if (length(left) >= min_level_n && length(right) >= min_level_n) {
        if (all(left == "Other") || all(left == "Severe/Fatal") ||
            all(right == "Other") || all(right == "Severe/Fatal")) {
          return(TRUE)
        }
      }
    }
    FALSE
  } else {
    FALSE
  }
}

binary_metrics <- function(truth, prob, cutoff = 0.5, positive = "Severe/Fatal") {
  truth_chr <- as.character(truth)
  truth01 <- as.integer(truth_chr == positive)
  pred01  <- as.integer(prob >= cutoff)

  tp <- sum(pred01 == 1 & truth01 == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  tn <- sum(pred01 == 0 & truth01 == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  fp <- sum(pred01 == 1 & truth01 == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  fn <- sum(pred01 == 0 & truth01 == 1, na.rm = TRUE)

  data.frame(
    cutoff = cutoff,
    sensitivity = ifelse(tp + fn > 0, tp / (tp + fn), NA_real_),
    specificity = ifelse(tn + fp > 0, tn / (tn + fp), NA_real_),
    precision   = ifelse(tp + fp > 0, tp / (tp + fp), NA_real_),
    accuracy    = ifelse(tp + tn + fp + fn > 0, (tp + tn) / (tp + tn + fp + fn), NA_real_)
  )
}

train_data_under <- undersample_1to1(train_data, outcome = "SevereBinary", seed = 544)

cat("Original train class balance:\n")
print(table(train_data$SevereBinary, useNA = "ifany"))

cat("\nUndersampled train class balance (1:1):\n")
print(table(train_data_under$SevereBinary, useNA = "ifany"))

cat("\nTest class balance (unchanged):\n")
print(table(test_data$SevereBinary, useNA = "ifany"))

orig_prev <- mean(train_data$SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal", na.rm = TRUE)
cat("\nOriginal train Severe/Fatal prevalence =", round(orig_prev, 4), "\n")
```

# Baseline GLM with 1:1 undersampling
```{r baseline_glm_undersampled, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
set.seed(544)

baseline_glm_us_name <- "Baseline GLM (Undersampled 1:1)"

if (!exists("train_data_under") || !exists("test_data")) {
  stop("Run the undersample_shared chunk first.")
}
if (!exists("expand_predictors_with_miss")) {
  stop("expand_predictors_with_miss() not found. Run shared_imputation first.")
}
if (!exists("leakage_vars")) leakage_vars <- character(0)

candidate_predictors_us <- intersect(
  c(
    "year",
    "day_group",
    "night",
    "friday_night",
    "weather_group",
    "lighting_group",
    "ROAD_SURFACE",
    "INTERSECTION",
    "STATE_HWY_IND",
    "TYPE_OF_COLLISION",
    "PRIMARY_COLL_FACTOR",
    "school_bus_proxy",
    "pcf_dui",
    "pcf_speed",
    "ALCOHOL_INVOLVED",
    "is_ped",
    "BICYCLE_ACCIDENT",
    "MOTORCYCLE_ACCIDENT",
    "TRUCK_ACCIDENT",
    "night_dui",
    "rain_speed",
    "ped_dark",
    "n_parties",
    "any_party_alcohol",
    "any_party_drug",
    "any_party_at_fault",
    "mean_party_age"
  ),
  names(switrs_model_ready)
)

candidate_predictors_us <- setdiff(candidate_predictors_us, leakage_vars)

forbidden_redundant <- c(
  "DAY_OF_WEEK", "weekend", "time_bucket",
  "WEATHER_1", "is_rain",
  "LIGHTING", "is_dark",
  "PCF_VIOL_CATEGORY",
  "PEDESTRIAN_ACCIDENT"
)

if (length(intersect(candidate_predictors_us, forbidden_redundant)) > 0) {
  stop("Redundant predictors detected in candidate_predictors_us.")
}

baseline_predictors_us_final <- expand_predictors_with_miss(train_data_under, candidate_predictors_us)

train_set_us_raw <- train_data_under %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", baseline_predictors_us_final)))

test_set_us_raw <- test_data %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", baseline_predictors_us_final)))

aligned_us <- align_factor_levels_to_train(train_set_us_raw, test_set_us_raw)
train_set_us_raw <- aligned_us$train
test_set_us_raw  <- aligned_us$test

is_constant_us <- sapply(train_set_us_raw %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID, -SevereBinary), function(x) {
  ux <- unique(x)
  ux <- ux[!is.na(ux)]
  length(ux) <= 1
})

if (any(is_constant_us)) {
  cat("Dropping baseline undersampled train-constant predictors:\n")
  print(names(is_constant_us)[is_constant_us])

  keep_cols_us <- c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", names(is_constant_us)[!is_constant_us])
  train_set_us_raw <- train_set_us_raw %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep_cols_us))
  test_set_us_raw  <- test_set_us_raw  %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep_cols_us))
}

y_train_us <- train_set_us_raw$SevereBinary
pred_names_us <- setdiff(names(train_set_us_raw), c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary"))

sep_flags_us <- sapply(pred_names_us, function(v) {
  is_perfect_separator(train_set_us_raw[[v]], y_train_us)
})

bad_vars_us <- names(sep_flags_us)[sep_flags_us]

cat("Baseline undersampled predictors dropped for practical separation:", length(bad_vars_us), "\n")
if (length(bad_vars_us) > 0) print(bad_vars_us)

if (length(bad_vars_us) > 0) {
  train_set_us_raw <- train_set_us_raw %>% dplyr::select(-dplyr::all_of(bad_vars_us))
  test_set_us_raw  <- test_set_us_raw  %>% dplyr::select(-dplyr::all_of(bad_vars_us))
}

train_set_us <- train_set_us_raw %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID)
test_set_us  <- test_set_us_raw  %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID)

baseline_glm_us_fit <- glm(
  SevereBinary ~ .,
  data = train_set_us,
  family = binomial(),
  control = glm.control(maxit = 50)
)

baseline_glm_us_test_phat <- as.numeric(
  predict(baseline_glm_us_fit, newdata = test_set_us, type = "response")
)

if (!requireNamespace("pROC", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("pROC")

baseline_glm_us_auc <- NA_real_
if (requireNamespace("pROC", quietly = TRUE)) {
  baseline_glm_us_roc <- pROC::roc(
    test_set_us$SevereBinary,
    baseline_glm_us_test_phat,
    levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"),
    quiet = TRUE
  )
  baseline_glm_us_auc <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(baseline_glm_us_roc))
}

baseline_glm_us_metrics_05 <- binary_metrics(test_set_us$SevereBinary, baseline_glm_us_test_phat, cutoff = 0.50)

cat("\n", baseline_glm_us_name, "converged? ", baseline_glm_us_fit$converged, "\n", sep = "")
cat(baseline_glm_us_name, "TEST AUC:", round(baseline_glm_us_auc, 4), "\n")

cat("\nMetrics at cutoff = 0.50\n")
print(baseline_glm_us_metrics_05)

cat("\nConfusion matrix (cutoff = 0.50):\n")
print(table(
  Pred = factor(ifelse(baseline_glm_us_test_phat >= 0.5, "Severe/Fatal", "Other"),
                levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal")),
  Truth = test_set_us$SevereBinary
))
```

# LASSO GLMNET with 1:1 undersampling
```{r glmnet_model_undersampled, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
lasso_glmnet_us_name <- "LASSO GLMNET (Undersampled 1:1)"

if (!exists("train_set_us") || !exists("test_set_us")) {
  stop("Run baseline_glm_undersampled first.")
}

if (!requireNamespace("glmnet", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("glmnet")
library(glmnet)

train_set_us_glmnet <- train_set_us
test_set_us_glmnet  <- test_set_us

train_set_us_glmnet$.split <- "train"
test_set_us_glmnet$.split  <- "test"

combo_us <- dplyr::bind_rows(train_set_us_glmnet, test_set_us_glmnet)
train_idx_us <- combo_us$.split == "train"
test_idx_us  <- combo_us$.split == "test"

combo_mm_us <- combo_us %>% dplyr::select(-.split)

X_all_us <- model.matrix(SevereBinary ~ ., data = combo_mm_us)[, -1, drop = FALSE]

x_train_us <- X_all_us[train_idx_us, , drop = FALSE]
x_test_us  <- X_all_us[test_idx_us,  , drop = FALSE]

y_train_us_glmnet <- as.integer(combo_us$SevereBinary[train_idx_us] == "Severe/Fatal")
y_test_us_glmnet  <- as.integer(combo_us$SevereBinary[test_idx_us]  == "Severe/Fatal")

set.seed(544)
lasso_glmnet_us_cv_fit <- cv.glmnet(
  x = x_train_us,
  y = y_train_us_glmnet,
  family = "binomial",
  alpha = 1,
  nfolds = 5,
  type.measure = "auc"
)

lasso_glmnet_us_test_phat <- as.numeric(
  predict(lasso_glmnet_us_cv_fit, newx = x_test_us, s = "lambda.1se", type = "response")
)

lasso_glmnet_us_auc <- NA_real_
if (requireNamespace("pROC", quietly = TRUE)) {
  roc_obj_us <- pROC::roc(
    response = y_test_us_glmnet,
    predictor = lasso_glmnet_us_test_phat,
    quiet = TRUE
  )
  lasso_glmnet_us_auc <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj_us))
}

lasso_glmnet_us_metrics_05 <- binary_metrics(
  test_set_us$SevereBinary,
  lasso_glmnet_us_test_phat,
  cutoff = 0.50
)

cat(lasso_glmnet_us_name, "best lambda (min):", lasso_glmnet_us_cv_fit$lambda.min, "\n")
cat(lasso_glmnet_us_name, "1-SE lambda:", lasso_glmnet_us_cv_fit$lambda.1se, "\n")
cat(lasso_glmnet_us_name, "TEST AUC:", round(lasso_glmnet_us_auc, 4), "\n")

cat("\nMetrics at cutoff = 0.50\n")
print(lasso_glmnet_us_metrics_05)

cat("\nConfusion matrix (cutoff = 0.50):\n")
print(table(
  Pred = ifelse(lasso_glmnet_us_test_phat >= 0.5, 1, 0),
  Truth = y_test_us_glmnet
))

coef_mat_us <- as.matrix(coef(lasso_glmnet_us_cv_fit, s = "lambda.1se"))
coef_df_us <- data.frame(
  term = rownames(coef_mat_us),
  coef = as.numeric(coef_mat_us[, 1]),
  row.names = NULL
) %>%
  dplyr::filter(term != "(Intercept)", coef != 0) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(abs(coef)))

cat("\nTop 20 non-zero coefficients by |coef| (undersampled glmnet):\n")
print(head(coef_df_us, 20))
```

# Targeted Scenario GLM with 1:1 undersampling
```{r targeted_scenario_glm_undersampled, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
set.seed(544)

targeted_scenario_glm_us_name <- "Targeted Scenario GLM (Undersampled 1:1)"

if (!exists("leakage_vars")) leakage_vars <- character(0)

scenario_predictors_us <- intersect(
  c(
    "day_group",
    "night",
    "is_ped",
    "INTERSECTION",
    "STATE_HWY_IND",
    "lighting_group",
    "pcf_dui",
    "pcf_speed",
    "is_rain",
    "friday_night",
    "ped_dark",
    "rain_speed",
    "intersection_ped",
    "highway_night",
    "night_dui"
  ),
  names(switrs_model_ready)
)

scenario_predictors_us <- setdiff(scenario_predictors_us, leakage_vars)

scenario_predictors_us_final <- expand_predictors_with_miss(
  train_data_under,
  scenario_predictors_us
)

train_scen_us_raw <- train_data_under %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", scenario_predictors_us_final)))

test_scen_us_raw <- test_data %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", scenario_predictors_us_final)))

aligned_scen_us <- align_factor_levels_to_train(train_scen_us_raw, test_scen_us_raw)
train_scen_us_raw <- aligned_scen_us$train
test_scen_us_raw  <- aligned_scen_us$test

is_constant_scen_us <- sapply(
  train_scen_us_raw %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID, -SevereBinary),
  function(x) {
    ux <- unique(x)
    ux <- ux[!is.na(ux)]
    length(ux) <= 1
  }
)

if (any(is_constant_scen_us)) {
  cat("Dropping targeted-scenario undersampled train-constant predictors:\n")
  print(names(is_constant_scen_us)[is_constant_scen_us])

  keep_cols_scen_us <- c(
    "CASE_ID",
    "SevereBinary",
    names(is_constant_scen_us)[!is_constant_scen_us]
  )
  train_scen_us_raw <- train_scen_us_raw %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep_cols_scen_us))
  test_scen_us_raw  <- test_scen_us_raw  %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep_cols_scen_us))
}

y_train_scen_us <- train_scen_us_raw$SevereBinary
pred_names_scen_us <- setdiff(names(train_scen_us_raw), c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary"))

sep_flags_scen_us <- sapply(pred_names_scen_us, function(v) {
  is_perfect_separator(train_scen_us_raw[[v]], y_train_scen_us)
})

bad_vars_scen_us <- names(sep_flags_scen_us)[sep_flags_scen_us]

cat("Targeted scenario undersampled predictors dropped for practical separation:", length(bad_vars_scen_us), "\n")
if (length(bad_vars_scen_us) > 0) print(bad_vars_scen_us)

if (length(bad_vars_scen_us) > 0) {
  train_scen_us_raw <- train_scen_us_raw %>% dplyr::select(-dplyr::all_of(bad_vars_scen_us))
  test_scen_us_raw  <- test_scen_us_raw  %>% dplyr::select(-dplyr::all_of(bad_vars_scen_us))
}

train_scen_us <- train_scen_us_raw %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID)
test_scen_us  <- test_scen_us_raw  %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID)

targeted_scenario_glm_us_fit <- glm(
  SevereBinary ~ .,
  data = train_scen_us,
  family = binomial(),
  control = glm.control(maxit = 50)
)

targeted_scenario_glm_us_test_phat <- as.numeric(
  predict(targeted_scenario_glm_us_fit, newdata = test_scen_us, type = "response")
)

targeted_scenario_glm_us_auc <- NA_real_
if (requireNamespace("pROC", quietly = TRUE)) {
  roc_obj_scen_us <- pROC::roc(
    test_scen_us$SevereBinary,
    targeted_scenario_glm_us_test_phat,
    levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"),
    quiet = TRUE
  )
  targeted_scenario_glm_us_auc <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj_scen_us))
}

targeted_scenario_glm_us_metrics_05 <- binary_metrics(
  test_scen_us$SevereBinary,
  targeted_scenario_glm_us_test_phat,
  cutoff = 0.50
)

cat("\n", targeted_scenario_glm_us_name, "converged? ", targeted_scenario_glm_us_fit$converged, "\n", sep = "")
cat(targeted_scenario_glm_us_name, "TEST AUC:", round(targeted_scenario_glm_us_auc, 4), "\n")

cat("\nMetrics at cutoff = 0.50\n")
print(targeted_scenario_glm_us_metrics_05)

cat("\nConfusion matrix (cutoff = 0.50):\n")
print(table(
  Pred = factor(ifelse(targeted_scenario_glm_us_test_phat >= 0.5, "Severe/Fatal", "Other"),
                levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal")),
  Truth = test_scen_us$SevereBinary
))
```

# Baseline GLM + Subgroup Extension with 1:1 undersampling
```{r subgroup_extension_glm_undersampled, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
set.seed(544)

subgroup_extension_glm_us_name <- "Baseline GLM + Subgroup Extension (Undersampled 1:1)"

if (!exists("candidate_predictors_us")) {
  stop("Run baseline_glm_undersampled first so candidate_predictors_us is defined.")
}
if (!exists("leakage_vars")) leakage_vars <- character(0)

subgroup_addons_us <- intersect(c("intersection_ped", "highway_night"), names(switrs_model_ready))
if (length(subgroup_addons_us) == 0) {
  stop("Neither intersection_ped nor highway_night is available in switrs_model_ready.")
}

candidate_predictors_sub_us <- unique(c(candidate_predictors_us, subgroup_addons_us))
candidate_predictors_sub_us <- setdiff(candidate_predictors_sub_us, leakage_vars)

subgroup_predictors_us_final <- expand_predictors_with_miss(
  train_data_under,
  candidate_predictors_sub_us
)

train_sub_us_raw <- train_data_under %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", subgroup_predictors_us_final)))

test_sub_us_raw <- test_data %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", subgroup_predictors_us_final)))

aligned_sub_us <- align_factor_levels_to_train(train_sub_us_raw, test_sub_us_raw)
train_sub_us_raw <- aligned_sub_us$train
test_sub_us_raw  <- aligned_sub_us$test

is_constant_sub_us <- sapply(
  train_sub_us_raw %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID, -SevereBinary),
  function(x) {
    ux <- unique(x)
    ux <- ux[!is.na(ux)]
    length(ux) <= 1
  }
)

if (any(is_constant_sub_us)) {
  cat("Dropping subgroup-extension undersampled train-constant predictors:\n")
  print(names(is_constant_sub_us)[is_constant_sub_us])

  keep_cols_sub_us <- c(
    "CASE_ID",
    "SevereBinary",
    names(is_constant_sub_us)[!is_constant_sub_us]
  )
  train_sub_us_raw <- train_sub_us_raw %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep_cols_sub_us))
  test_sub_us_raw  <- test_sub_us_raw  %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep_cols_sub_us))
}

y_train_sub_us <- train_sub_us_raw$SevereBinary
pred_names_sub_us <- setdiff(names(train_sub_us_raw), c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary"))

sep_flags_sub_us <- sapply(pred_names_sub_us, function(v) {
  is_perfect_separator(train_sub_us_raw[[v]], y_train_sub_us)
})

bad_vars_sub_us <- names(sep_flags_sub_us)[sep_flags_sub_us]

cat("Subgroup-extension undersampled predictors dropped for practical separation:", length(bad_vars_sub_us), "\n")
if (length(bad_vars_sub_us) > 0) print(bad_vars_sub_us)

if (length(bad_vars_sub_us) > 0) {
  train_sub_us_raw <- train_sub_us_raw %>% dplyr::select(-dplyr::all_of(bad_vars_sub_us))
  test_sub_us_raw  <- test_sub_us_raw  %>% dplyr::select(-dplyr::all_of(bad_vars_sub_us))
}

train_sub_us <- train_sub_us_raw %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID)
test_sub_us  <- test_sub_us_raw  %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID)

subgroup_extension_glm_us_fit <- glm(
  SevereBinary ~ .,
  data = train_sub_us,
  family = binomial(),
  control = glm.control(maxit = 50)
)

subgroup_extension_glm_us_test_phat <- as.numeric(
  predict(subgroup_extension_glm_us_fit, newdata = test_sub_us, type = "response")
)

subgroup_extension_glm_us_auc <- NA_real_
if (requireNamespace("pROC", quietly = TRUE)) {
  roc_obj_sub_us <- pROC::roc(
    test_sub_us$SevereBinary,
    subgroup_extension_glm_us_test_phat,
    levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"),
    quiet = TRUE
  )
  subgroup_extension_glm_us_auc <- as.numeric(pROC::auc(roc_obj_sub_us))
}

subgroup_extension_glm_us_metrics_05 <- binary_metrics(
  test_sub_us$SevereBinary,
  subgroup_extension_glm_us_test_phat,
  cutoff = 0.50
)

cat("\n", subgroup_extension_glm_us_name, "converged? ", subgroup_extension_glm_us_fit$converged, "\n", sep = "")
cat(subgroup_extension_glm_us_name, "TEST AUC:", round(subgroup_extension_glm_us_auc, 4), "\n")

cat("\nMetrics at cutoff = 0.50\n")
print(subgroup_extension_glm_us_metrics_05)

cat("\nConfusion matrix (cutoff = 0.50):\n")
print(table(
  Pred = factor(ifelse(subgroup_extension_glm_us_test_phat >= 0.5, "Severe/Fatal", "Other"),
                levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal")),
  Truth = test_sub_us$SevereBinary
))
```

# Random Forest: original split + undersampled split
```{r random_forest_models, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
if (!requireNamespace("ranger", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("ranger")
if (!requireNamespace("pROC", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("pROC")

library(ranger)

rf_name    <- "Random Forest"
rf_us_name <- "Random Forest (Undersampled 1:1)"

if (!exists("train_data") || !exists("test_data")) {
  stop("train_data/test_data not found. Run shared_train_test_split first.")
}
if (!exists("train_data_under")) {
  stop("train_data_under not found. Run undersample_shared first.")
}
if (!exists("expand_predictors_with_miss")) {
  stop("expand_predictors_with_miss() not found. Run shared_imputation first.")
}
if (!exists("align_factor_levels_to_train")) {
  stop("align_factor_levels_to_train() not found. Run undersample_shared first.")
}
if (!exists("binary_metrics")) {
  stop("binary_metrics() not found. Run undersample_shared first.")
}
if (!exists("candidate_predictors")) {
  stop("candidate_predictors not found. Run the Baseline GLM chunk first.")
}
if (!exists("leakage_vars")) leakage_vars <- character(0)

# Use same predictor set as baseline GLM for apples-to-apples comparison
rf_predictors <- setdiff(candidate_predictors, leakage_vars)
rf_predictors <- intersect(rf_predictors, names(switrs_model_ready))

build_rf_frames <- function(train_df, test_df, predictors,
                            outcome = "SevereBinary", id_col = "CASE_ID") {

  preds_final <- expand_predictors_with_miss(train_df, predictors)

  train_raw <- train_df %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c(id_col, outcome, preds_final)))

  test_raw <- test_df %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c(id_col, outcome, preds_final)))

  aligned <- align_factor_levels_to_train(train_raw, test_raw,
                                          outcome = outcome, id_col = id_col)

  train_raw <- aligned$train
  test_raw  <- aligned$test

  # Drop train-constant predictors
  is_constant <- sapply(train_raw %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(c(id_col, outcome))), function(x) {
    ux <- unique(x)
    ux <- ux[!is.na(ux)]
    length(ux) <= 1
  })

  if (any(is_constant)) {
    keep_cols <- c(id_col, outcome, names(is_constant)[!is_constant])
    train_raw <- train_raw %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep_cols))
    test_raw  <- test_raw  %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep_cols))
  }

  train_out <- train_raw %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(id_col))
  test_out  <- test_raw  %>% dplyr::select(-all_of(id_col))

  train_out[[outcome]] <- factor(train_out[[outcome]], levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"))
  test_out[[outcome]]  <- factor(test_out[[outcome]],  levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"))

  list(train = train_out, test = test_out)
}

fit_rf_model <- function(train_df, test_df, model_name,
                         outcome = "SevereBinary", seed = 544) {

  p <- ncol(train_df) - 1
  mtry_val <- max(1, floor(sqrt(p)))

  rf_fit <- ranger::ranger(
    formula = stats::as.formula(paste(outcome, "~ .")),
    data = train_df,
    probability = TRUE,
    num.trees = 1000,
    mtry = mtry_val,
    min.node.size = 10,
    importance = "permutation",
    respect.unordered.factors = "order",
    seed = seed
  )

  rf_prob <- predict(rf_fit, data = test_df)$predictions[, "Severe/Fatal"]

  rf_auc <- as.numeric(
    pROC::auc(
      pROC::roc(
        response = test_df[[outcome]],
        predictor = rf_prob,
        levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"),
        quiet = TRUE
      )
    )
  )

  rf_prev_cutoff <- mean(train_df[[outcome]] == "Severe/Fatal")

  metrics_05 <- binary_metrics(test_df[[outcome]], rf_prob, cutoff = 0.50)
  metrics_prev <- binary_metrics(test_df[[outcome]], rf_prob, cutoff = rf_prev_cutoff)

  pred_05 <- factor(
    ifelse(rf_prob >= 0.50, "Severe/Fatal", "Other"),
    levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal")
  )

  pred_prev <- factor(
    ifelse(rf_prob >= rf_prev_cutoff, "Severe/Fatal", "Other"),
    levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal")
  )

  importance_tbl <- data.frame(
    variable = names(rf_fit$variable.importance),
    importance = as.numeric(rf_fit$variable.importance),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(importance))

  cat("\n============================================================\n")
  cat(model_name, "\n")
  cat("============================================================\n")
  cat("Test AUC:", round(rf_auc, 4), "\n")
  cat("Prevalence cutoff from training data:", round(rf_prev_cutoff, 4), "\n")

  cat("\nMetrics at cutoff = 0.50\n")
  print(metrics_05)

  cat("\nMetrics at cutoff = prevalence\n")
  print(metrics_prev)

  cat("\nConfusion matrix (cutoff = 0.50):\n")
  print(table(Pred = pred_05, Truth = test_df[[outcome]]))

  cat("\nConfusion matrix (cutoff = prevalence):\n")
  print(table(Pred = pred_prev, Truth = test_df[[outcome]]))

  cat("\nTop 20 variables by permutation importance:\n")
  print(head(importance_tbl, 20))

  list(
    fit = rf_fit,
    prob = rf_prob,
    auc = rf_auc,
    metrics_05 = metrics_05,
    metrics_prev = metrics_prev,
    importance_tbl = importance_tbl
  )
}

# Original RF
rf_frames <- build_rf_frames(
  train_df = train_data,
  test_df = test_data,
  predictors = rf_predictors
)

rf_result <- fit_rf_model(
  train_df = rf_frames$train,
  test_df = rf_frames$test,
  model_name = rf_name
)

rf_fit <- rf_result$fit
rf_test_phat <- rf_result$prob
rf_auc <- rf_result$auc
rf_importance_tbl <- rf_result$importance_tbl

# Undersampled RF
rf_us_frames <- build_rf_frames(
  train_df = train_data_under,
  test_df = test_data,
  predictors = rf_predictors
)

rf_us_result <- fit_rf_model(
  train_df = rf_us_frames$train,
  test_df = rf_us_frames$test,
  model_name = rf_us_name
)

rf_us_fit <- rf_us_result$fit
rf_us_test_phat <- rf_us_result$prob
rf_us_auc <- rf_us_result$auc
rf_us_importance_tbl <- rf_us_result$importance_tbl

# Side-by-side summary
rf_compare_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  data.frame(
    model = rf_name,
    test_auc = rf_result$auc,
    threshold = "0.50",
    sensitivity = rf_result$metrics_05$sensitivity,
    specificity = rf_result$metrics_05$specificity,
    precision = rf_result$metrics_05$precision,
    accuracy = rf_result$metrics_05$accuracy
  ),
  data.frame(
    model = rf_name,
    test_auc = rf_result$auc,
    threshold = "Prevalence",
    sensitivity = rf_result$metrics_prev$sensitivity,
    specificity = rf_result$metrics_prev$specificity,
    precision = rf_result$metrics_prev$precision,
    accuracy = rf_result$metrics_prev$accuracy
  ),
  data.frame(
    model = rf_us_name,
    test_auc = rf_us_result$auc,
    threshold = "0.50",
    sensitivity = rf_us_result$metrics_05$sensitivity,
    specificity = rf_us_result$metrics_05$specificity,
    precision = rf_us_result$metrics_05$precision,
    accuracy = rf_us_result$metrics_05$accuracy
  ),
  data.frame(
    model = rf_us_name,
    test_auc = rf_us_result$auc,
    threshold = "Prevalence",
    sensitivity = rf_us_result$metrics_prev$sensitivity,
    specificity = rf_us_result$metrics_prev$specificity,
    precision = rf_us_result$metrics_prev$precision,
    accuracy = rf_us_result$metrics_prev$accuracy
  )
)

cat("\n================ RANDOM FOREST COMPARISON ================\n")
print(rf_compare_tbl)
```

# Class-weighted Random Forest on original training split
```{r random_forest_class_weighted, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
if (!requireNamespace("ranger", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("ranger")
if (!requireNamespace("pROC", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("pROC")

library(ranger)

rf_wt_name <- "Random Forest (Class-Weighted)"

if (!exists("train_data") || !exists("test_data")) {
  stop("train_data/test_data not found. Run shared_train_test_split first.")
}
if (!exists("expand_predictors_with_miss")) {
  stop("expand_predictors_with_miss() not found. Run shared_imputation first.")
}
if (!exists("align_factor_levels_to_train")) {
  stop("align_factor_levels_to_train() not found. Run undersample_shared first.")
}
if (!exists("binary_metrics")) {
  stop("binary_metrics() not found. Run undersample_shared first.")
}
if (!exists("candidate_predictors")) {
  stop("candidate_predictors not found. Run the Baseline GLM chunk first.")
}
if (!exists("leakage_vars")) leakage_vars <- character(0)

# Use the same cleaned baseline predictor set for apples-to-apples comparison
rf_predictors_wt <- setdiff(candidate_predictors, leakage_vars)
rf_predictors_wt <- intersect(rf_predictors_wt, names(switrs_model_ready))

rf_predictors_wt_final <- expand_predictors_with_miss(train_data, rf_predictors_wt)

train_rf_wt_raw <- train_data %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", rf_predictors_wt_final)))

test_rf_wt_raw <- test_data %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", rf_predictors_wt_final)))

aligned_rf_wt <- align_factor_levels_to_train(train_rf_wt_raw, test_rf_wt_raw)
train_rf_wt_raw <- aligned_rf_wt$train
test_rf_wt_raw  <- aligned_rf_wt$test

# Drop train-constant predictors
is_constant_rf_wt <- sapply(train_rf_wt_raw %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID, -SevereBinary), function(x) {
  ux <- unique(x)
  ux <- ux[!is.na(ux)]
  length(ux) <= 1
})

if (any(is_constant_rf_wt)) {
  cat("Dropping class-weighted RF train-constant predictors:\n")
  print(names(is_constant_rf_wt)[is_constant_rf_wt])

  keep_cols_rf_wt <- c("CASE_ID", "SevereBinary", names(is_constant_rf_wt)[!is_constant_rf_wt])
  train_rf_wt_raw <- train_rf_wt_raw %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep_cols_rf_wt))
  test_rf_wt_raw  <- test_rf_wt_raw  %>% dplyr::select(all_of(keep_cols_rf_wt))
}

train_rf_wt <- train_rf_wt_raw %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID)
test_rf_wt  <- test_rf_wt_raw  %>% dplyr::select(-CASE_ID)

train_rf_wt$SevereBinary <- factor(train_rf_wt$SevereBinary, levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"))
test_rf_wt$SevereBinary  <- factor(test_rf_wt$SevereBinary,  levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"))

# Weight the minority class more heavily.
# Because levels are c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"), the weights must follow that order.
class_counts <- table(train_rf_wt$SevereBinary)
w_other <- 1
w_severe <- as.numeric(class_counts["Other"] / class_counts["Severe/Fatal"])

rf_class_weights <- c(w_other, w_severe)

cat("Training class counts:\n")
print(class_counts)
cat("\nClass weights used (order = levels(train_rf_wt$SevereBinary)):\n")
print(rf_class_weights)

p_rf_wt <- ncol(train_rf_wt) - 1
mtry_rf_wt <- max(1, floor(sqrt(p_rf_wt)))

set.seed(544)
rf_wt_fit <- ranger::ranger(
  SevereBinary ~ .,
  data = train_rf_wt,
  probability = TRUE,
  num.trees = 1000,
  mtry = mtry_rf_wt,
  min.node.size = 10,
  importance = "permutation",
  respect.unordered.factors = "order",
  class.weights = rf_class_weights,
  seed = 544
)

rf_wt_test_phat <- predict(rf_wt_fit, data = test_rf_wt)$predictions[, "Severe/Fatal"]

rf_wt_auc <- as.numeric(
  pROC::auc(
    pROC::roc(
      response = test_rf_wt$SevereBinary,
      predictor = rf_wt_test_phat,
      levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal"),
      quiet = TRUE
    )
  )
)

prev_rf_wt <- mean(train_rf_wt$SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal")

rf_wt_metrics_05 <- binary_metrics(test_rf_wt$SevereBinary, rf_wt_test_phat, cutoff = 0.50)
rf_wt_metrics_prev <- binary_metrics(test_rf_wt$SevereBinary, rf_wt_test_phat, cutoff = prev_rf_wt)

cat("\n", rf_wt_name, "TEST AUC:", round(rf_wt_auc, 4), "\n", sep = "")

cat("\nMetrics at cutoff = 0.50\n")
print(rf_wt_metrics_05)

cat("\nMetrics at cutoff = prevalence\n")
print(rf_wt_metrics_prev)

cat("\nConfusion matrix (cutoff = 0.50):\n")
print(table(
  Pred = factor(ifelse(rf_wt_test_phat >= 0.5, "Severe/Fatal", "Other"),
                levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal")),
  Truth = test_rf_wt$SevereBinary
))

cat("\nConfusion matrix (cutoff = prevalence):\n")
print(table(
  Pred = factor(ifelse(rf_wt_test_phat >= prev_rf_wt, "Severe/Fatal", "Other"),
                levels = c("Other", "Severe/Fatal")),
  Truth = test_rf_wt$SevereBinary
))

rf_wt_importance_tbl <- data.frame(
  variable = names(rf_wt_fit$variable.importance),
  importance = as.numeric(rf_wt_fit$variable.importance),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(importance))

cat("\nTop 20 variables by permutation importance:\n")
print(head(rf_wt_importance_tbl, 20))
```

# Model Comparison
```{r all_model_compare_original_and_undersampled, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.align='center', out.width='100%'}
if (!requireNamespace("pROC", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("pROC")
if (!requireNamespace("gridExtra", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("gridExtra")

metric_at_cutoff_unified <- function(truth, prob, cutoff, positive = "Severe/Fatal") {
  truth_chr <- if (is.factor(truth) || is.character(truth)) {
    as.character(truth)
  } else {
    as.character(as.integer(truth))
  }

  truth01 <- if (all(na.omit(unique(truth_chr)) %in% c("0", "1"))) {
    as.integer(truth_chr)
  } else {
    as.integer(truth_chr == positive)
  }

  pred01 <- as.integer(prob >= cutoff)

  tp <- sum(pred01 == 1 & truth01 == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  tn <- sum(pred01 == 0 & truth01 == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  fp <- sum(pred01 == 1 & truth01 == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  fn <- sum(pred01 == 0 & truth01 == 1, na.rm = TRUE)

  data.frame(
    cutoff = cutoff,
    sensitivity = ifelse(tp + fn > 0, tp / (tp + fn), NA_real_),
    specificity = ifelse(tn + fp > 0, tn / (tn + fp), NA_real_),
    precision   = ifelse(tp + fp > 0, tp / (tp + fp), NA_real_),
    accuracy    = ifelse(tp + tn + fp + fn > 0, (tp + tn) / (tp + tn + fp + fn), NA_real_),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

auc_unified <- function(truth, prob, positive = "Severe/Fatal") {
  truth_chr <- if (is.factor(truth) || is.character(truth)) {
    as.character(truth)
  } else {
    as.character(as.integer(truth))
  }

  if (all(na.omit(unique(truth_chr)) %in% c("0", "1"))) {
    truth01 <- as.integer(truth_chr)
    return(as.numeric(
      pROC::auc(
        pROC::roc(
          response = truth01,
          predictor = prob,
          quiet = TRUE
        )
      )
    ))
  }

  truth_fac <- factor(truth_chr, levels = c("Other", positive))

  as.numeric(
    pROC::auc(
      pROC::roc(
        response = truth_fac,
        predictor = prob,
        levels = c("Other", positive),
        quiet = TRUE
      )
    )
  )
}

# Original-model prevalence cutoff should come from the original training split
if (exists("train_data")) {
  original_prev_cutoff <- mean(train_data$SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal", na.rm = TRUE)
} else if (exists("train_set")) {
  original_prev_cutoff <- mean(train_set$SevereBinary == "Severe/Fatal", na.rm = TRUE)
} else {
  stop("Could not find original training data to compute the prevalence cutoff.")
}

threshold_label_05   <- "0.50"
threshold_label_prev <- paste0("Cutoff = ", round(original_prev_cutoff, 4))

cat("Original train prevalence cutoff =", round(original_prev_cutoff, 4), "\n")

build_model_rows <- function(model_name, truth, prob,
                             include_prevalence_row = TRUE,
                             prevalence_cutoff = original_prev_cutoff,
                             prevalence_label = threshold_label_prev,
                             positive = "Severe/Fatal") {

  if (length(truth) != length(prob)) {
    stop("Length mismatch for model: ", model_name)
  }

  auc_val <- auc_unified(truth, prob, positive = positive)

  row_05 <- metric_at_cutoff_unified(
    truth = truth,
    prob = prob,
    cutoff = 0.50,
    positive = positive
  )
  row_05$model <- model_name
  row_05$threshold <- threshold_label_05

  out <- row_05

  if (isTRUE(include_prevalence_row)) {
    row_prev <- metric_at_cutoff_unified(
      truth = truth,
      prob = prob,
      cutoff = prevalence_cutoff,
      positive = positive
    )
    row_prev$model <- model_name
    row_prev$threshold <- prevalence_label
    out <- dplyr::bind_rows(out, row_prev)
  }

  out %>%
    dplyr::mutate(test_auc = auc_val) %>%
    dplyr::select(model, test_auc, threshold, sensitivity, specificity, precision, accuracy)
}

all_model_rows <- list()

# -------------------------
# Original models
# -------------------------
if (exists("test_set") && exists("test_phat")) {
  all_model_rows[["baseline_original"]] <- build_model_rows(
    model_name = "Baseline GLM",
    truth = test_set$SevereBinary,
    prob  = as.numeric(test_phat),
    include_prevalence_row = TRUE
  )
}

if (exists("y_test") && exists("p_test")) {
  all_model_rows[["lasso_original"]] <- build_model_rows(
    model_name = "LASSO GLMNET",
    truth = y_test,
    prob  = as.numeric(p_test),
    include_prevalence_row = TRUE
  )
}

if (exists("test_y_scen") && exists("test_phat_scen")) {
  all_model_rows[["scenario_original"]] <- build_model_rows(
    model_name = "Targeted Scenario GLM",
    truth = test_y_scen,
    prob  = as.numeric(test_phat_scen),
    include_prevalence_row = TRUE
  )
}

if (exists("test_y_subgroup") && exists("test_phat_subgroup")) {
  all_model_rows[["subgroup_original"]] <- build_model_rows(
    model_name = "Baseline GLM + Subgroup Extension",
    truth = test_y_subgroup,
    prob  = as.numeric(test_phat_subgroup),
    include_prevalence_row = TRUE
  )
}

# -------------------------
# Original random forests
# -------------------------
if (exists("rf_frames") && exists("rf_test_phat")) {
  all_model_rows[["rf_original"]] <- build_model_rows(
    model_name = "Random Forest",
    truth = rf_frames$test$SevereBinary,
    prob  = as.numeric(rf_test_phat),
    include_prevalence_row = TRUE
  )
}

if (exists("test_rf_wt") && exists("rf_wt_test_phat")) {
  all_model_rows[["rf_class_weighted"]] <- build_model_rows(
    model_name = "Random Forest (Class-Weighted)",
    truth = test_rf_wt$SevereBinary,
    prob  = as.numeric(rf_wt_test_phat),
    include_prevalence_row = TRUE
  )
}

# -------------------------
# Undersampled models
# -------------------------
if (exists("test_set_us") && exists("baseline_glm_us_test_phat")) {
  all_model_rows[["baseline_us"]] <- build_model_rows(
    model_name = "Baseline GLM (Undersampled 1:1)",
    truth = test_set_us$SevereBinary,
    prob  = as.numeric(baseline_glm_us_test_phat),
    include_prevalence_row = FALSE
  )
}

if (exists("test_set_us") && exists("lasso_glmnet_us_test_phat")) {
  all_model_rows[["lasso_us"]] <- build_model_rows(
    model_name = "LASSO GLMNET (Undersampled 1:1)",
    truth = test_set_us$SevereBinary,
    prob  = as.numeric(lasso_glmnet_us_test_phat),
    include_prevalence_row = FALSE
  )
}

if (exists("test_scen_us") && exists("targeted_scenario_glm_us_test_phat")) {
  all_model_rows[["scenario_us"]] <- build_model_rows(
    model_name = "Targeted Scenario GLM (Undersampled 1:1)",
    truth = test_scen_us$SevereBinary,
    prob  = as.numeric(targeted_scenario_glm_us_test_phat),
    include_prevalence_row = FALSE
  )
}

if (exists("test_sub_us") && exists("subgroup_extension_glm_us_test_phat")) {
  all_model_rows[["subgroup_us"]] <- build_model_rows(
    model_name = "Baseline GLM + Subgroup Extension (Undersampled 1:1)",
    truth = test_sub_us$SevereBinary,
    prob  = as.numeric(subgroup_extension_glm_us_test_phat),
    include_prevalence_row = FALSE
  )
}

if (exists("rf_us_frames") && exists("rf_us_test_phat")) {
  all_model_rows[["rf_us"]] <- build_model_rows(
    model_name = "Random Forest (Undersampled 1:1)",
    truth = rf_us_frames$test$SevereBinary,
    prob  = as.numeric(rf_us_test_phat),
    include_prevalence_row = FALSE
  )
}

if (length(all_model_rows) == 0) {
  stop("No model predictions found. Run at least one original or undersampled model chunk first.")
}

# -------------------------
# Build ordered comparison table
# -------------------------
all_model_compare_tbl_full <- dplyr::bind_rows(all_model_rows) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    version = dplyr::case_when(
      grepl("Undersampled 1:1", model) ~ "Undersampled",
      TRUE ~ "Original"
    ),
    model_family = dplyr::case_when(
      grepl("^Baseline GLM \\+ Subgroup Extension", model) ~ "Baseline GLM + Subgroup",
      grepl("^Baseline GLM($| \\(Undersampled 1:1\\)$)", model) ~ "Baseline GLM",
      grepl("^LASSO GLMNET", model) ~ "LASSO GLMNET",
      grepl("^Random Forest \\(Class-Weighted\\)", model) ~ "RF (Class-Weighted)",
      grepl("^Random Forest($| \\(Undersampled 1:1\\)$)", model) ~ "Random Forest",
      grepl("^Targeted Scenario GLM", model) ~ "Targeted Scenario GLM",
      TRUE ~ model
    ),
    family_order = dplyr::case_when(
      model_family == "Baseline GLM" ~ 1L,
      model_family == "Baseline GLM + Subgroup" ~ 2L,
      model_family == "LASSO GLMNET" ~ 3L,
      model_family == "Random Forest" ~ 4L,
      model_family == "RF (Class-Weighted)" ~ 5L,
      model_family == "Targeted Scenario GLM" ~ 6L,
      TRUE ~ 99L
    ),
    version_order = dplyr::case_when(
      version == "Original" ~ 1L,
      version == "Undersampled" ~ 2L,
      TRUE ~ 99L
    ),
    threshold_order = dplyr::case_when(
      threshold == "0.50" ~ 1L,
      TRUE ~ 2L
    ),
    threshold_short = dplyr::case_when(
      threshold == "0.50" ~ "0.50",
      TRUE ~ "Prev cutoff"
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(family_order, version_order, threshold_order)

all_model_compare_tbl <- all_model_compare_tbl_full %>%
  dplyr::select(
    model = model_family,
    version,
    threshold = threshold_short,
    test_auc,
    sensitivity,
    specificity,
    precision,
    accuracy
  )

cat("\nUnified model comparison table:\n")
print(all_model_compare_tbl)

auc_only_tbl <- all_model_compare_tbl_full %>%
  dplyr::distinct(model_family, version, test_auc, family_order, version_order) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(family_order, version_order) %>%
  dplyr::select(model = model_family, version, test_auc)

# -------------------------
# Export a cleaner image for slides
# -------------------------
table_for_export <- all_model_compare_tbl %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    test_auc    = sprintf("%.4f", test_auc),
    sensitivity = sprintf("%.4f", sensitivity),
    specificity = sprintf("%.4f", specificity),
    precision   = sprintf("%.4f", precision),
    accuracy    = sprintf("%.4f", accuracy)
  )

dir.create("table_exports", showWarnings = FALSE)
table_png_path <- file.path("table_exports", "model_comparison_table.png")

n_rows <- nrow(table_for_export)

table_theme <- gridExtra::ttheme_minimal(
  base_size = 13,
  core = list(
    fg_params = list(fontsize = 12, col = "black"),
    bg_params = list(fill = "white", col = "#D9D9D9")
  ),
  colhead = list(
    fg_params = list(fontsize = 13, fontface = "bold", col = "white"),
    bg_params = list(fill = dark_green, col = "white")
  )
)

tbl_grob <- gridExtra::tableGrob(
  table_for_export,
  rows = NULL,
  theme = table_theme
)

# Set column widths
tbl_grob$widths[1] <- grid::unit(3.3, "in")  # model
tbl_grob$widths[2] <- grid::unit(1.5, "in")  # version
tbl_grob$widths[3] <- grid::unit(1.4, "in")  # threshold
tbl_grob$widths[4] <- grid::unit(1.0, "in")  # auc
tbl_grob$widths[5] <- grid::unit(1.1, "in")  # sens
tbl_grob$widths[6] <- grid::unit(1.1, "in")  # spec
tbl_grob$widths[7] <- grid::unit(1.0, "in")  # precision
tbl_grob$widths[8] <- grid::unit(1.0, "in")  # accuracy

# Set row heights
tbl_grob$heights <- rep(grid::unit(0.34, "in"), length(tbl_grob$heights))

# Standard alternating-row theme
for (i in seq_along(tbl_grob$grobs)) {
  grob_name <- tbl_grob$layout$name[i]
  col_num   <- tbl_grob$layout$l[i]
  row_num   <- tbl_grob$layout$t[i]

  # Zebra striping for body rows only
  if (grob_name == "core-bg") {
    body_row <- row_num - 1
    fill_col <- if (body_row %% 2 == 1) "white" else "#A8D5BA"
    tbl_grob$grobs[[i]]$gp$fill <- fill_col
    tbl_grob$grobs[[i]]$gp$col  <- "#D9D9D9"
  }

  # Header style
 if (grob_name == "core-bg") {
  body_row <- row_num - 1
  fill_col <- if (body_row %% 2 == 1) "#A8D5BA" else "#F5F5F5"
  tbl_grob$grobs[[i]]$gp$fill <- fill_col
  tbl_grob$grobs[[i]]$gp$col  <- "#D9D9D9"
}

  # Text alignment
  if (grob_name %in% c("core-fg", "colhead-fg")) {
    if (col_num %in% c(1, 2, 3)) {
      tbl_grob$grobs[[i]]$hjust <- 0
      tbl_grob$grobs[[i]]$x <- grid::unit(0.03, "npc")
    } else {
      tbl_grob$grobs[[i]]$hjust <- 0.5
      tbl_grob$grobs[[i]]$x <- grid::unit(0.5, "npc")
    }
  }
}

png_height <- max(1400, 220 + 70 * (n_rows + 1))

png(
  filename = table_png_path,
  width = 3000,
  height = png_height,
  res = 220
)
grid::grid.newpage()
grid::grid.draw(tbl_grob)
dev.off()

cat("\nSaved table image to:", table_png_path, "\n\n")
knitr::include_graphics(table_png_path)
```
